TL;DR: 本文提出了EgoKit，一套统一的体视视频采集工具包，支持六种不同设备，实现一致的操作和数据格式，并便捷扩展手腕视角采集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人学习、活动理解和Embodied AI领域，体视视频数据需求大增，但不同设备采集流程碎片化、SDK和数据格式各异，缺乏跨设备一致采集方案，尤其双视角（头部与手腕）采集难以快速部署。

Method: EgoKit通过封装六类主流设备（安卓手机、iPhone、iPad、智能眼镜、XR头显等）的采集流程，实现一致的录制体验与本地数据格式。在XR平台，还结合头部姿态与OpenXR手部26关节追踪记录。辅以腕部专用相机、头带、USB-C集线器等配件，支持即插即用的手腕视角扩展，无需特殊定制硬件。

Result: EgoKit在多种主流设备上实现了一致、便捷的双视角（头部+手腕）视频与语义数据采集，降低了研究者部署流程的技术门槛，且易于跨平台迁移。

Conclusion: EgoKit为体视视频采集标准化提供有效工具，简化跨设备协作与数据集构建流程，有助于推动机器人、活动理解等领域的多场景大规模数据积累和方法研究。

Abstract: Egocentric video is increasingly used as a data source for robot learning, activity understanding, and embodied AI research, but collecting it at scale remains fragmented in practice: each candidate host device, such as an Android phone, iPhone, iPad, smart glasses, or extended reality (XR) headset, exposes a different SDK, a different policy on raw camera access, and different limitations on external USB cameras and on-device tracking. Synchronized ego-view and wrist-view capture is therefore typically obtained by either committing to a single proprietary platform or building one-off rigs that do not transfer across devices. To address this gap, we present EgoKit, a toolkit that exposes the same egocentric recording workflow across six heterogeneous host devices. Across all supported devices, EgoKit presents the same recording interaction and produces locally stored video with a uniform log format; on XR headsets, it additionally logs head pose and OpenXR-standard 26-joint hand tracking aligned to the video streams. The companion accessories, including two wrist cameras with mounts, a head strap, and a USB-C hub, add wrist-view capture to any supported host without custom hardware fabrication. EgoKit is available at \url{https://egokit.chuange.org/}.

</details>


### [74] [VolTA-3D: Self-Supervised Learning for Brain MRI using 3D Volumetric Token Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16775)
*Amy Makawana,Abhijeet Parida,Marius George Linguraru,Julia Ive,Syed Muhammad Anwar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Volta-3D是一种自监督的3D视觉Transformer框架，能提升脑MRI分析的泛化能力，在多任务下取得了优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D脑MRI模型大多只适用于分割或分类中的某一项任务，泛化能力不足，难以适应多数据集、成像协议和不同下游任务，限制了实际临床价值。

Method: 提出Volta-3D框架，通过自监督学习的方式，结合学生-教师范式，将全局类风格token与局部patch token对齐，并进行结构重建，以增强表示学习的多样性和解剖特征捕捉能力，提高模型泛化及转移能力。

Result: 在多项分布外下游任务中（如海马分割、性别及阿尔茨海默病分类），Volta-3D的特征表示优于随机初始化基线，表现出更强的迁移性和对领域变化的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 联合施加全局语义一致性和局部结构学习，有助于实现无标注脑MRI的更广泛语义理解，支持更有效的多任务下游表现，推动3D脑成像模型向通用和临床可用方向发展。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has advanced medical image analysis be enabling learning form large unlabelled data. However, in brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), most 3D models remain specialized for either segmentation of classification, limiting their ability to generalize across datasets, imaging protocols,, and downstream tasks. This lack of transferability constrains the clinical utility of 3D MRI models, despite the availability of unlabeled volumetric data. We present Volta-3D, a self-supervised 3D Vision Transformer framework designed to learn transferable volumetric representations. Volta-3D jointly aligns global class-style tokens and local patch tokens within a student-teacher paradigm and enforces fine-grained structural reconstruction. This combined global-local alignment addresses the limited semantic diversity and subtle anatomical characteristics of brain MRI, which challenges existing SSL approaches. We evaluate Volta-3D on multiple out-of-distribution downstream tasks, including hippocampal segmentation and classification of sex and Alzheimer's disease versus healthy controls. Across all tasks, representations learned by Volta-3D outperform randomly initialized baselines, demonstrating improved transferability and robustness under domain shift. Hence jointly enforcing global semantic consistency and local structural learning during pretraining enables broader concept learning from unlabeled brain MRI data. Overall VolTA-3D supports effective multi-task downstream performance with task-specific pertaining, a step towards generalizable and clinically viable 3D models.

</details>


### [75] [CLAP: Contrastive Latent-space Prompt Optimization for End-to-end Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17284)
*Ruiyang Zhu,Yuehan He,Boyuan Zheng,Zesen Zhao,Ahmad Chalhoub,Qingzhao Zhang,Z. Morley Mao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出CLAP方法，通过软提示和V2X通信，提升自动驾驶系统在罕见复杂场景下的表现，有效减少了规划误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于视觉-语言-动作模型的自动驾驶系统，在常规场景下表现良好，但在诸如施工区、复杂让行路段等少见且安全关键的长尾场景下表现脆弱。针对单靠扩展数据或模型训练难以解决这些挑战，作者提出了新的应对方案。

Method: 提出CLAP（对比潜空间提示优化）框架：冻结已有模型，通过为每个道路障碍设置基于众包数据并通过V2X通信检索的个性化软提示。首先用监督式对比学习在潜空间中发现特定困难场景方向，然后利用方向性正则化优化，重点提升长尾场景的表现，并保持常规场景性能。

Result: 在NAVSIM基准测试和多种VLA模型上，CLAP方法在具有挑战性的场景下，将规划误差减少了24%，且不会影响正常场景下的系统表现。

Conclusion: CLAP有效增强了自动驾驶模型在复杂和罕见道路场景中的适应性，提高了整体安全与鲁棒性。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems powered by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong performance on common driving scenarios, yet remain brittle in rare but safety-critical long-tail situations such as active construction zones and complex yielding geometries. In this paper, we present a method that addresses the long-tail challenging scenes beyond data scaling and model training. We introduce CLAP (Contrastive Latent-space Prompt optimization), a location-aware adaptation framework that augments a frozen VLA driving model with per-roadblock soft prompts, optimized from crowdsourced data and retrieved on demand via Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication. Our approach rests on two observations from VLAs' latent space: (i) at the VLA's hidden-state layer, scenarios from the same roadblock cluster tightly and occupy compact regions of the latent space; and (ii) within a single roadblock, long-tail and normal frames are heavily intermixed in the latent representation, making it difficult to improve one without disturbing the other. CLAP addresses this via a two-stage pipeline: supervised contrastive learning to discover a roadblock-specific hard-scene direction, followed by directionally regularized prompt optimization that selectively improves challenging frames while preserving normal frame performance. On the NAVSIM benchmark with various state-of-the-art VLA backbones, CLAP reduces challenging scenario planning error by 24% with no regression on normal frames, significantly improving planning performance.

</details>


### [76] [A Holistic Method for Superquadric Fitting Using Unsupervised Clustering Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16779)
*Mingyang Zhao,Sipu Ruan,Xiaohong Jia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新方法，在存在噪声和异常值的情况下，将超二次曲面（superquadrics）拟合到点云数据，并统一处理刚性与可变形曲面。该方法基于无监督聚类的思想，提升了拟合的稳定性与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的超二次曲面拟合方法在处理含噪声和异常值的点云时，常发生稳健性和数值不稳定问题，并且往往局限于只能处理刚性或可变形曲面中的一种，缺乏统一且高效的拟合框架。

Method: 作者将超二次曲面拟合问题重新表述为无监督聚类问题：将点云视为聚类成员，将超二次曲面参数化表面采样点视为聚类中心。通过动态更新“聚类中心”位置（等价于优化超二次曲面参数）实现拟合，并提出了将成对距离计算与曲面正交距离关联，从而避免耗时的表面采样。方法还推导了模糊隶属度向量与协方差矩阵的闭式解，提升了迭代效率，并给出了理论收敛性证明。

Result: 该方法能够高效且稳健地在含有噪声及离群点的点云数据上实现超二次曲面的统一拟合，对刚性和可变形曲面均适用。算法在数值实验上表现出比现有方法更高的稳定性、抗噪声能力和收敛速度。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于聚类分析的拟合方法不仅增强了目标函数的凸性，降低陷入局部极小值的风险，还实现了高效、统一的超二次曲面拟合。方法具备理论保障与良好实验性能，并已开源实现，有望广泛应用于各类三维形状建模任务。

Abstract: This work presents a novel method for fitting superquadrics to point clouds under the contamination of noise and outliers, which has many applications for shape modeling across diverse fields. Unlike prior approaches that either exclusively focus on fitting rigid or deformable superquadrics, or suffer from robustness and numerical instability issues, our method redefines the problem from a new unsupervised clustering perspective, enabling the holistic fitting of both rigid and deformable superquadrics within a unified framework. Central to our approach is a stable optimization function inspired by unsupervised clustering analysis, where we formulate the point cloud data and samples from the potential parametric surface as clustering members and centroids, respectively. Then, the clustering process with dynamic updates to centroid locations serves as a direct proxy for optimizing superquadric parameters, establishing a principled link between geometric fitting and clustering dynamics. We further derive the relationship between pairwise computations of clustering centroids and clustering members to orthogonal distances, effectively eliminating the need for the time-consuming surface sampling process. Moreover, our formulation provides closed-form analytical solutions for both the fuzzy membership degree vector and the covariance matrix, ensuring efficient iteration optimization and enabling more effective handling of geometric deformations. In addition, we provide a theoretical certificate of convergence analysis and demonstrate that the clustering-inspired fitting method can escape local minima by inherently increasing the convexity of the objective function. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/zikai1/SuperquadricFitting.

</details>


### [77] [StableVLA: Towards Robust Vision-Language-Action Models without Extra Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18287)
*Yiyang Fu,Chubin Zhang,Shukai Gong,Yufan Deng,Kaiwei Sun,Qiyang Min,Qibin Hou,Yansong Tang,Jianan Wang,Daquan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了信息瓶颈适配器（IB-Adapter）增强VLA模型在未见视觉扰动下的鲁棒性，无需额外数据或增强，性能提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在遇到训练集未覆盖的视觉扰动时表现大幅下降，实际应用中鲁棒性堪忧。该研究旨在提升VLA模型面对真实世界未见扰动时的稳定性与可靠性。

Method: 设计轻量级的信息瓶颈适配器（IB-Adapter），基于信息理论机制过滤视觉输入中的潜在噪声，无需增加数据或采用数据增强方式，仅在原有模型上增加少量参数即可部署。

Result: IB-Adapter平均带来30%的性能提升，新增参数不足1000万。即便基础模型大幅缩小（参数仅0.5B，且无Open X-Embodiment预训练），其鲁棒性仍优于7B参数的主流VLA大模型，长时序任务准确性保持领先，对合成及真实扰动均有显著优越性。

Conclusion: IB-Adapter能有效提升VLA模型在未见视觉扰动下的鲁棒性和效率，且无需额外数据，实际部署开销极小，具备很强的实际应用价值。

Abstract: It is infeasible to encompass all possible disturbances within the training dataset. This raises a critical question regarding the robustness of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models when encountering unseen real-world visual disturbances, particularly under imperfect visual conditions. In this work, we conduct a systematic study based on recent state-of-the-art VLA models and reveal a significant performance drop when visual disturbances absent from the training data are introduced. To mitigate this issue, we propose a lightweight adapter module grounded in information theory, termed the Information Bottleneck Adapter (IB-Adapter), which selectively filters potential noise from visual inputs. Without requiring any extra data or augmentation strategies, IB-Adapter consistently improves over the baseline by an average of 30%, while adding fewer than 10M parameters, demonstrating notable efficiency and effectiveness. Furthermore, even with a 14x smaller backbone (0.5B parameters) and no pre-training on the Open X-Embodiment dataset, our model StableVLA achieves robustness competitive with 7B-scale state-of-the-art VLAs. With negligible parameter overhead (<10M), our approach maintains accuracy on long-horizon tasks and surpasses OpenPi under both synthetic and physical visual corruptions.

</details>


### [78] [Encoding Robust Topological Signatures for Hyperdimensional Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16785)
*Arpan Kusari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合拓扑引导和RTS（旋转/平移/缩放）不变表征的超维（HD）计算方法，有效提升了HD计算在图像分布扰动下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统超维计算在像素级编码下，对旋转、噪声、遮挡等小幅分布扰动极为敏感，限制了其在边缘设备学习中的应用，需要一种结构更稳健的特征表示。

Method: 方法从二值化形状中抽取拓扑元素（如孔洞），分别对外部轮廓与各孔洞采用RTS不变的Zernike矩阵（空间金字塔变体）和Fourier描述符进行表征，并结合相对几何关系，实现多层次特征表达。各拓扑元素通过随机投影和role binding编码为超向量，最终通过无序合成聚合所有特征。为防止特征失衡，基于验证集学习Zernike与孔洞通道的可靠性权重，在余弦相似性融合阶段加权输出。

Result: 在MNIST和EMNIST数据集上，该方法对旋转、高斯噪声、椒盐噪声、遮挡、缩放等多种扰动展现出显著鲁棒性，在各类扰动下准确率远超传统HD方法，对比小型CNN在干净数据上的准确率相当，但在被扰动时表现显著更好。

Conclusion: 融入显式拓扑结构可显著提升超维表示对像素级扰动的鲁棒性，方法简便、高效，且适合边缘设备的轻量级在线训练，具有极高的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Hyperdimensional (HD) computing offers an attractive alternative to deep networks for edge learning due to its simplicity, fast prototype-based inference, and compatibility with online updates. However, standard pixel-based HD encoders are brittle: small distribution shifts such as rotation, noise, or occlusion can drastically reduce accuracy. We extract discrete topological primitives-most notably holes-from binarized shapes and pair them with rotation/translation/scale (RTS)-invariant shape signatures. Our method constructs RTS-stable descriptors for (i) the outer shape using a spatial-pyramid variant of Zernike moments and (ii) each hole using an intrinsic Fourier descriptor of its radial signature together with RTS-canonical relative geometry. Each primitive is mapped to a bipolar hypervector via randomized projection and role binding, and variable-cardinality hole sets are aggregated by permutation-invariant bundling to form a single image hypervector. To avoid over-weighting any cue, we learn nonnegative reliability weights for the Zernike and hole channels on a validation set via late fusion of cosine similarities. Experiments on MNIST and EMNIST under controlled corruptions (rotation, Gaussian noise, salt-and-pepper, cutout, zoom) show that Topology-guided HD computing substantially improves robustness compared with a naive HD baseline, maintaining high accuracy across multiple corruption families and benefiting from lightweight online training. Compared with a compact CNN trained on clean data, our method achieves competitive clean accuracy while offering markedly stronger robustness to several pixel-level corruptions, demonstrating that explicit topological structure is a practical route to robust HD representations. The code is provided at https://github.com/arpan-kusari/Topological-HDC.

</details>


### [79] [ESI-Bench: Towards Embodied Spatial Intelligence that Closes the Perception-Action Loop](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18746)
*Yining Hong,Jiageng Liu,Han Yin,Manling Li,Leonidas Guibas,Li Fei-Fei,Jiajun Wu,Yejin Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了ESI-BENCH，一个用于检验具身空间智能的综合性基准，专注于主动探索而非被动感知。实验发现主动探索显著优于被动方法，但模型在动作选择上存在局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统空间智能研究通常假设观测信息是由“先知”给出的，未关注智能体作为主动观察者的角色。作者希望突破这一局限，研究具身智能体如何通过主动感知和行动获取、推理空间信息。

Method: 作者提出ESI-BENCH，包括10个任务类别和29个子类别，基于OmniGibson平台，任务设计参考了Spelke的核心知识体系。实验对现有多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）进行全面评测，并与多种探索策略作对比分析。还进行了人类对比实验。

Result: 主动探索策略比被动策略表现优异，能自发发现空间推理策略。随机多视角方法效果较差，原因在于增加了更多无关信息。多数失败是由选错动作引发的观测不足。显式3D感知对深度任务有利，但3D表示失真会带来更大负面影响。

Conclusion: 模型的主要短板不在感知能力，而在于缺乏高质量动作决策。和人类不同，模型缺少元认知能力，对证据的怀疑和自我修正不足，单纯提升感知或交互能力不能弥补这一差距。

Abstract: Spatial intelligence unfolds through a perception-action loop: agents act to acquire observations, and reason about how observations vary as a function of action. Rather than passively processing what is seen, they actively uncover what is unseen - occluded structure, dynamics, containment, and functionality that cannot be resolved from passive sensing alone. We move beyond prior formulations of spatial intelligence that assume oracle observations by recasting the observer as an actor. We introduce ESI-BENCH, a comprehensive benchmark for embodied spatial intelligence spanning 10 task categories and 29 subcategories built on OmniGibson, grounded in Spelke's core knowledge systems. Agents must decide what abilities to deploy - perception, locomotion, and manipulation - and how to sequence them to actively accumulate task-relevant evidence. We conduct extensive experiments on state-of-the-art MLLMs and find that active exploration substantially outperforms passive counterparts, with agents spontaneously discovering emergent spatial strategies without explicit instructions, while random multi-view often adds noise rather than signal despite consuming far more images. Most failures stem not from weak perception but from action blindness: poor action choices lead to poor observations, which in turn drive cascading errors. While explicit 3D grounding stabilizes reasoning on depth-sensitive tasks, imperfect 3D representation proves more harmful than 2D baselines by distorting spatial relations. Human studies further reveal that unlike humans who seek falsifying viewpoints and revise beliefs under contradiction, models commit prematurely with high confidence regardless of evidence quality, exposing a metacognitive gap that neither better perception nor more embodied interaction alone can close.

</details>


### [80] [Accelerating Rectified Flow Models via Trajectory-Aware Caching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16789)
*Xiao Liu,Kai Liu,Naiyang Guan,Hongliang Lu,Zhixin Wang,Zhikai Chen,Renjing Pei,Yulun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TACache是一种用于扩散和RF（Rectified Flow）图像视频生成模型的全新加速框架，无需训练，通过更智能的跳步与补偿策略，能在保持高质量的同时大幅提高采样速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型和RF模型在生成高质量图像和视频时计算开销巨大，现有的缓存跳步加速方法在跳步跨度大时会引入较多的误差，导致生成质量下降。因此，急需一种在不降低生成质量的情况下进一步加速采样过程的新方法。

Method: 提出了TACache框架，采用'skip-then-compensate'（跳步-补偿）策略。其核心方法是将离散速度加速度分解为平行分量和正交残差，分别对应误差的大小和方向，并通过离线和在线两个阶段完成：离线阶段统计平行及正交变化的阈值决定跳步计划和最大跳步长度；在线阶段结合离线统计和样本历史正交方向，在跳步点重构被跳过的速度，无需额外的模型计算。整个过程无需重新训练模型。

Result: 在BAGEL、FLUX.1-dev与Wan2.1-1.3B三个数据集上，TACache在文本生成图像和视频任务中，分别实现了最高4.14倍和2.11倍的推理加速，在所有基于参考的保真度指标上都优于现有基于缓存的加速方法。

Conclusion: TACache显著提升了文本到图像/视频生成的速度，同时保持了高保真度，且无需额外训练，其方法和思路可以有效扩展到其它扩散类生成任务中，未来有广泛的实际应用前景。

Abstract: Diffusion and rectified flow (RF) models generate high-fidelity images and videos, but their iterative velocity-field evaluations are computationally expensive. Existing caching methods accelerate sampling by skipping timesteps, yet their coarse approximations introduce accumulated errors over long skip intervals and degrade quality under aggressive acceleration. We propose TACache (Trajectory-Aware Cache), a training-free acceleration framework following a skip-then-compensate paradigm. TACache performs an orthogonal decomposition of discrete velocity acceleration along the RF trajectory into a parallel component and an orthogonal residual, isolating the magnitude and directional sources of per-step approximation error. The framework operates in two stages: offline, cumulative variation thresholds on the magnitude and direction indicators yield the skip schedule and bound how far each skip interval may extend; online, at each skipped step the offline statistics are combined with the sample's historical orthogonal direction to reconstruct the skipped velocity without additional model evaluations. Experiments on BAGEL, FLUX.1-dev, and Wan2.1-1.3B show that TACache achieves up to 4.14 speedup on text-to-image generation and 2.11 speedup on text-to-video generation, with consistent improvements over prior cache-based methods on all reference-based fidelity metrics. Code will be released soon.

</details>


### [81] [3DPhysVideo: Consistency-Guided Flow SDE for Video Generation via 3D Scene Reconstruction and Physical Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16795)
*Hwidong Kim,Yunho Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的无需训练的物理一致性视频生成方法3DPhysVideo，可从单张图片生成符合物理规律的视频，大幅提升了流体、多物体等复杂物理场景的真实感和一致性，并在多个基准上超过现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流视频生成模型在物理一致性和真实感方面仍存在明显缺陷，如流体动力学、多物体交互等场景难以真实还原，同时渲染结果常带有违背物理规律的视觉伪影。现有如PhysGen3D方法虽有进展，但在建模复杂物理过程和提高光真实感上仍有挑战。因此，亟需更优的方案能从单图像高效地生成符合物理常识的视频。

Method: 作者提出3DPhysVideo，无需额外训练，分为两个关键阶段：1）利用现成的视频生成模型（I2V流模型），结合点云渲染进行新视角合成，实现完整360度场景几何重建；2）对重建几何应用物理仿真（包括流体和多物体交互），将仿真得到的点云同样输入I2V模型，实现高质量物理一致性视频合成。此外，设计Consistency-Guided Flow SDE，通过将I2V模型的速度预测解耦为去噪和一致性偏置，有效提升3D重建与仿真指导视频生成的一致性。

Result: 在多样化实验（如多物体、流体交互等）中，3DPhysVideo能够高效运行在单张消费级GPU上，生成的物理一致性、真实感视频全面优于当前最佳基线方法，在GPT自动评价、VideoPhy基准和人工评测中均取得领先。

Conclusion: 3DPhysVideo实现了从单张图片生成高物理真实感视频的新突破，方法高效、无需重新训练，且极大提升了多场景多物体下的物理一致性和视觉质量，为基于物理的视频生成和理解提供了可行高效的新工具。

Abstract: Video generative models have made remarkable progress, yet they often yield visual artifacts that violate grounding in physical dynamics. Recent works such as PhysGen3D tackle single image-to-3D physics through mesh reconstruction and Physically-Based Rendering, but challenges remain in modeling fluid dynamics, multi-object interactions and photorealism. This work introduces 3DPhysVideo, a novel training-free pipeline that generates physically realistic videos from a single image. We repurpose an off-the-shelf video model for two stages. First, we use it as a novel view synthesizer to reconstruct complete 360-degree 3D scene geometry by guiding the image-to-video (I2V) flow model with rendered point clouds. Second, after applying physics solvers to this geometry, the physically simulated point cloud is used to guide the same I2V flow model to synthesize final, high-quality videos. Consistency-Guided Flow SDE, which decomposes the predicted velocity of the I2V flow model into denoising and consistency bias, enforces consistency to the conditional inputs, allowing us to effectively repurpose the model for both 3D reconstruction and simulation-guided video generation. In the diverse experiments including multi-objects, and fluid interaction scenes, our method successfully bridges the gap from single-images to physically plausible videos, while remaining efficient to run on a single consumer GPU. It outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on GPT-based scores, VideoPhy benchmark and human evaluation.

</details>


### [82] [NeuroLiDAR: Adaptive Frame Rate Depth Sensing via Neuromorphic Event-LiDAR Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16805)
*Darshana Rathnayake,Dulanga Weerakoon,Meera Radhakrishnan,Archan Misra*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为NeuroLiDAR的自适应深度传感框架，将LiDAR与类神经事件相机数据融合，实现了高于传统LiDAR的动态帧率和更低的深度重建误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LiDAR在深度重建时受到硬件限制，需在测距能力、空间分辨率和帧率之间进行权衡，尤其在响应快速场景变化时表现不足。本文旨在打破这一限制，提高帧率和精度。

Method: NeuroLiDAR融合了时域稀疏的LiDAR数据和时域密集的事件相机数据。系统包含两个主要模块：事件驱动关键帧检测与事件引导的深度外推，能根据场景动态自适应调整传感速率。

Result: 通过新构建的ELiDAR数据集（涵盖室内外场景）进行评估，NeuroLiDAR在RMSE指标上比传统方法减少约29%的重建误差，同时实现了27.8-47.3 Hz的自适应帧率，峰值最高可达约66 Hz。

Conclusion: NeuroLiDAR突破了传统LiDAR的帧率与精度限制，有效提升了三维深度重建能力，并兼顾对动态场景的响应性。

Abstract: LiDARs are widely used for 3D depth reconstruction, but their performance is often limited by inherent hardware constraints that impose trade-offs between range, spatial resolution, and frame rate. Many LiDAR systems typically operate at low frame rates (e.g., 5-10 Hz), prioritizing long-range sensing over responsiveness to rapid scene changes. We present NeuroLiDAR, an adaptive depth sensing framework that achieves effective frame rates of up to $\approx$66 Hz by fusing temporally sparse LiDAR data with temporally dense inputs from neuromorphic event cameras. NeuroLiDAR integrates two components: event-based keyframe detection and event-guided depth extrapolation, to dynamically adjust the sensing rate in response to scene dynamics. To evaluate our approach, we introduce ELiDAR, a dataset spanning outdoor and indoor scenarios, and show that NeuroLiDAR reduces depth reconstruction error by $\approx$29\% in RMSE while achieving adaptive frame rates between 27.8-47.3 Hz. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/darshanakgr/neurolidar.

</details>


### [83] [DecoRec: Decomposed 3D Scene Reconstruction from Single-View Images via Object-Level Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16807)
*Yuhan Ping,Yuan Liu,Xiaoxiao Long,Peng Wang,Junhui Hou,Jianyi Zheng,Jia Pan,Xin Li,Cheng Lin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了DecoRec系统，实现从单张2D图像到分解的3D场景网格的高质量重建，解决了当前单视图重建方法精度不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受限于现有单视图场景重建方法通常只能回归粗糙的3D形状，且缺乏大规模高质量的场景数据集，导致输入图片的外观和几何信息难以准确还原。

Method: DecoRec分步骤重建，先利用最新扩散模型逐个重建单个对象，再通过可微渲染和扩散引导细化的融合流程，将对象组合成完整场景，实现高保真场景重建。

Result: 实验表明，DecoRec在几何还原和新视角合成上均有较高质量表现，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: DecoRec推动了单视图三维场景重建的发展，对室内设计等应用具有实用价值。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce \textit{DecoRec}, a novel system designed to elevate single-view 2D images to a decomposed 3D scene mesh. Current methods for single-view scene reconstruction typically rely on object retrieval or the regression of coarse 3D voxels or surfaces, leading to inaccuracies in capturing the appearance and geometry of the input image. The lack of high-quality large-scale scene-level datasets further complicates direct 3D scene generation from single-view images. To achieve high-quality 3D scene generation from a single-view image, DecoRec takes advantage of recent diffusion-based single-view object reconstruction methods to reconstruct individual objects separately. Subsequently, a refinement pipeline is proposed to effectively merge these reconstructed objects, enhancing appearance and geometry through a differentiable rendering technique and diffusion-guided refinement. Our results demonstrate that DecoRec facilitates high-quality single-view scene reconstruction in both geometry and novel synthesis, offering significant benefits for downstream applications like room interior design.

</details>


### [84] [Training-Free Occluded Text Rendering via Glyph Priors and Attention-Guided Semantic Blending](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16810)
*Jingqi Hou,Hongtian Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的新框架，利用预训练的FLUX.1-dev骨干网络，在文本区生成被遮挡但仍可识别的文字。其方法大幅提升了被遮挡文字的可读性和遮挡物与文字的对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的文本到图像生成模型在渲染被遮挡的文字时表现不佳，常常出现遮挡物漂移或文字变形、悬浮在遮挡物之上等问题，影响了视觉效果和实用性。

Method: 提出了重启式双流推理框架，将文本布局保持与遮挡物插入解耦。基流提供干净的字体参考及关键特征，编辑流接受遮挡提示。结合来自FreeText的频谱字形先验，稳定早期去噪阶段的文字结构。通过多步推理本地化目标文字，估算文字带区域，并生成锚点感知的遮挡掩模。在最终编辑阶段，从相同噪声重启，应用硬掩码引导的图像Token替换，实现遮挡物的准确融合。

Result: 在典型遮挡文本场景上的实验显示，该方法无需模型微调即可显著提升文字的可读性，同时在遮挡物对齐方面具有竞争力，生成的遮挡物和文字组合更稳定。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了现有生成模型在遮挡文字渲染上的缺陷，可实现更高质量、结构更稳定的文字与遮挡物组合，为相关生成任务提供了新的解决思路。

Abstract: We present a training-free framework for occluded text rendering with a pretrained FLUX.1-dev backbone. The task requires a model to render recognizable typography and place an occluding object over the intended text region. This setting remains difficult for existing text-to-image generators: the occluder often drifts away from the text, while the text may be distorted or appear to float on top of the occluding object. To address this problem, we propose a restarted dual-stream inference framework that decouples text-layout preservation from occluder insertion. A Base Stream provides a clean typographic reference and same-step key/value (K/V) features, while the Edit Stream is conditioned on the occlusion prompt. We further adopt the spectral glyph-prior idea from FreeText and adapt it to stabilize the target text structure during early-to-mid denoising. In the reasoning pass, our method localizes the target text, estimates a text-band region from token-conditioned attention and glyph support, and derives an anchor-aware hard fusion mask for the occluder. In the final edit pass, generation restarts from the same initial noise and applies hard mask-guided image-token K/V replacement at selected attention sites, preserving the Base layout outside the mask while injecting the occluder appearance from the Edit Stream inside the mask. Experiments on representative occluded text scenarios demonstrate substantially improved text readability and competitive occlusion alignment, yielding more stable object-on-text compositions without any model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [85] [Observation-Aligned Mask Priors for Learning Physical Dynamics from Authentic Occlusions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16818)
*Chiyuan Ma,Zihan Zhou,Tianshu Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种从不完整观测中学习物理动态的新方法，利用真实观测掩码的分布进行mask采样和上下文-查询划分，能有效提升数据稀疏场景下的重建表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多依赖于简单的掩码生成规则或定义好的分布，但真实的物理观测掩码往往更复杂且非完全随机。由于常用的掩码不足以捕捉真实遮挡特性，导致模型泛化和重建能力有限。因此，需要一种能够更好适配真实观测掩码分布的方法。

Method: 作者提出Observation-Aligned Mask Priors框架，首先用贝叶斯流网络（BFN）在观测掩码上进行预训练，捕捉真实遮挡的拓扑结构。随后利用全局归一化的交叉熵损失，引导BFN生成与每个观测样本对齐的mask。通过将生成的mask与当前观测mask交集，定义上下文和查询数据，然后用扩散模型完成重建。该方案确保所有观测维度具有被查询的概率，避免局部生成塌陷。

Result: 在三个真实卫星遥感遮挡下的海洋观测数据集上（最高分辨率256x256），所提出方法在MSE和PSNR上均优于现有强扩散基线。上下文-查询交集划分保证所有可见维度具有正采样概率，提升了稀疏观测下的表现。

Conclusion: 从真实遮挡中学习mask先验能有效替代简单掩码规则，为不完整物理观测场景中的动态学习和重建带来了更优解，拥有良好推广与实用价值。

Abstract: Learning physical dynamics directly from incomplete observations is challenging because authentic occlusions are structured, sample-dependent, and often missing not at random, whereas existing methods typically rely on heuristic masking rules or predefined mask distributions. We propose Observation-Aligned Mask Priors, a framework that learns the distribution of authentic observation masks and uses it to construct context-query partitions for training from incomplete data. Specifically, we pretrain a Bayesian Flow Network (BFN) on binary observation masks to capture real occlusion topologies, then guide BFN sampling with a globally normalized cross-entropy objective to generate sample-specific masks aligned with each sparse observation. The intersection between the guided mask and the observed mask defines the context, and the remaining observed entries become query targets for a diffusion-based reconstruction model. We show that this intersection-based partitioning gives every valid observed dimension a strictly positive probability of being queried, preventing zero-query dead zones and local generative collapse. Experiments on three real-world oceanographic datasets with authentic satellite occlusions, across resolutions up to 256$\times$256, show consistent improvements over strong diffusion baselines in MSE and PSNR. These results demonstrate that learning mask priors from authentic occlusions is an effective alternative to heuristic masking for learning from incomplete physical observations without access to fully observed fields.

</details>


### [86] [Coarse Semantic Injection for LLM-Conditioned Structured Indoor Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16832)
*Shuliang Zhu,Tomiwa Adey,Jinjia Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种接口保持的语义增强方法，用于提升大型语言模型（LLM）作为结构解码器时对室内3D点云数据的理解能力，尤其加强对门窗等细薄结构与复杂场景下家具的识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D点云编码器在体素化和稀疏池化后，难以充分表达门、窗等细小结构和拥挤场景下的单个家具实例，导致结构解码时遗漏关键信息。

Method: 将点云的几何属性与基于RGB通道编码的粗粒度语义证据（家具、墙、开口、其他）结合，作为新的点属性附加到点云上进行稀疏分词，解码阶段及输出方式保持原有流程不变。同时设计了一个轻量级语义迁移模块，通过辅助训练头调节语义特征分配，提升稀疏池化后的语义信息强度。

Result: 在Structured3D、SpatialLM和ARKitScenes等数据集上，该方法在开口（门窗）定位及杂乱场景家具实例检测方面显著提升了性能。消融实验分析了不同语义源、颜色编码、分词融合和语义迁移注入模块等对效果的贡献。

Conclusion: 接口保持的语义增强能有效改善LLM对3D点云场景的语义结构解析能力，尤其对细小结构和复杂布局的捕捉有明显提升，相关模块设计的细节对整体性能有重要影响。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been used as structured decoders for indoor understanding from 3D point-token inputs. However, point cloud encoders often under-represent thin structural elements such as doors and windows after voxelization and sparse pooling, and may miss individual furniture instances in cluttered scenes. We propose an interface-preserving semantic augmentation for LLM-conditioned structured decoding. The key idea is to associate semantic evidence with the point-cloud representation, reduce it to a coarse four-group code (furniture, walls, openings, and others), and encode it as an RGBB point interface: red for furniture, green for walls, blue for openings, and black for others, where RGBB denotes four semantic color states represented in three RGB channels rather than an additional fourth channel. This semantic color code is appended to the original raw point attributes before tokenization, so geometry and semantics share the same sparse tokenization path while the downstream language model decoder and output serialization remain unchanged. We further introduce a lightweight routed semantic shift module, with an auxiliary head used only for training-time ratio/budget regularization and analysis, to strengthen semantic cues after sparse pooling. The overall pipeline can use RGB-derived semantic evidence. Under these controlled semantic-source settings, the reported metrics improve across Structured3D, the SpatialLM dataset, and ARKitScenes, especially for opening localization and per-instance furniture detection in cluttered scenes. Ablations clarify the roles of semantic source, color coding, token fusion, and shift injection, while also showing that color/entropy effects remain nontrivial.

</details>


### [87] [Learning Relative Representations for Fine-Grained Multimodal Alignment with Limited Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16834)
*Shiwon Kim,Yu Rang Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新的多模态对齐方法，通过学习token级别的跨模态结构，有效提升了有限配对数据下的多模态任务表现。该方法基于可学习锚点，捕捉细粒度跨模态语义关系，在零样本分类、跨模态检索和零样本分割等任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态预训练依赖大量配对数据，但在配对数据稀缺领域难以应用。现有后置对齐方法仅关注全局特征，忽视patch/token级细粒度关系，限制了在需要精细匹配的任务上的泛化能力。

Method: 提出一种基于token级别相对表征和可学习锚点的后置多模态对齐方法。具体做法是将图像和文本分别和本模态空间内的一组可学习锚点计算token级相似度，通过训练，使得配对样本在两模态下都能诱导出一致的相似性结构。整个方法无需加入大规模投影层，仅对锚点参数进行优化。

Result: 在零样本分类、跨模态检索和零样本分割等任务上，本文方法持续且大幅优于现有主流多模态对齐方法，显示出更强的迁移及细粒度跨模态匹配能力。

Conclusion: 建模token级的跨模态结构对于有限配对数据场景下的后置多模态对齐至关重要。提出的方法结构高效、迁移性强，有望推广到更多多模态任务和实际应用中。

Abstract: Multimodal pre-training demonstrates strong generalization performance, but this paradigm is often impractical in domains where paired data are scarce. A promising alternative is post-hoc multimodal alignment, which aligns separately pre-trained unimodal encoders using a limited number of paired examples. However, existing methods focus primarily on aligning global representations, missing patch-token relations. This may hinder transfer to tasks that require fine-grained cross-modal matching beyond coarse sample-level semantics. To address this issue, we propose a post-hoc alignment method that learns token-level cross-modal structure using relative representations. Specifically, we represent images and texts through their token-level similarities to a set of learnable anchors in each modality space, which are trained to induce consistent cross-modal similarity patterns for matched pairs. Despite learning only the anchors without heavy projection layers, our approach consistently outperforms existing methods in zero-shot classification, cross-modal retrieval, and zero-shot segmentation by a substantial margin. This highlights the importance of modeling fine-grained cross-modal structure for effective post-hoc multimodal alignment with limited paired data.

</details>


### [88] [Thinking with Patterns: Breaking the Perceptual Bottleneck in Visual Planning via Pattern Induction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16848)
*Yichang Jian,Boyuan Xiao,Zhenyuan Huang,Yifei Peng,Yao-Xiang Ding*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）规划策略，通过分步感知与视觉模式归纳，提高VLMs从原始视觉输入中进行复杂规划的能力，并在多个任务中验证了效果和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLMs在复杂规划任务中受限于一次性感知能力，难以处理复杂的视觉输入。受多步感知与“用图像思考”（TWI）最新进展启发，作者希望通过分阶段获取和整合局部视觉信息，提升模型的推理与规划能力。

Method: 作者将TWI方法应用于规划任务，将感知过程分解为多个简单步骤，并提出了一种无需额外训练的数据驱动规划策略。此外，为了提升效率，提出模式推理方法，能让VLMs主动识别和利用已知视觉模式，并通过模式归纳方法自发提取可复用的视觉专家。

Result: 在FrozenLake、Crafter和CubeBench等任务中的实验表明，提出的方法在精度与效率之间取得了良好平衡，显著提升了VLMs的复杂任务规划能力，超越了其原有的感知瓶颈。

Conclusion: 分步感知与视觉模式的归纳和推理方法有效提升了VLMs在复杂视觉-语言规划任务中的表现，并且方法兼顾准确性与计算效率，对扩展VLMs实际应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Planning from raw visual input remains a significant challenge for current Vision-Language Models (VLMs), when the complexity of input is beyond their one-step perception capability. Motivated by recent advances in Thinking with Images (TWI), a reasonable solution is to decompose the perception process into simpler steps by iteratively acquiring and incorporating local visual evidence. However, even though current VLMs are well-trained in general TWI ability, their perceptual bottleneck in the planning domain remains. To tackle this challenge, we formulate TWI as a tool to gradually build and reflect an accurate internal world model. We find that the resulting training-free planning strategy enables VLMs to solve tasks that are far beyond their initial capabilities, at the cost that too many TWI operations would significantly increase the computational overhead. To further improve efficiency, we propose Pattern Inference, a novel TWI strategy enabling VLMs to actively recognize known visual patterns in the new tasks and directly infer local world model structures. To obtain these patterns, we propose Pattern Induction, an online inductive learning strategy treating visual patterns as composite and reusable experts, which are autonomously discovered and optimized from experience. Experimental evaluations in FrozenLake, Crafter and CubeBench domains show that our approaches achieve a desirable balance between accuracy and efficiency.

</details>


### [89] [VGGT-CD: Training-Free Robust Registration for 3D Change Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16859)
*Wei Zhang,Songhua Li,Yihang Wu,Qiang Li,Qi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的新型3D变化检测方法VGGT-CD，能更快且更准确地实现多时相影像点云配准和变化提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多在2D领域工作，易将视角变化误判为物理变化，且无法恢复场景深度。即便基础视觉几何模型（如VGGT）可从无姿态照片快速重建点云，但多时相单独重建会遇到尺度歧义、变化污染配准、边界噪声等难以克服的问题。

Method: VGGT-CD设计了两阶段流程：粗配准阶段，通过稀疏关键帧联合推理获得统一尺度空间和初步的Sim(3)先验；精配准阶段，利用静态背景过滤纯化稠密重建，并通过中心对齐优化平移（固定尺度和旋转），用残差自检保证不降精度。

Result: 在World Across Time数据集的11个场景上，VGGT-CD将绝对轨迹误差（ATE）室外减少44%，室内减少59%；配准速度提升6倍，并能无训练地获得高纯度3D变化图。

Conclusion: VGGT-CD无需专门训练，能高效、准确地实现跨时相的3D点云配准和变化检测，显著提升了多时相影像的3D分析能力。

Abstract: 3D change detection from multi-view images is essential for urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and autonomous driving. However, existing methods predominantly operate in the 2D domain, where viewpoint variations are mistaken for physical changes and depth is unavailable. While visual geometry foundation models like VGGT rapidly produce dense point clouds from unposed images, independent per-epoch reconstruction encounters fundamental obstacles: unpredictable inter-epoch scale ambiguity, registration-change paradox where scene changes corrupt alignment, and pervasive edge-flying noise. To address these challenges, we present VGGT-CD, a training-free pipeline decoupling cross-temporal registration from dynamic-change interference. In the Coarse Stage, sparse keyframe joint inference establishes a unified metric space and yields an initial Sim(3) prior. In the Fine Stage, dense reconstructions are purified by isolating static-background correspondences. A closed-form centroid alignment refines the translation while locking scale and rotation, using a residual self-check to mathematically guarantee non-degradation. Evaluated on an 11-scene benchmark from the World Across Time dataset, VGGT-CD reduces Absolute Trajectory Error by 44% outdoors and 59% indoors. It completes registration over 6 times faster, producing high-purity 3D change maps without task-specific training.

</details>


### [90] [Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion for Efficient Document Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16861)
*Mingxu Chai,Ziyu Shen,Chenyu Liu,Kaidi Zhang,Jiazheng Zhang,Dingwei Zhu,Zhiheng Xi,Ruoyu Chen,Jun Long,Jihua Kang,Tao Gui,Qi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion Model (PA-BDM)，通过引入因果去噪和动态缓存提升文档分析效率，同时保证识别准确性和推理吞吐率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Block Diffusion Models（BDMs）虽然支持并行生成和KV缓存，但由于依赖固定块边界，使得块内去噪阶段并行度降低、缓存延迟、上下文信息流不一致，这些都限制了结构敏感型任务的性能。作者为了解决并行性损失、缓存时滞和信息流冲突等问题，提出新的PA-BDM架构。

Method: PA-BDM用前缀到后缀的因果去噪取代了块内双向去噪，将块大小设为最大候选区间而非固定单元。同时，采用Confidence-gated Structural Loss（CSL）构建低熵前缀，并用Progressive Prefix Commitment（PPC）机制在推理时动态将最长可置信前缀缓存。这样每一步都能恢复大规模并行解码空间。

Result: 实验表明，参数为3B的PA-BDM在多个基准下识别成绩更高，并在推理吞吐率上比2.5B的MinerU-Diffusion提升了71.6%。

Conclusion: PA-BDM通过前缀自适应机制，大幅提升了并行生成能力和推理吞吐率，同时解决了结构化文档分析中缓存和信息流不一致等问题，展现了更强的效率和准确性潜力。

Abstract: Block Diffusion Models (BDMs) support parallel generation, flexible-length output, and KV caching, making them promising for efficient document parsing. However, existing BDMs bind denoising and cache commitment to fixed block boundaries: parallelism shrinks during intra-block denoising, while generated tokens cannot be cached until the whole block is completed. Moreover, intra-block bidirectional denoising conflicts with inter-block autoregression, creating inconsistent information flow that can challenge structure-sensitive recognition. We propose the Prefix-Adaptive Block Diffusion Model (PA-BDM), which replaces intra-block bidirectional denoising with causal denoising from prefix to suffix and treats the block size as a maximum candidate range rather than a fixed commitment unit. PA-BDM uses Confidence-gated Structural Loss (CSL) to build low-entropy prefixes before extending training to longer continuations. During inference, Progressive Prefix Commitment (PPC) then dynamically commits the longest reliable prefix into the KV cache and resets the next candidate range from the updated prefix, restoring a large parallel decoding space at each step. Experiments show that the 3B PA-BDM achieves higher recognition scores on several benchmarks and improves inference throughput by 71.6\% over the 2.5B MinerU-Diffusion.

</details>


### [91] [Metric-Guided Feature Fusion of Visual Foundation Models for Segmentation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16864)
*Yachan Guo,JoseLuis Gomez Zurita,Danna Xue,Yi Xiao,AntonioManuel Lopez Pena*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于新指标引导的多视觉基础模型特征融合方法，有效提升了实例感知密集预测任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然大型视觉基础模型（VFMs）在理解语义方面表现优异，但在实例感知密集预测（如实例分割）任务中存在不足。不同VFM模型在表征上有互补性（如区域边界、结构关注点不同），但如何充分融合这些特征仍缺乏有效且可解释的方法。

Method: 作者设计了一套无需标签的特征空间评估指标（结构一致性和边界保真度），用以评估与挑选VFM编码器特征。通过这些指标，筛选出具互补性的主-辅编码器对，并采用简单的融合方案进行特征融合，无需复杂修改网络结构，仅需单阶段训练。

Result: 所提方法在多种密集预测任务上均优于基线模型，提升了目标级语义理解及边界定位精度。

Conclusion: 基于指标引导的多模型特征自适应融合方案，对提升实例感知密集预测任务表现有效，具有良好的推广性和实用意义。

Abstract: Although large-scale visual foundation models (VFMs) achieve remarkable performance in semantic understanding, they still underperform in instance-aware dense prediction tasks. They exhibit different biases in representation: for instance, promptable segmentation models (e.g., SAM2) focus on fine-grained region boundaries, while self-supervised models (e.g., DINOv3) emphasize object-level structure. This observation highlights the potential of combining complementary features from different VFMs to enhance downstream dense prediction tasks. However, naive multi-VFM fusion seldom leads to reliable gains, and interpretable principles for leveraging their complementary features are still underexplored. In this work, we propose a metric-guided approach that effectively selects and aggregates complementary features from different VFMs based on explicit assessment scores. Specifically, we design a suite of label-free metrics in feature space across two aspects, Structural Coherence and Edge Fidelity, to assess features of VFM encoders. Guided by these scores, we identify complementary edge-strong and structure-strong encoder pairs, and integrate them via a master-auxiliary fusion scheme. This feature fusion requires no complex architectural changes and is trained only in a single stage. Our model shows consistent performance gains across multiple dense prediction tasks compared with the baselines, with better object-level semantics and more accurately localized boundaries. The code is available at {https://github.com/gyc-code/metric-guided-fusion}.

</details>


### [92] [HAD: Hallucination-Aware Diffusion Priors for 3D Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16873)
*Xi Liu,Weiwei Sun,Zhou Ren,Chris Broaddus,Siyu Huang,Laurent Guigues*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 这篇论文提出了一种称为 Hallucination-Aware Diffusion prior (HAD) 的方法，能有效减少扩散模型在稀疏视角3D重建时产生的虚假内容，从而提升重建质量，并在多个新视角合成任务基准上取得了最优表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的稀疏视角3D重建虽然能增强重建质量，但常会引入与输入不一致的虚假内容（幻觉现象），影响最终3D模型的可靠性。因此，亟需方法抑制扩散网络带来的幻觉伪影，提升3D重建的一致性和准确性。

Method: 提出HAD（Hallucination-Aware Diffusion prior）方法，利用一个在大规模3D数据上预训练的前馈型新视图合成（NVS）网络，为每个增强图像生成像素级幻觉分数图。该分数图用于在逐步3D重建中屏蔽不可靠像素，防止虚假内容引入。此外，方法还通过不同视角输入条件生成多组增强图像，并加以融合，利用更丰富的全局上下文信息。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法大幅减少了扩散辅助3D重建中的幻觉伪影，在多个新视角合成基准上取得了最优性能。

Conclusion: HAD 能有效改善基于扩散先验的3D重建的一致性与准确性，是消除幻觉伪影、提升3D重建可靠性的重要进展。

Abstract: Diffusion priors have recently demonstrated strong capability in enhancing the quality of sparse-view 3D reconstruction by augmenting training views at novel viewpoints, but they inevitably introduce hallucinated content -- artifacts inconsistent with the input views -- into the final 3D model. To address this challenge, we propose Hallucination-Aware Diffusion prior (HAD), which estimates pixel-wise hallucination score maps for augmented images by leveraging multi-view reasoning capabilities from a feedforward novel view synthesis (NVS) network pre-trained on large-scale 3D data. These hallucination scores enable selective masking of unreliable pixels during the progressive 3D reconstruction procedure, preventing the introduction of non-existent artifacts into the 3D model. To further enhance performance, we create multiple versions of augmented images at each novel view by conditioning the diffusion prior on different input views, which are then fused into a final image that leverages the broader context across all input views. We show that our method substantially reduces hallucination artifacts in diffusion-assisted 3D reconstruction, thereby achieving state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks on novel view synthesis. Our project are publicly available at \href{https://xiliu8006.github.io/HAD-Project-website/}{project website}.

</details>


### [93] [Zero-Shot Faithful Textual Explanations via Directional-Derivative Influence on Predictions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16877)
*Toshinori Yamauchi,Hiroshi Kera,Kazuhiko Kawamoto*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的零样本文本解释方法FaithTrace，通过直接量化解释文本对分类器输出的影响，提高了解释的忠实性，同时填补了相关评价指标的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督文本解释方法通常不能准确反映模型真实决策依据，导致解释与模型实际行为不一致（忠实性有限）。

Method: FaithTrace方法基于模型特征空间，通过计算文本解释所引导方向上类别logit的方向导数（influence score），量化解释对预测的实际影响。此外，还由此延伸出新的量化评测指标。

Result: 实验表明，FaithTrace产生的解释比现有方法更忠实于模型的实际决策依据，提高了模型理解的准确性。

Conclusion: FaithTrace方法有效提升了文档解释的忠实性，为模型决策过程的可解释性和透明度提供了更准确的手段，并为该领域的评估提供了新指标。

Abstract: Zero-shot textual explanations aim to make image classifiers more transparent by probing their internal representations, without relying on task-specific supervision or LVLMs. However, existing methods often miss the features that truly drive the prediction, resulting in limited \textit{faithfulness} to the evidence underlying the model's decision. To address this, we propose FaithTrace. Motivated by the idea that faithful explanations should describe concepts that strongly influence the prediction, FaithTrace directly measures how much the representation induced by the explanation changes the class logit. We introduce an influence score, computed as the directional derivative of the class logit along the text-induced direction in the classifier's feature space, and use it as a proxy for faithfulness. Moreover, we extend this influence score into quantitative evaluation metrics, helping fill the gap in faithfulness evaluation for textual explanations. Experiments show that FaithTrace yields more faithful explanations than baselines, facilitating a more accurate understanding of the model. The code will be publicly released.

</details>


### [94] [Towards Generalized Image Manipulation Localization via Score-based Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16879)
*Yunfei Wang,Bo Du,Zhe Yang,Xin Liu,Zhiyu Lin,Tianxin Xu,Ji-Zhe Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的用于图像篡改定位（IML）的生成式扩散模型DiffIML，能够更好地适应未知的图像篡改类型，并在多个基准测试中大幅优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着合成媒体技术的发展，数字内容的真实性受到威胁，因此需要可靠的图像篡改定位方法。现有判别式方法过于依赖固定决策边界，导致对新型篡改适应性差，泛化能力不足。

Method: 引入基于分数的生成建模——DiffIML，通过近似置信度分数函数（而不是直接划分边界），利用扩散模型和结构先验从噪声中恢复一致的篡改掩码。为提升效率和稳定性，结合了轻量级VAE快速处理、解耦架构轻量化UNet去噪，以及引入边缘监督和误差先验减少采样误差。

Result: 在8个非生成式和3个生成式数据集，两个不同测试协议下进行广泛实验，DiffIML在定位准确度和泛化性上稳定优于最新方法，尤其在未见过的新数据集上有显著提升。

Conclusion: DiffIML通过生成式扩散模型显著提升了IML任务的泛化能力，并有效解决了传统方法易过拟合和对未知篡改适应性差问题。该方法为多媒体取证提供了更强的实用性和稳定性，相关代码将公开。

Abstract: With the rapid evolution of synthetic media, Image Manipulation Localization (IML) has emerged as a critical component in multimedia forensics for ensuring the integrity of digital content. However, generalization remains a core challenge, as existing discriminative methods typically learn a fixed decision boundary that tends to overfit to specific training artifacts and fails to adapt to unseen manipulation types. To address this, we propose DiffIML, a novel framework that introduces score-based generative modeling to IML. Diverging from the direct estimation of hard boundaries, DiffIML approximates the score function, the gradient of the log-likelihood, to capture the intrinsic geometric topology of mask distributions. This paradigm leverages structural priors to iteratively recover coherent masks from noise, thereby circumventing the brittleness associated with discriminative models. Under this formulation, diffusion models serve as an effective numerical solver for the learned score function.To ensure practicality, we respectively resolve the efficiency and stability bottlenecks of standard diffusion by: (1) utilizing a Lightweight Mask-Specific VAE for fast latent-space process and a decoupled architecture with a lightweight denoising UNet, (2) edge supervision and error prior to mitigate error accumulation during sampling. Extensive experiments of two distinct protocols on eight non-generative and three generative benchmarks demonstrate that DiffIML consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding remarkable generalization improvements on diverse unseen datasets. The code will be publicly available.

</details>


### [95] [Mind the Gap: Learning Modality-Agnostic Representations with a Cross-Modality UNet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16887)
*Xin Niu,Enyi Li,Jinchao Liu,Yan Wang,Margarita Osadchy,Yongchun Fang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种新的跨模态识别方法（MarrNet），其核心为一个紧凑的编码-解码神经模块（cmUNet），能够在保留身份相关信息的同时学习模态无关的表征，有效提升了跨模态匹配的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有常用的跨模态识别方法（如缩小分布差异、学习不可区分表征或显式模态迁移）存在保真性和鲁棒性不足的问题，具体表现为丢失判别信息或依赖难以成功实现的模态转换，遇到复杂任务时表现不佳。因此亟需一种既能克服模态差异又能保持身份判别性的通用识别框架。

Method: 作者提出了cmUNet模块，实现了跨模态转换与同模态重建，并引入对抗/感知损失促进表征在原样本空间的不可区分性。基于cmUNet，搭建了MarrNet结构，通过标准特征提取与相似度评分实现跨模态匹配。方法在五项典型跨模态任务上进行了实验，包括拉曼-红外光谱匹配、跨模态人体重识别、异构人脸识别（照片-素描、可见光-近红外、可见光-热成像）。

Result: 实验结果显示，MarrNet在涉及多种模态的五大任务上均优于现有主流方法，表现出优异的准确率和泛化能力。作者还揭示某些方法在模态差异处理不佳的情况下，可能依赖局部或错误信息，造成泛化能力下降。MarrNet拥有更好的遮挡鲁棒性，这可能是衡量跨模态方法是否能有效弥合模态差距的指标。

Conclusion: 该方法为跨模态识别提供了新的解决路线，在有效缩小模态差距的同时，兼顾判别信息保留和泛化鲁棒性，对跨模态识别的科学和实际应用具有意义。

Abstract: Cross-modality recognition has many important applications in science, law enforcement and entertainment. Popular methods to bridge the modality gap include reducing the distributional differences of representations of different modalities, learning indistinguishable representations or explicit modality transfer. The first two approaches suffer from the loss of discriminant information while removing the modality-specific variations. The third one heavily relies on the successful modality transfer, could face catastrophic performance drop when explicit modality transfers are not possible or difficult. To tackle this problem, we proposed a compact encoder-decoder neural module (cmUNet) to learn modality-agnostic representations while retaining identity-related information. This is achieved through cross-modality transformation and in-modality reconstruction, enhanced by an adversarial/perceptual loss which encourages indistinguishability of representations in the original sample space. For cross-modality matching, we propose MarrNet where cmUNet is connected to a standard feature extraction network which takes as inputs the modality-agnostic representations and outputs similarity scores for matching. We validated our method on five challenging tasks, namely Raman-infrared spectrum matching, cross-modality person re-identification and heterogeneous (photo-sketch, visible-near infrared and visible-thermal) face recognition, where MarrNet showed superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, it is observed that a cross-modality matching method could be biased to extract discriminant information from partial or even wrong regions, due to incompetence of dealing with modality gaps, which subsequently leads to poor generalization. We show that robustness to occlusions can be an indicator of whether a method can well bridge the modality gap.

</details>


### [96] [Controlling Decision Drift in Multimodal Sentiment Analysis with Missing Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16889)
*Chenglizhao Chen,Yuchen Cao,Xinyu Liu,Mengke Song,Guisheng Zhang,Xiaomin Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种两级参考对齐框架，以提升多模态情感分析在模态缺失和模态质量不平衡场景下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的多模态数据常常存在模态缺失和模态质量不平衡问题，当前方法在生成缺失模态特征时易出现表达机制和情感动态不一致，从而导致预测误差。同时，不可靠模态在特征融合时可能主导表示，造成不稳定的情感建模。

Method: 提出了两级参考对齐（two-level reference alignment）框架：第一级利用完整模态样本约束特征空间，并对不同模态组合表示进行对齐；第二级在决策层抑制不可靠模态，通过原型检索和投票实现跨模态一致性。

Result: 在CMU-MOSI和CMU-MOSEI数据集的多种模态缺失设置下，该方法均取得了性能提升。在完全模态输入条件下，准确率分别达到86.28%与85.88%，F1值为86.24%与85.86%，刷新了当前最佳水平。

Conclusion: 该方法在多样模态缺失情形下能保持稳定、可靠的情感预测能力，具有良好的泛化性和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis relies on textual, acoustic, and visual signals, yet real-world data often suffer from modality missing and quality imbalance. Existing methods generate features for modality missing from available ones, but differences in expression mechanisms and sentiment dynamics across modalities may cause the generated features to deviate from true distributions and mislead prediction. In addition, unreliable modalities may dominate fusion, resulting in representation shift across modality combinations and unstable sentiment representations. To address these challenges, we propose a two-level reference alignment framework. The framework introduces stable references at the feature representation and sentiment decision levels to improve robustness under modality missing. First-level reference alignment leverages complete-modality samples to constrain representations and align different modality combinations into a shared sentiment space. Second-level reference alignment enforces cross-modal consistency at the decision level by suppressing unreliable modalities through prototype retrieval and voting. As a result, the framework maintains stable and reliable sentiment predictions under diverse missing-modality patterns. Experiments on CMU-MOSI and CMU-MOSEI show consistent improvements across various missing-modality settings. Under full-modality input, the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with ACC of 86.28% and 85.88%, and F1 of 86.24% and 85.86%.

</details>


### [97] [DriveSafe: A Framework for Risk Detection and Safety Suggestions in Driving Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16892)
*Sainithin Artham,Shankar Gangisetty,Avijit Dasgupta,C. V. Jawahar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DriveSafe提出了一种基于多模态大模型的自动驾驶场景风险感知方案，通过生成结合空间和动态信息的结构化自然语言描述，并微调轻量模块提升针对性，实现了超越现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶需要准确感知并评估环境中的风险，但零样本的多模态大模型在细粒度、空间相关的风险评估方面表现不佳，尚不及特定领域方法。本文旨在弥合通用多模态模型与专业风险感知能力之间的差距。

Method: 提出DriveSafe框架，先用多模态信息（运动、空间、深度线索）生成空间定位的丰富场景描述，再利用这些描述进行风险评估。这包括识别危险物体、位置及其不安全行为，并给出安全建议。同时，通过描述-风险配对数据微调高效适配器模型，将领域知识注入基础大模型。

Result: DriveSafe在DRAMA基准上实现了最新最优性能。消融实验表明所提出的场景语言描述和风险配对微调机制显著提升了风险评估效果，在零样本多模态模型和领域特定基线之上取得明显提升。

Conclusion: 通过结构化自然语言描述和领域知识微调，DriveSafe显著提升了自动驾驶风险感知能力，为多模态大模型在安全关键场景中的应用提供了有效方法论支持。

Abstract: Comprehensive situational awareness is essential for autonomous vehicles operating in safety-critical environments, as it enables the identification and mitigation of potential risks. Although recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promise on general vision-language tasks, our findings indicate that zero-shot MLLMs still underperform compared to domain-specific methods in fine-grained, spatially grounded risk assessment. To address this gap, we propose DriveSafe, a framework for risk-aware scene understanding that leverages structured natural language descriptions. Specifically, our method first generates spatially grounded captions enriched with multimodal context, including motion, spatial, and depth cues. These captions are then used for downstream risk assessment, explicitly identifying hazardous objects, their locations, and the unsafe behaviors they imply, followed by actionable safety suggestions. To further improve performance, we employ caption-risk pairings to fine-tune a lightweight adapter module, efficiently injecting domain-specific knowledge into the base LLM. By conditioning risk assessment on explicit language-based scene representations, DriveSafe achieves significant gains over both zero-shot MLLMs and prior domain-specific baselines. Exhaustive experiments on the DRAMA benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, while ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our key design choices. Project page: https://cvit.iiit.ac.in/ research/projects/cvit-projects/drivesafe

</details>


### [98] [LASAR: Towards Spatio-temporal Reasoning with Latent Cognitive Map](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16899)
*Jinzhou Tang,Sidi Liu,Waikit Xiu,Weixing Chen,Keze Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了LASAR架构与ST-CRL方法，通过利用时空上下文来促进智能体内部认知地图的构建，有效提升了空间关系表征能力，并在相关基准测试中取得了更好的泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证智能体是否真正学习了空间结构的内部模型，而非单纯模仿专家轨迹，因现有任务常缺乏强迫其编码空间关系的学习信号。

Method: 提出了包含情节记忆与语义认知地图的双记忆架构LASAR，并设计了ST-CRL对比学习目标，通过模拟产生带注释的时空上下文组合正负样本以训练智能体形成细致的内部认知地图。

Result: 在VLN-CE与VSI-Bench基准上的零样本泛化任务中准确率提升2%-3.5%；认知地图具有良好的自洽性。

Conclusion: 提出的方法有效推动了智能体编码精准空间关系的能力，并增强了泛化性，为具身智能体的空间理解奠定了基础。

Abstract: A fundamental challenge in embodied AI is verifying if agents build internal models of spatial structure or merely learn to mimic task-specific expert trajectories. This is critical as foundational approaches rooted in action-centric tasks (e.g., VLN) and reasoning-centric tasks (e.g., EQA) often share a common limitation: they lack a learning signal that forces them to encode fine-grained spatial relationships (like topology or distance) over long-range, fragmented experiences. To address this, we first propose LASAR, an architecture featuring a dual-memory system designed to maintain both episodic experiences and a semantic cognitive map. We then introduce Spatio-temporal Contextual Representation Learning (ST-CRL), a contrastive objective designed to train this architecture. ST-CRL leverages spatio-temporal cues from cognitive queries generated through annotated spatio-temporal context in simulation to build sample pairs, thereby forming the internal cognitive map from the agent's experiences. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves 2\%-3.5\% gains in both zero-shot generalization on standard VLN-CE and VSI-Bench benchmarks. We also demonstrate that our proposed cognitive map has high self-consistency.

</details>


### [99] [CAR-SAM: Cross-Attention Reconstruction for Post-Training Quantization of the Segment Anything Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16901)
*Houji Wen,Jiangyong Yu,Jun Li,Dawei Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对Segment Anything Models（SAMs）的量化框架CAR-SAM，实现高效且精度优良的4比特模型压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAM模型因其强大的通用分割能力而被广泛应用，但高计算和内存开销限制了其在资源受限设备上的部署。现有后训练量化（PTQ）技术在处理SAM解码器中独特的跨注意力结构时表现不佳，导致精度显著下降，主要包括注意力信息耗散及重建振荡问题。

Method: 提出CAR-SAM这一统一量化框架：（1）为缓解注意力耗散，提出MatMul-Aware Compensation（MAC）机制，将激活引起的量化误差转移到前置权重。（2）为抑制解码器优化的振荡，提出Joint Cross-Attention Reconstruction（JCAR）策略，协同重建耦合注意力分支，抑制误差干扰并促使稳定收敛。

Result: CAR-SAM方法能将SAM模型稳定量化到4比特精度，对比现有方法，在SAM-B和SAM-L上mAP分别提升了14.6%和6.6%。

Conclusion: CAR-SAM有效解决了SAM模型量化中的注意力耗散和重建振荡难题，大幅提升了低比特模型分割精度，为SAM在边缘或资源受限设备上的部署奠定了基础。

Abstract: Segment Anything Models (SAMs) are extensively used in computer vision for universal image segmentation, but deploying them on resource-constrained devices is challenging due to their high computational and memory demands. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) is a widely used technique for model compression and acceleration. However, existing PTQ methods fail to consider the cross-attention architecture in the SAM decoder. This degradation primarily stems from the unique challenges posed by SAMs: (1) Attention dissipation, where the attention information in the decoder, which is crucial for representing segmentation masks, collapses into a diffuse and non-semantic form under low-bit quantization; and (2) Reconstruction oscillation, where bidirectional coupling within the two-way transformer introduces cross-branch error interference and destabilizes convergence. To tackle these issues, we propose CAR-SAM, a unified quantization framework tailored for SAMs. Firstly, to mitigate attention dissipation, we introduce MatMul-Aware Compensation (MAC) mechanism that transfers activation-induced quantization errors from MatMul to preceding linear weights. Secondly, to mitigate oscillation in decoder optimization, we develop a Joint Cross-Attention Reconstruction (JCAR) strategy that jointly reconstructs coupled attention branches, suppressing oscillatory behavior and promoting stable convergence. Extensive experiments show that CAR-SAM robustly quantizes SAM models down to 4-bit precision, surpassing existing methods by 14.6% and 6.6% mAP on SAM-B and SAM-L respectively.

</details>


### [100] [WOW-Seg: A Word-free Open World Segmentation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16903)
*Danyang Li,Tianhao Wu,Bin Li,Zhenyuan Chen,Yang Zhang,Yuxuan Li,Ming-Ming Cheng,Xiang Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的无词开放世界图像分割模型WOW-Seg，弥补了现有基础分割模型在语义理解上的不足，通过引入视觉提示模块和级联注意力掩码，有效提升了在大规模开放类别场景下的分割与识别能力，并显著超越现有SOTA模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的封闭集分割方法无法适应现实复杂且类别无限开放的场景，基础分割模型（如SAM）虽分割能力强，但语义理解不足。因此，亟需能融合强分割与丰富语义理解、兼具高效参数量的新模型。

Method: 作者提出了视觉提示模块Mask2Token，将掩码转为视觉token，并与VLLM特征空间对齐；采用级联注意力掩码，解耦不同实例间的信息干扰。同时还构建了包含7,662类、当前最大规模的区域识别数据集RR-7K。

Result: WOW-Seg在LVIS数据集上取得了89.7的语义相似度和82.4的语义IoU，参数量仅为SOTA的1/8，性能超越以往最优方法。同时在新构建的RR-7K数据集也表现优异。

Conclusion: WOW-Seg兼顾高效参数量和强开放世界泛化能力，在大规模实例丰富、类别开放的分割任务上表现突出，有望推动开放世界图像分割技术发展。

Abstract: Open world image segmentation aims to achieve precise segmentation and semantic understanding of targets within images by addressing the infinitely open set of object categories encountered in the real world. However, traditional closed-set segmentation approaches struggle to adapt to complex open world scenarios, while foundation segmentation models such as SAM exhibit notable discrepancies between their strong segmentation capabilities and relatively weaker semantic understanding. To bridge these discrepancies, we propose WOW-Seg, a Word-free Open World Segmentation model for segmenting and recognizing objects from open-set categories. Specifically, WOW-Seg introduces a novel visual prompt module, Mask2Token, which transforms image masks into visual tokens and ensures their alignment with the VLLM feature space. Moreover, we introduce the Cascade Attention Mask to decouple information across different instances. This approach mitigates inter-instance interference, leading to a significant improvement in model performance. We further construct an open world region recognition test benchmark: the Region Recognition Dataset (RR-7K). With 7,662 classes, it represents the most extensive category-rich region recognition dataset to date. WOW-Seg attains strong results on the LVIS dataset, achieving a semantic similarity of 89.7 and a semantic IoU of 82.4. This performance surpasses the previous SOTA while using only one-eighth the parameter count. These results underscore the strong open world generalization capabilities of WOW-Seg. The code and related resources are available at https://github.com/AAwcAA/WOW-Seg-Meta.

</details>


### [101] [VGGT-Occ: Geometry-Grounded and Density-Aware Gated Fusion for 3D Occupancy Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16911)
*Xun Chen,Tianchen Deng,Rui Wang,Fangjinhua Wang,Junyi Ma,Hongming Shen,Hesheng Wang,Danwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了VGGT-Occ框架，通过引入几何信息提升3D语义占用预测精度，在多个数据集上超过现有方法，并显著降低了计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D语义占用预测方法，虽然初步结合了摄像头几何信息，但后续操作阶段（如偏移学习、注意力加权、跨摄像头特征融合）大多未能深度利用几何约束，影响了3D特征投影和最终精度。

Method: 提出VGGT-Occ架构，在整个流程中引入几何token，核心是提出投影感知可变形注意力（PA-DA），通过3D偏移反投影到图像并利用投影雅可比矩阵作为加性偏置，抑制不可靠观测。此外，通过视角质量语义门控实现多视角一致性，并用分层粗到细解码器和门控融合，提升效率和精度。

Result: 在SurroundOcc-nuScenes上测试，VGGT-Occ在T=1时达到33.00% IoU和21.08% mIoU，在T=2时达到33.64% IoU和21.43% mIoU，均超过已有方法，占用头参数量约41M，验证了其有效性和高效性。

Conclusion: VGGT-Occ通过全流程引入几何信息，显著提升了3D语义占用预测的精度与效率，为相关研究提供了新方向，代码将公开。

Abstract: 3D semantic occupancy prediction requires accurate 2D-to-3D feature lifting, yet current methods restrict camera geometry to initial projections. Subsequent operations like offset learning, attention weighting, and cross-camera aggregation remain geometry-agnostic, ignoring essential physical constraints. We propose VGGT-Occ, a framework that embeds geometric tokens throughout the entire pipeline. We introduce Projection-Aware Deformable Attention (PA-DA) to inject geometry into all attention stages. PA-DA projects 3D offsets back to image planes and leverages the projection Jacobian as an additive bias to suppress unreliable observations. Features are then integrated through a view-quality semantic gate for cross-view consistency. To optimize both efficiency and performance, we employ a sequential coarse-to-fine decoder with gated fusion, where low-resolution features are refined into higher resolutions, allocating computation by information density while substantially reducing decoder cost. Extensive evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness and accuracy of our approach. On SurroundOcc-nuScenes, VGGT-Occ achieves 33.00\% IoU and 21.08\% mIoU ($T{=}1$), and 33.64\% IoU and 21.43\% mIoU with $T{=}2$ inference, outperforming existing methods, with only ${\sim}41$M trainable parameters in the occupancy head. Code will be released publicly.

</details>


### [102] [HighSync: High-Quality Lip Synchronization via Latent Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16918)
*Saeed Firouzi Daghigh,Majid Iranpour Mobarekeh,Mostafa Alavi,Mehdi Bagheri*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了HighSync，一种基于扩散模型的高保真唇形同步生成框架，可根据任意输入音频生成与之同步的高分辨率写实说话人脸视频，并在画质和同步准确性上实现双重突破。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前唇形同步方法在图像质量与同步准确性上难以兼得，输出或视觉效果差、或唇部动作不同步，尤其无法高分辨率下满足专业级需求。此外，现有方法存在数据泄漏现象，影响了模型对音频信号的真正依赖。

Method: HighSync利用端到端扩散模型，在512*512分辨率下生成高质量说话人脸视频。其关键创新在于识别并消除导致数据泄漏的问题，从而提升模型对音频的时序建模能力。

Result: 在感知质量和唇形同步准确性两大指标上，HighSync均取得了最先进的性能。实验覆盖多方面验证，证明了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: HighSync首次实现在高分辨率下兼顾唇形同步与画质，适用于影视、广播等专业场景，为高质量唇形同步视频生成提供了新范式。代码与模型已公开。

Abstract: We present HighSync, an end-to-end diffusion-based framework for high-fidelity lip synchronization that generates photorealistic talking-face videos aligned with arbitrary input audio. Existing approaches consistently struggle to reconcile image quality with synchronization accuracy, producing either visually degraded outputs or temporally inconsistent lip movements. HighSync addresses both challenges simultaneously and, to our knowledge, is the first lip sync model to operate natively at 512*512 resolution, positioning it as a viable solution for professional production environments such as the film and broadcast industries. Central to our approach is the identification and systematic elimination of a data leakage phenomenon that has silently undermined temporal modeling in prior work, preventing models from developing a genuine dependence on the audio signal. Comprehensive evaluations across both perceptual quality and synchronization accuracy metrics confirm that HighSync achieves state-of-the-art performance on both fronts. Source code, pre-trained models, and supplementary video results are publicly available at: https://github.com/saeed5959/high_sync

</details>


### [103] [Motion Cues from Image-based Point Tracking for LiDAR Scene Flow Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16922)
*Youngdong Jang,Gyeongrok Oh,Jong Wook Kim,Hyunju Ryu,Hyung-gun Chi,SeungHyeon Kim,Seungryong Kim,Jonghyun Choi,Sangpil Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出TrackCue框架，通过引入基于追踪的动态物体表征方法，提升了LiDAR场景流估计的准确性，尤其改善了动态目标的分类和运动监督。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自监督LiDAR场景流方法依赖稀疏的几何观测进行静态-动态分类，易受数据稀疏性和遮挡干扰，导致标签噪声，影响模型学习。需要更稳健的动态目标判别和更可靠的监督。

Method: TrackCue采用点追踪，生成与LiDAR点对应的密集图像轨迹，超越稀疏几何，仅用视觉轨迹提供新的运动线索。通过将追踪获得的真实物体运动与自车运动在图像空间进行补偿与区分，实现更精准的静态-动态点分类。将这些精细的视觉运动线索反投到LiDAR域，优化标签，提升监督质量。

Result: TrackCue带来了更准确的静态-动态分类，提升了动态标签的精度和F1分数，在自监督场景流估计任务上整体性能明显提升。

Conclusion: 通过引入密集图像空间运动线索和有效的运动补偿，TrackCue显著提升了动态目标表征和自监督场景流估计的效果，有助于自动驾驶等应用更精准地理解3D运动。

Abstract: LiDAR scene flow estimation is essential for autonomous driving, as it provides 3D motion for each point. Self-supervised approaches use static-dynamic classification to mitigate the imbalance between static and dynamic points, deriving targeted supervision. However, existing methods rely on sparse geometric observations for this classification, making them vulnerable to data sparsity and occlusions. The resulting noisy labels provide incorrect motion guidance and degrade scene flow learning. To address this, we introduce TrackCue, a tracking-guided framework for improving dynamic object representation in LiDAR scene flow estimation. In particular, TrackCue repurposes point tracking to obtain dense image-space trajectories anchored to LiDAR points, providing motion cues beyond sparse geometric observations. Furthermore, we present a visually consistent motion compensation strategy that compares the tracked trajectories with ego-induced rigid trajectories in the image plane, effectively isolating true object motion from ego-induced apparent motion. To transfer these isolated motion cues back to the LiDAR domain, we perform visual motion cue lifting, which associates ego-compensated image trajectories with LiDAR points for static-dynamic label refinement. As a result, TrackCue produces more accurate static-dynamic classification and provides more reliable supervision for scene flow learning. Experimental results show that TrackCue significantly improves the precision and F1 score of dynamic labels, leading to performance gains in self-supervised scene flow estimation.

</details>


### [104] [Neuroscience-inspired Staged Representation Learning with Disentangled Coarse- and Fine-Grained Semantics for EEG Visual Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16923)
*Xiang Gao,Hui Tian,Yanming Zhu,Xuefei Yin,Alan Wee-Chung Liew*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受神经科学启发的分阶段表征学习框架，有效提升了基于脑电信号的视觉信息解码性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统脑电视觉解码方法多仅关注全局表征，忽视了人类视觉处理的阶段性和层次性，导致解码效果受限。为此，论文希望借鉴神经科学的分阶段加工思想，提升EEG视觉解码精度。

Method: 框架将脑电视觉解码划分为三个互补阶段：低层视觉特征学习、高层语义学习和多信息融合。同时，引入二级语义学习机制，将粗粒度标签和细粒度图片级语义分离；还提出语义潜在通道，拓展语义表征空间，实现更结构化的跨模态对齐。

Result: 在THINGS-EEG基准上，该方法在受试者相关和无关的零样本检索场景下均取得了更优的准确率。分层检索、时序累积、多图检索和消融实验等多角度分析，证明了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于分阶段、结构化语义建模的脑电解码框架能更好地模拟人类视觉处理，显著提升视觉信息从EEG信号中的解码效果，为脑机接口与视觉康复提供了新思路。

Abstract: Decoding visual information from electroencephalography (EEG) signals remains a fundamental challenge in brain-computer interfaces and medical rehabilitation. Existing EEG visual decoding methods mainly focus on learning a single global EEG embedding for cross-modal alignment, but they largely overlook the staged and hierarchical characteristics of human visual processing. To address this limitation, we propose a neuroscience-inspired staged representation learning framework that reformulates EEG visual decoding as a stage-specific representation decomposition problem. The proposed framework organizes EEG representation learning into three complementary phases: low-level visual representation learning, high-level semantic representation learning, and integrative information fusion. To strengthen semantic modeling, we further introduce a multimodal dual-level semantic learning mechanism that separates coarse label-level semantics from fine image-level visual-semantic information. In addition, semantic latent channels are introduced as computational representation channels generated from observed visual EEG signals, expanding the channel-level semantic representation space for structured semantic abstraction and cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments on the THINGS-EEG benchmark demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance under subject-dependent zero-shot evaluation and improved exact retrieval under subject-independent zero-shot evaluation. Additional analyses, including layer-wise retrieval, temporal accumulation, expanded multi-image retrieval, and ablation studies, further support the effectiveness of staged decomposition and structured semantic modeling. These results suggest that explicitly modeling staged perceptual, semantic, and integrative representations provides an effective neuroscience-inspired framework for EEG-based visual decoding.

</details>


### [105] [P2GS: Physical Prior-guided Gaussian Splatting for Photometrically Consistent Urban Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16925)
*Kota Shimomura,Hidehisa Arai,Tsubasa Takahashi,Takayoshi Yamashita,Hironobu Fujiyoshi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了P2GS，通过物理一致性的高斯喷溅模型，有效解决了自动驾驶多摄像机成像曝光不一致导致的渲染伪影问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D Gaussian Splatting在自动驾驶数据下，因相机曝光与色调映射不一致，会产生渲染伪影和光照不连贯，对仿真和感知系统造成不良影响。

Method: P2GS模型联合分解出视角无关的线性HDR辐射场、每视角的曝光尺度和色调映射函数，采用基于物理成像过程的优化，实现曝光一致性和HDR正则化，无需HDR监督。

Result: 在真实及仿真驾驶场景实验中，P2GS保持实时效率的同时，重建质量可与现有方法媲美，且显著提升了曝光归一化与光照一致性。

Conclusion: P2GS为自动驾驶仿真与感知任务提供了更物理一致、鲁棒性强的3D表示，有助于提升感知系统与闭环仿真的真实感和可靠性。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently emerged as a powerful explicit representation enabling fast, high-fidelity rendering, making it a promising foundation for closed-loop simulators and perception models in autonomous driving. However, conventional 3DGS implicitly assumes consistent exposure and tone mapping across views. Real driving data violates this assumption due to heterogeneous camera pipelines and dynamic outdoor illumination, baking exposure discrepancies and sensor noise into the radiance field and producing artifacts and inconsistent illumination especially in static backgrounds crucial for realistic simulation. These issues are amplified in autonomous driving, where sparse viewpoints, varying exposures, and outdoor lighting interact, while prior work mainly targets dynamic-object reconstruction and overlooks cross-view photometric consistency. To address this limitation, we introduce P2GS, a physically consistent Gaussian Splatting framework that jointly decomposes a view-invariant linear HDR radiance field, per-view exposure scales, and tone-mapping functions from only LDR images without HDR supervision. P2GS employs a unified optimization strategy grounded in the physical image-formation process, enforcing relative-exposure consistency and HDR-domain radiance regularization. This yields a radiance field robust to inter-camera illumination differences while preserving the real-time efficiency of standard 3DGS. Experiments across real and simulated driving environments show that P2GS matches or surpasses prior methods in LDR reconstruction while providing substantially improved photometric consistency, reliable exposure normalization, and physically coherent illumination across diverse scenes.

</details>


### [106] [DEVIS-GRPO: Unleashing GRPO on Dynamic Extreme View Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16937)
*Yi Zuo,Huimin Wu,Lingling Li,Fang Liu,Licheng Jiao,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的轨迹可控视频生成方法DEVIS-GRPO，能够在大幅视角运动条件下生成高质量视频，有效解决了以往方法在大幅度相机视角变化时性能下降的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹可控视频生成方法在小范围视角变化下表现良好，但面对大幅度视角变化会显著退化，而现有极端视角合成方案又需要大量定制带对视频对，标注成本极高。因此，亟需一种无需大量带对视频对也能实现极端视角可控生成的新方法。

Method: 提出了基于GRPO的DEVIS-GRPO框架，首次将在线策略梯度方法用于极端视角视频生成。其核心是ADEVIS采样策略，逐步累积小幅视角增量，以实现大幅视角变化。同时，设计了多层次一致性-质量奖励函数，用于优化采样样本和模型训练。

Result: 在Kubric-4D、iPhone和DL3DV数据集上，DEVIS-GRPO均取得了优异的实验结果。在Kubric-4D非遮挡区域，PSNR提升了21.57%，SSIM提升7.31%；在iPhone数据集，LPIPS降低了18.56%。

Conclusion: DEVIS-GRPO显著提升了极端视角下轨迹可控视频生成的质量与效率，无需大量高成本的配对视频，具有重要的实际应用前景。

Abstract: Trajectory-controlled video generation has become essential for controllable video generation. While current methods perform well under small-view camera motions, they degrade significantly with large-view motions. Existing solutions for extreme-view synthesis typically require dedicated video pairs, demanding substantial annotation effort. To address these limitations, we propose Dynamic Extreme VIew Synthesis-GRPO (DEVIS-GRPO), a GRPO-based framework for trajectory-controlled video generation, the first online policy gradient method for extreme view video generation. Central to our approach is a novel sampling strategy: Accumulative Dynamic Extreme VIew Synthesis (ADEVIS), which achieves large-view camera motions by progressively accumulating small-view increments. This method delivers two key advantages: 1) enhanced training efficiency, as it eliminates the need to warm-start the policy model by collecting expensive paired large-view videos, and 2) increased sampling diversity, achieved by flexibly varying trajectory configurations. Finally, we designed a multi-level consistency-quality reward function to select high-quality samples for model optimization. Experiments on the Kubric-4D, iPhone, and DL3DV datasets demonstrate our method's superiority. On Kubric-4D, we achieve relative improvements of 21.57% in PSNR and 7.31% in SSIM over the second-best method in non-occlusion areas. On iPhone, LPIPS is reduced by 18.56%.

</details>


### [107] [Beyond Point-Wise Matching: Structural Representation Alignment for Accelerating Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16949)
*Shaodong Xu,Zhendong Wang,Litong Gong,Zexian Li,Wengang Zhou,Tiezheng Ge,Houqiang Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的结构化表示对齐方法（sREPA）以提升扩散Transformer模型训练效率和生成质量。sREPA通过关注特征图的空间关系几何结构，实现了比已有对齐方法更快、更稳定的收敛和更高质量的生成效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的表示对齐方法（如REPA及其后续方法）主要通过点对点特征匹配或架构调整，将预训练视觉表示的有用信息转移到扩散模型中，但无法明确刻画和利用视觉表示中的空间结构关系。本研究旨在解决这一不足，用结构化的对齐方式更好地捕捉视觉表示中的空间拓扑结构。

Method: 提出了sREPA框架，将特征图的空间关系和结构一致性作为显式约束，替代传统点对点监督。该方法促使模型学习整体的空间布局和结构相关性，提高了对视觉特征空间结构的建模能力。

Result: 与现有的对齐方式相比，sREPA带来了更快、更稳定的模型收敛速度以及更优质的生成样本表现。

Conclusion: 结构化特征对齐能更有效地挖掘并迁移视觉基础模型中的空间结构信息，为扩散模型的生成任务带来显著提升。

Abstract: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) demonstrate that aligning noisy latent states with well-trained semantic features-as pioneered by Representation Alignment (REPA)-can substantially accelerate training and improve generation fidelity. Subsequent analysis(e.g., iREPA) suggests that these gains arise primarily from transferring spatial structure contained in pre-trained vision representations. However, mostly existing alignment methods employ point-wise matching objectives or rely on implicit architectural tweaks, which fail to explicitly model the spatial relational geometry inherent in vision foundation models. We argue that such element-wise supervision is insufficient to capture the rich spatial topology of visual representations, and that effective alignment for generation should instead be formulated as an explicit structural constraint. To this end, we propose sREPA, a structural REPresentation Alignment framework to enforce consistency in the relational geometry of feature maps, rather than merely matching individual feature points. By encouraging the model to internalize holistic spatial layouts and structural correlations from pre-trained features, sREPA achieves faster and more stable convergence, along with improved sample quality, compared to state-of-the-art alignment strategies. Our code and models will be released.

</details>


### [108] [Edit-GRPO: A Locality-Preserving Policy Optimization Framework for Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16951)
*Shaodong Xu,Zexian Li,Zhendong Wang,Litong Gong,Tiezheng Ge,Wengang Zhou,Bo Zheng,Houqiang Li*

Main category: cs.CV
