Experimental results show that VIF consistently improves model performance across diverse architectures while introducing minimal additional overhead. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/Dong-Xinpeng/VIF.

</details>


### [252] [Self-Evolving Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models via Geometric Logic Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18162)
*Junming Liu,Yuqi Li,Yifei Sun,Maonan Wang,Piotr Koniusz,Yirong Chen,Ding Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新方法SAGE，以提升视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在空间推理方面的稳健性。SAGE通过在模型训练过程中引入几何与语言的对偶一致性约束，显著提升了模型在经受空间变换时的推理可靠性，实验显示在多个基准上优于主流方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型近年来取得显著进步，但对于空间推理的稳健性仍较脆弱，即使能正确回答原始问题，也可能在输入略作空间变换后失败，这表明模型在空间感知和推理能力上存在缺陷。

Method: 提出SAGE框架，通过几何和语言对偶操作，建立输入及其变换之间逻辑一致性的奖励机制，将对偶一致性作为辅助奖励整合进GRPO训练。同时，动态操作池持续筛查模型表现薄弱的变换操作，引导模型集中学习最具挑战性的变换，提高训练效率。SAGE通用性强，可作为轻量级后处理阶段应用于任意VLM。

Result: SAGE在视频和空间推理基准上均展现出超越强基线的性能，模型对未见空间变换具备更好的泛化能力，且相比以往方法表现出更高的效能和数据利用率。

Conclusion: SAGE显著提升了VLMs在空间推理任务中的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为提升VLM在复杂推理中的应用价值提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have made striking progress, yet their spatial reasoning remains fragile: models that answer an original input correctly can still fail under paired transformations with predictable answer mappings, revealing a gap between instance-level correctness and robust spatial reasoning. To address this, we propose Spatial Alignment via Geometric Evolution (SAGE), a self-evolving framework that enforces logical consistency in VLMs through geometric and linguistic duality operations. SAGE incorporates duality consistency as an auxiliary reward within GRPO training, encouraging models to produce logically coherent answers across original and transformed inputs. A dynamic operation pool continuously probes for inconsistencies, promoting challenging operations and retiring mastered ones, so that training focuses on the most informative signals. SAGE is model-agnostic, data-efficient compared to prior GRPO methods, and can be applied as a lightweight post-training stage to any existing VLM. Experiments on video and spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines and enhanced generalization to unseen data.

</details>


### [253] [Do You Need Text Rectification? Soft Attention Mask Embedding for Rectification-Free Scene Text Spotting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18173)
*Antonio Colombo,Giovanni Bianchi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的端到端场景文本检测与识别方法SAME-Net，通过Soft Attention Mask Embedding模块提升检测/识别精度，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端文本检测识别方法在多尺度、任意形状文本和复杂背景下效果不佳，主要因为检测掩码不完整，影响识别准确性。需要一种能更好抑制噪声、完整描述文本边界的新方法。

Method: 提出了SAME（Soft Attention Mask Embedding）模块，利用Transformer编码器的全局特征和soft attention，生成更精细的文本边界掩码，并将其嵌入文本检测与识别流程，实现端到端优化。整个网络无需字符级标注或额外校正模块，可通过识别损失反向优化检测分支。

Result: SAME-Net在Total-Text数据集上取得了84.02%的端到端H-mean，比之前最优的GLASS高1.02%；在ICDAR 2015数据集上也获得了83.4%的强词典准确率，结果具竞争力。

Conclusion: SAME-Net通过引入软注意力掩码嵌入，有效提升了多尺度、任意形状文本场景下的检测与识别精度，无需额外标注，方法高效、有效，优于现有主流方法。

Abstract: End-to-end scene text spotting, which unifies text detection and recognition within a single framework, has witnessed remarkable progress driven by deep learning advances. However, most existing approaches still suffer from incomplete mask proposals caused by multi-scale variation, arbitrary text shapes, and complex background interference, thereby degrading recognition accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel Soft Attention Mask Embedding module (SAME) that leverages the global receptive field of Transformer encoders to encode high-level features and compute soft attention weights, which are then hierarchically embedded with predicted masks to generate refined text-boundary-aware masks that effectively suppress background noise. Building upon this module, we present SAME-Net, a robust end-to-end text spotting framework that requires neither character-level annotations nor auxiliary text rectification modules. Since the soft attention mechanism is fully differentiable, recognition loss gradients can be back-propagated through the SAME module to the detection branch, enabling joint optimization of detection and recognition objectives. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach: SAME-Net achieves 84.02\% end-to-end H-mean on the arbitrarily-shaped Total-Text dataset, surpassing the previous state-of-the-art GLASS by 1.02\% in full-lexicon accuracy without additional training data, and obtains competitive 83.4\% strong-lexicon results on the multi-oriented ICDAR 2015 dataset.

</details>


### [254] [MARS: Technical Report for the CASTLE Challenge at EgoVis 2026](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18176)
*Haoyu Zhang,Qiaohui Chu,Yisen Feng,Meng Liu,Weili Guan,Yaowei Wang,Liqiang Nie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 这篇论文介绍了MARS系统，用于CASTLE Challenge多模态推理任务，在多来源数据中进行证据选择。MARS在CASTLE 2024数据集测试中取得第二名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的单视频自中心视觉基准不足以应对CASTLE挑战中的多天、多视角和多模态数据，亟需一种能在复杂环境中进行多源证据优选和推理的系统。

Method: MARS将任务视为多模态证据选择问题，按CASTLE的官方目录整理构建‘证据记忆’，主来源为视频（转写为字幕与摘要）和文本转录，辅以凝视、心率、照片和热成像等辅助模态。推理阶段，GPT-5.4决策代理根据需要动态请求特定模态信息、继续推理、作答或放弃。

Result: MARS在CASTLE挑战中获得最终排行榜第二名，展示了多模态证据选择机制的有效性。

Conclusion: MARS通过多模态源的证据优选，显著提升了复杂EGOVIS推理任务的准确性，为今后多模态推理系统提供了参考。

Abstract: This report presents MARS, short for Multimodal Agentic Reasoning with Source selection, our system for the CASTLE Challenge at EgoVis 2026. Participants must answer 185 closed-form questions over the CASTLE 2024 dataset. In contrast to prior single-video egocentric benchmarks, CASTLE requires reasoning over four days of activity, 15 synchronized perspectives, official transcripts, and multiple auxiliary modalities, including personal photos, auxiliary videos, gaze, thermal imagery, and heartrate measurements. MARS therefore treats the task as an agentic evidence-selection problem over multimodal sources rather than a purely text-only pipeline. MARS first follows the official CASTLE directory organization to build evidence memories from two primary sources, videos and transcripts, and four auxiliary sources, gaze, heartrate, photos, and thermal imagery. Long videos are converted into captions and DeepSeek-based summaries only because CASTLE videos are too long to fit directly into the model context for every question; this step compresses temporal evidence while keeping photos and other auxiliary media available as source-specific evidence. At inference time, a GPT-5.4 decision agent repeatedly chooses whether to continue reasoning, request a specific missing modality, produce an answer, or fall back to a random option when the evidence remains insufficient. The resulting system achieved second place on the final CASTLE Challenge leaderboard. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Hyu-Zhang/MARS.

</details>


### [255] [Token-Space Mask Prediction for Efficient Vision Transformer Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18177)
*Calvin Galagain,Martyna Poreba,François Goulette*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该文提出了一种新的分割头TokenMask，无需传统的显式重建空间特征图，直接在token空间进行掩码预测，简化了计算结构并提升了效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前基于Vision Transformer的分割模型仍沿用CNN的一些设计，需显式重建空间特征图，增加了算力与内存消耗，不利于高效部署。

Method: 提出TokenMask，将掩码预测过程从空间特征重建转为直接在query-token亲和力的logit空间插值，简化网络结构并降低资源消耗。

Result: 在多种ViT主干网络、数据集和分割任务上，TokenMask比已有方法更高效，占用更少算力和内存，在Jetson AGX Orin硬件上实现推理速度提升，并保证了竞争性精度。

Conclusion: TokenMask方法使ViT分割更简洁、更适合嵌入式视觉系统实际部署，同时保证了性能。

Abstract: Query-based Vision Transformer segmentation models typically reconstruct dense spatial feature maps to predict masks, inheriting design patterns from convolutional architectures. We show that this explicit image-space reconstruction is not required. We introduce TokenMask, a token-space mask head that computes mask logits directly from query-token affinities and performs interpolation in logit space rather than feature space. This reformulation preserves the original linear scoring mechanism while simplifying the computational structure. Across diverse ViT backbones, datasets and segmentation tasks, TokenMask consistently improves efficiency over prior approaches by reducing computational and memory requirements while maintaining competitive accuracy, leading to tangible speedups on NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin using TensorRT FP16 inference. Overall, TokenMask yields a simpler and more deployment-friendly design for embedded vision systems.

</details>


### [256] [View-Aware Semantic Alignment for Aerial-Ground Person Re-Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18192)
*Quan Zhang,Zeqiang Cai,Peiming Zhao,Jingze Wu,Cailun Wu,Hongbo Chen,Jianhuang Lai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对航拍与地面摄像头间因视角变化引起的行人重识别难题，提出了一种视角感知的语义对齐框架ViSA，有效提升了重识别性能，在多个基准上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多通过视角不变对齐策略实现鲁棒性，但忽略了视角特有的区分性信息，从而影响准确性。本文旨在引入视角相关特征，提升跨视角行人重识别效果。

Method: 提出了ViSA框架，设计了专家驱动的Token生成模块(ETGM)来捕捉具备视角感知的语义信息，以及双分支局部融合模块(DLFM)利用图推理对不同专家区域进行对齐。整体方法兼顾跨视角一致性和视角专属特征挖掘。

Result: 在AG-ReID.v2、CARGO和LAGPeR三大基准数据集上，ViSA方法均取得领先表现，尤其在CARGO跨视角协议下，mAP提升显著，达10.06%。

Conclusion: 与传统视角不变方法相比，ViSA充分挖掘视角专有线索与一致语义特征，相较基线拥有较大性能优势，为航拍-地面跨视角行人重识别提供了新思路。

Abstract: Aerial-Ground Person Re-Identification (AGPReID) remains highly challenging due to drastic viewpoint variations between drones and fixed cameras. Existing methods typically follow a view-invariant paradigm, aligning shared features across views to achieve robustness. However, view-invariant inherently enforces part-level alignment, which ignores view-specific cues and discriminative identity information. To this end, this work proposes ViSA (View-aware Semantic Alignment), a view-aware framework that achieves cross-view semantic consistency containing an Expert-driven Token Generation Module (ETGM) and a Dual-branch Local Fusion Module (DLFM). Technically, the former constructs a set of view-aware experts to generate adaptive semantic queries that perceive viewpoint-specific patterns, while the latter leverages graph reasoning to extract and align local regions responsive to different experts. Extensive experiments on three AGPReID benchmarks including AG-ReID.v2, CARGO and LAGPeR demonstrate that ViSA consistently achieves superior performance, with a notable 10.06\% mAP improvement on the challenging CARGO cross-view protocol. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Cat-Zero/ViSA}{https://github.com/Cat-Zero/ViSA}.

</details>


### [257] [Best Segmentation Buddies for Image-Shape Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18193)
*Itai Lang,Dongwei Lyu,Dale Decatur,Rana Hanocka*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种连接野外图像分割与无纹理3D形状语义分割区域间对应关系的新方法，极大提升了跨模态匹配的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨视觉与图形领域，图像分割与3D模型语义对应关系的自动建立一直是基础且困难的问题，特别是在图像和三维物体外观、结构和视角差异很大时，现有方法容易失效，此问题在实际应用中具有重要价值。

Method: 作者首先将2D视觉模型的深度特征蒸馏到3D形状表面，在此基础上度量图像像素与3D顶点间的特征相似度。然后提出“最佳分割搭档（Best Segmentation Buddies）”方法，在图像分割区域内寻找与3D顶点特征最相似的像素，并据此发现语义对应部分。最终，借助从2D分割模型蒸馏到3D的特征，直接对3D形状进行分割，实现了自举式的分割-对应流程。

Result: 方法在各种类型的图像和3D形状配对任务上表现出色，能够获得准确且符合语义的分割到分割的对应关系，显示出广泛的通用性和高鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 本文方法有效弥合了2D/3D跨模态分割语义对应的鸿沟，为相关领域带来了可扩展、高准确性的基础技术。

Abstract: Finding correspondences is a fundamental and extensively researched problem in computer vision and graphics. In this work, we examine the underexplored task of estimating segmentation-to-segmentation correspondence between images in the wild and untextured 3D shapes. This task is highly challenging due to substantial differences in appearance, geometry, and viewpoint. Our approach bridges the cross-modality gap by linking pixels in the image segment to vertices in the corresponding semantic part of the 3D shape. To achieve this, we first distill deep visual features from a 2D vision model onto the 3D shape surface, allowing for the computation of feature similarity between image pixels and shape vertices. Then, we identify Best Segmentation Buddies, vertices whose most similar image pixel lies within the image segmentation region, enabling the reliable discovery of vertices in semantically corresponding shape parts. Finally, we leverage distilled 3D features from the 2D image segmentation model to segment the shape directly in 3D, bootstrapping the correspondence process. We demonstrate the generality and robustness of our approach across a wide range of image-shape pairs, showcasing accurate and semantically meaningful correspondences. Our project page is at https://threedle.github.io/bsb/.

</details>


### [258] [SPATIOROUTE: Dynamic Prompt Routing for Zero-Shot Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18209)
*Pawat Chunhachatrachai,Gueter Josmy Faure,Hung-Ting Su,Winston H. Hsu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SpatioRoute的新方法，通过动态生成与问题语义相关的提示模板，实现了零样本下的空间视频问答性能提升。方法无需额外训练或3D输入，在SQA3D基准上验证了效能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空间问答任务要求模型对视频中三维物体位置、场景可供性及方向关系进行推理，尤其是在零样本场景下，现有方法表现有限，且通常依赖于3D传感器数据或特定训练，实际应用受限。作者希望解决不需额外训练和3D传感器输入时的空间推理难题。

Method: 提出SpatioRoute方法，实现基于问题类型动态分配提示模板。方法分两种方式：一是SpatioRoute-R，通过规则基于问题类型（如What, Is, How等）映射到固定模板；二是SpatioRoute-L，利用大模型直接基于问题及上下文生成自适应模板。两者都无需视频输入做路由。

Result: 在SQA3D基准和多种VLMs上，SpatioRoute优于固定模板的基线方法，准确率提升最高达5%，达到零样本视频空间问答的新SOTA，并且不依赖3D点云输入。

Conclusion: SpatioRoute证实了语义感知的动态提示模板在空间视频问答中优于统一推理指令，且Think it Twice的链式推理策略会带来性能下降。该方法为无需任务特定调优和3D输入实现高效空间推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Spatial question answering over egocentric video is a challenging task that requires Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to reason about 3D object positions, scene affordances, and directional relationships, particularly in the zero-shot setting where no task-specific fine-tuning is available. We introduce SpatioRoute, a dynamic prompt generation approach that routes each incoming question to a semantically tailored prompt template -- without any additional training, fine-tuning, or 3D sensor input. SpatioRoute operates in two complementary modes: SpatioRoute-R, a rule-based router that deterministically maps question typologies (e.g., What, Is, How, Can, Which) to specialized prompt templates; and SpatioRoute-L, an LLM-driven approach that generates task-specific prompts from the question and situational context alone, with no video input at routing time. We evaluate SpatioRoute on the SQA3D benchmark across VLMs spanning model families. SpatioRoute achieves consistent overall accuracy gains up to 5% over fixed prompt baselines, establishing a new state-of-the-art for zero-shot video-only spatial VQA without requiring 3D point-cloud inputs. As an additional finding, we observe that Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting, implemented via the Think it Twice architecture, consistently degrades performance in this setting on Qwen series models, confirming that question-aware routing is more effective than uniform reasoning instructions for spatial video understanding.

</details>


### [259] [EgoInteract: Synthetic Egocentric Videos Generation for Interaction Understanding and Anticipation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18214)
*Rosario Leonardi,Francesco Ragusa,Daniele Materia,Alessandro Passanisi,James Fort,Jakob Engel,Giovanni Maria Farinella*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了EgoInteract，一个可以灵活生成和控制自我视角交互视频及其精细注释的合成数据模拟器，并验证了这种模拟生成数据对实际任务的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模高密度带时空注释的自我视角视频数据采集成本高、速度慢，还受限于隐私和多样性，限制了自我视角感知任务的研究。合成数据有潜力解决问题，但在自我视角任务（特别是时序连贯的人-物交互）中尚未充分利用。

Method: 提出EgoInteract模拟器，能在不同场景下精确控制摄像机、人和手的运动、物品操作、场景组成等，从而生成高质量、密集注释的自我视角视频数据。基于此平台生成合成数据，支持时序动作分割、下一活跃物体检测、交互预测等任务。

Result: 用模拟数据训练的模型在多个真实自我视角基准测试集上验证，包括不同环境和交互，结果在各种任务和数据集上均较强基线有显著提升，显示了该模拟数据的广泛有效性与可迁移性。

Conclusion: EgoInteract能有效生成高质量可控的合成自我视角视频，在多项任务上补足了实拍数据的不足，对实际应用有良好推广价值。

Abstract: Collecting large-scale egocentric video datasets with dense spatial and temporal annotations is costly, slow, and often constrained by environmental biases, privacy constraints, and limited coverage of interaction patterns. While synthetic data has shown strong potential in several vision domains, its use for egocentric perception remains relatively underexplored, especially for tasks requiring temporally coherent human-object interactions. In this work, we introduce EgoInteract, a controllable simulator for egocentric video generation designed to model fine-grained egocentric interactions and their temporal dynamics. The simulator enables precise control over camera, human body and hand motion, object manipulation, and scene composition across diverse environments. Building on this framework, we generate a synthetic egocentric video dataset with dense spatial and temporal annotations for temporal action segmentation, next-active object detection, interaction anticipation, and hand-object interaction detection. We evaluate models trained with simulated data on multiple real-world egocentric benchmarks spanning diverse environments, object categories, and interaction patterns. Results show consistent improvements over strong baselines across tasks and datasets, demonstrating the effectiveness and transferability of our simulation-based approach.

</details>


### [260] [Enhancing Train-Free Infinite-Frame Generation for Consistent Long Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18233)
*X. Feng,J. Zhu,M. Wu,C. Chen,F. Mao,H. Guo,J. Wu,X. Chu,K. Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的无限帧长视频生成方法MIGA，通过两阶段对齐机制和双重一致性增强模块，有效提升了长视频生成的一致性，在常用数据集上取得了最先进表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前长视频生成面临生成一致性差以及推理与训练不匹配等问题，且希望在不增加显著计算量的前提下，充分利用基础视频生成模型生成更长的视频片段。

Method: MIGA方法包括两大创新：一是两阶段对齐机制，有效减小训练与推理时输入噪声跨度的差异；二是双重一致性增强机制，其中自反思方式修正早期高噪声帧，长程帧引导则利用后期低噪声帧进行整体指导，共同提升时间一致性。

Result: 在VBench和NarrLV等视频生成评测集上，MIGA显著优于现有方法，展现出行业领先的长视频时序一致性和生成质量。

Conclusion: MIGA能有效提升长视频生成效果，实现无限帧扩展，并为后续视频生成技术发展提供了新路径。

Abstract: Without incurring significant computational overhead, train-free long video generation aims to enable foundation video generation models to produce longer videos. Frame-level autoregressive frameworks, e.g., FIFO-diffusion, offer the advantage of generating infinitely long videos with constant memory consumption. However, the mismatch between training and inference, coupled with the challenge of maintaining long-term consistency, limits the effective utilization of foundation models. To mitigate these concerns, we propose \textbf{MIGA}, a novel infinite-frame long video generation method. Firstly, we propose an effective two-stage alignment mechanism that mitigates the training-inference gap by reducing the excessive noise span fed to the model. We then introduce an innovative dual consistency enhancement mechanism, where the self-reflection approach corrects early high-noise frames and the long-range frame guidance approach leverages later low-noise frames with broad coverage to steer generation, jointly improving temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on VBench and NarrLV demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MIGA. Our project page is available at https://xiaokunfeng.github.io/miga_homepage/.

</details>


### [261] [Non-Colliding Biometric Identities for Digital Entities: Geometry, Capacity, and Million-Scale Virtual Identity Provisioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18238)
*Yuyang Ji,Yixuan Shen,Anil Jain,Xiaoming Liu,Feng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种为数字实体（如AI代理和机器人）提供生物特征身份的新框架，能够生成与真实人脸身份不重叠的高质量虚拟人脸身份并用于多种识别任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字实体主要依赖凭证类身份，而非生物特征（如人脸），导致与真人共存时缺乏统一的身份系统；因此需要一种既不与真实身份冲突，又具备分辨性的虚拟生物身份。

Method: 作者提出了Biometric Identity Provisioning (BIP) 框架，将虚拟身份的分配归结为在真实人脸流形上的间隙填充（constrained packing）问题，利用repulsion-based allocation算法在真实身份之间插入虚拟身份，并开发了GapGen生成器，专用于跨分布、无碰撞地生成高保真虚拟人脸图像。此外，构建了虚拟LFW数据集及相关评测协议。

Result: 方法可在包含36万真实身份的数据库中，生成1000万组无碰撞虚拟身份嵌入；GapGen可生成100万高保真实虚拟人脸；v-LFW数据集及协议验证了虚拟身份的可用性，包括跨实虚识别、真伪检测等任务。

Conclusion: BIP框架和GapGen扩展了虚拟身份的分配与生成边界，推动数字实体生物身份系统构建，并为虚拟身份在多任务识别领域应用奠定基础。

Abstract: Digital entities such as AI agents and humanoid robots increasingly operate alongside real humans, yet their identity infrastructure is based on credentials rather than embodied biometric identity. We introduce Biometric Identity Provisioning (BIP), a new problem and solution framework that addresses: given an enrollment gallery of real human identities, provision virtual identities that are non-colliding with every enrolled identity, maintain sufficient inter-class separability, and are realizable as high-fidelity face images. The key geometric insight is that real face identities occupy a low-dimensional subspace of the embedding hypersphere, leaving no residual subspace for virtual identities. Hence, virtual identities must instead be allocated as unclaimed gaps within the real face manifold itself. BIP is therefore a constrained packing problem: available gaps vastly exceed any foreseeable enrollment scale, and provisioned identities remain non-colliding even as new real identities are subsequently enrolled. Grounded in this geometry, our repulsion-based allocation is not bounded by any fixed provisioning count; we demonstrate 10M non-colliding virtual identity embeddings against a gallery of 360K real identities. Realizing these embeddings as face images requires a generator that operates outside the training distribution of real face images; we introduce GapGen, a gap-aware generator trained with a curriculum that progressively extends synthesis into non-colliding regions, validated at 1M photorealistic virtual face images. We further construct v-LFW, a virtual counterpart to LFW face dataset, with protocols for virtual face verification, cross-reality matching, real-vs-virtual detection, and unified recognition and detection.

</details>


### [262] [GaussianZoom: Progressive Zoom-in Generative 3D Gaussian Splatting with Geometric and Semantic Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18252)
*Jiale Shi,Jiarui Hu,Zesong Yang,Kaixuan Luan,Hujun Bao,Zhaopeng Cui*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出GaussianZoom方法，实现了从低分辨率输入生成高质量细节的3D场景极致放大重建。系统结合几何一致性建模与多尺度语义推理，通过多视角超分辨和细节合成模块，显著提升渲染表现，在高放大倍率下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D重建在低分辨输入下难以产生极致放大的高细节渲染，缺乏跨尺度一致性和丰富细节。作者旨在攻克极致放大时多视角一致性与高保真度的问题。

Method: 提出一种渐进式迭代框架，结合几何一致性场景建模和多尺度语义推理。重点是新颖的多视图一致超分辨模块：用基于深度的特征变形结合视觉语言模型(VLM)指导的细节合成，在保证视角一致性的基础上，丰富超分辨外细节表现。此外，提出可扩展连续多层次细节层次结构，动态调节高斯可见性，实现跨尺度平滑无锯齿渲染。

Result: 在Mip-NeRF360和Tanks&Temples数据集上，GaussianZoom在感知质量、多视角一致性和极高放大倍率下的鲁棒性上，均超过现有方法。

Conclusion: GaussianZoom为生成式极致放大3D场景重建建立了稳健的基线，能够有效解决高放大倍率场景渲染中的一致性和细节丰富问题。

Abstract: We introduce GaussianZoom, a generative zoom-in 3D reconstruction system with an iterative progressive framework that combines geometry-consistent scene modeling and multi-scale semantic reasoning to enable high-fidelity extreme zoom-in rendering from low-resolution inputs. To achieve this, we develop a novel multi-view consistent super-resolution module with depth-based feature warping and VLM-driven detail synthesis, ensuring accurate multi-view correspondence while enriching fine-scale appearance beyond the observed resolution. To support zooming across large magnification ranges, we further introduce a new expandable continuous Level-of-Detail hierarchy that dynamically modulates Gaussian visibility for smooth, alias-free cross-scale rendering. Experiments on Mip-NeRF360 and Tanks\&Temples demonstrate that GaussianZoom achieves superior perceptual quality, multi-view consistency, and robustness under extreme magnification, establishing a strong baseline for generative zoom-in 3D scene reconstruction.

</details>


### [263] [RT-Splatting: Joint Reflection-Transmission Modeling with Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18263)
*Ji Shi,Xianghua Ying,Bowei Xing,Ruohao Guo,Wenzhen Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RT-Splatting方法，显著提升3D高斯Splatting在半透明高光（镜面反射）场景下的渲染效果，兼顾高质量反射及清晰透射，并实现实时性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的3D Gaussian Splatting方法难以同时准确渲染半透明高光表面的复杂反射和透射，导致反射模糊或透射部分被过度遮挡，影响视觉质量。

Method: 引入RT-Splatting框架，将每个高斯的几何占据度与光学不透明度解耦，形成统一的表面-体积场景表达，仅用一组高斯基元。提出混合渲染器，实现表面模式下高频反射和体积模式下清晰透射。针对反射与透射联合优化带来的歧义，提出高光感知梯度门控（Specular-Aware Gradient Gating），抑制高反光区域对透射分支的误导。

Result: 在复杂半透明场景上，RT-Splatting达到当前最优表现，能实时生成高逼真度反射和清晰透射。同时，其表达能力支持灵活的场景编辑。

Conclusion: RT-Splatting有效解决了现有3DGS在半透明高光场景中的关键痛点，兼顾高质量反射、清晰透射和实时渲染，推动了相关技术发展。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time novel view synthesis with high visual quality. However, existing methods struggle with semi-transparent specular surfaces that exhibit both complex reflections and clear transmission, often producing blurry reflections or overly occluded transmission. To address this, we present RT-Splatting, a framework that disentangles each Gaussian's geometric occupancy from its optical opacity. This factorization yields a unified surface-volume scene representation with a single set of Gaussian primitives. Our hybrid renderer interprets this representation both as a surface to capture high-frequency reflections and as a volume to preserve clear transmission. To mitigate the ambiguity in jointly optimizing reflection and transmission, we introduce Specular-Aware Gradient Gating, which suppresses misleading gradients from highly specular regions into the transmission branch, effectively reducing distracting floaters. Experiments on challenging semi-transparent scenes show that RT-Splatting achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering high-fidelity reflections and clear transmission with real-time rendering. Moreover, our factorization naturally enables flexible scene editing. The project page is available at https://sjj118.github.io/RT-Splatting.

</details>


### [264] [SRC-Flow: Compact Semantic Representations Enable Normalizing Flows for Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18267)
*Longtao Jiang,Jiangmin Bao,Zhendong Wang,Xin Tao,Pengfei Wan,Zhihui Li,Xiaojun Chang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SRC-Flow的新型normalizing flow方法，通过引入语义压缩器，将高维视觉特征压缩至低维空间，从而实现更高效、精确的生成建模，显著提升了大规模图像生成任务中NFs的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然normalizing flows可以实现精确的似然计算和可逆采样，但在大规模图像生成任务中，性能一直落后于扩散模型，主要障碍是NFs需要在全空间学习单一可逆变换，对高维表示极为敏感，造成了语义与特征维度之间的错配问题。

Method: 提出SRC-Flow结构，在flow建模前先用语义表示压缩器（SRC）将高维的自动编码器（RAE）特征压缩到低维语义空间，通过冻结RAE解码器保持重构能力。同时针对flow的固定双射特性设计常量噪声正则化，以稳定训练。

Result: 在ImageNet $256\times256$和$512\times512$数据集上，SRC-Flow在所有normalizing flow方法中实现了最优的生成质量，gFID分别达到1.65和2.07，并且保持了对紧凑语义空间的精确似然估计和可逆采样能力。

Conclusion: SRC-Flow有效解决了normalizing flow在现代高维视觉空间下的语义-容量错配难题，在保证生成质量与可逆性的前提下，推动了likelihood-based图像生成的发展，具有重要的理论和实际意义。

Abstract: Normalizing flows (NFs) provide exact likelihoods and deterministic invertible sampling, but have historically lagged behind diffusion models for large-scale image generation. We identify a key obstacle: NFs are required to learn a single invertible transport over the full ambient space, making them highly sensitive to high-dimensional representations. This leads to a semantic-capacity mismatch in modern visual representation spaces, where semantic information is compact but encoded in overcomplete features. We propose SRC-Flow, which introduces a Semantic Representation Compressor (SRC) to compact high-dimensional RAE features into a low-dimensional semantic space before flow modeling and preserve reconstruction through the frozen RAE decoder. This compact space reduces the modeling burden of NFs and enables effective likelihood-based generation in semantic representation space. We further adopt constant noise regularization tailored to the fixed unconditional bijection learned by flows. On ImageNet $256 \times 256$ and $512 \times 512$, SRC-Flow achieves state-of-the-art generation quality among normalizing flow methods, with gFID scores of 1.65 and 2.07 under classifier-free guidance, while retaining exact likelihood computation in the compact semantic representation space and deterministic invertible sampling at the flow level. Codes and models will be available at https://github.com/longtaojiang/SRC-Flow.

</details>


### [265] [Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Method for Unsupervised Fine-Grained Image Hashing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18288)
*Anh-Kiet Duong,Petra Gomez-Krämer,Jean-Michel Carozza*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的无监督细粒度图像哈希方法CS3H，有效减少哈希冲突，同时提升检索精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督哈希方法容易出现哈希码冲突，即语义略有差异的样本被编码为相同的哈希码，导致检索准确率下降，细粒度区分能力不足。

Method: 提出Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Self-Supervised Semantic Hashing (CS3H) 框架，通过单遍归一化Hamming距离损失，直接优化Hamming空间相似性。同时引入冲突敏感的注意力模块，突出罕见且有区分度的局部特征，减少哈希冲突。

Result: 在多个公开数据集上，CS3H在检索准确率和哈希冲突抵抗方面均优于主流方法，且计算开销很小。

Conclusion: CS3H能生成分辨度更高的哈希码，显著提升无监督细粒度图像检索性能，并兼具高效性和抗冲突能力。

Abstract: Unsupervised fine-grained image hashing aims to learn compact binary codes that preserve subtle visual differences among highly similar instances without manual annotations. However, most existing methods neglect collision resistance, leading to identical hash codes for slightly semantically different samples. In this paper, we propose Collision-Resistant Single-Pass Self-Supervised Semantic Hashing (CS3H), a collision-resistant framework that directly optimizes Hamming-space similarity via a single-pass normalized Hamming distance loss to produce well-separated binary representations. We further introduce a collision-sensitive attention module to emphasize rare and discriminative local patterns, reducing hash collisions and improving fine-grained discrimination. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that CS3H consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in retrieval accuracy while achieving superior collision resistance with minimal computational overhead.

</details>


### [266] [Wasserstein Equilibrium Decoding for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18313)
*Luca Hagen,Johanna P. Müller,Weitong Zhang,Mengyun Qiao,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对适用于医疗场景的小型视觉-语言模型，提出了一种新型的博弈论解码与语义共识收敛方法，有效提升了医疗视觉问答任务的准确性与推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小型视觉-语言模型(VLMs)因为隐私、网络与延迟等限制优势更适合在医疗场景部署。但其容量小，容易生成貌似合理但实际错误的答案，亟需提升输出的安全性与准确性。

Method: 将此前只用于文本、封闭答案的博弈论解码方法，扩展到支持开放式问答的医学VQA；创新性地引入了基于词义共识的Wasserstein终止准则，替换传统的词序匹配，减少由于近义回答无意义排列而导致的不必要推理迭代。

Result: 在VQA-RAD和PathVQA两个公开医学VQA数据集上，与贪婪和判别式解码方法相比，新方法在准确率上获得了统计显著提升。如Qwen3-VL-2B在VQA-RAD上提升了3.5个百分点，并超越了容量更大的4B模型。在PathVQA上，Gemma-3-4B在无医疗领域微调的情况下可与MedGemma-4B媲美。同时与传统解码准确率持平时，Wasserstein准则能约减少20%推理迭代，提高推理效率。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的Wasserstein-博弈论解码方法有效提升了小型医疗视觉语言模型的准确率与效率，使其在满足隐私与本地部署需求下，更加可靠实用。

Abstract: Small vision-language models (2-8B) are well-suited for clin- ical deployment due to privacy constraints, limited connectivity, and low-latency requirements favouring on-device or on-premise inference. However, their limited capacity exacerbates the generation of plausible but incorrect outputs. We extend game-theoretic decoding, previously restricted to text-only, closed-ended NLP tasks, to vision-language mod- els for open-ended Medical VQA. We introduce a semantically aware Wasserstein stopping criterion that replaces lexical order matching, en- abling convergence based on semantic consensus among near-synonymous candidate answers and avoiding unnecessary iterations caused by clini- cally equivalent ranking swaps. On VQA-RAD and PathVQA, we ob- tain consistent, statistically significant improvements over greedy and discriminative baselines. On VQA-RAD, we improve Qwen3-VL-2B by +3.5 percentage points (p < 0.01), surpassing the greedy 4B model, with similar trends at larger scales. On PathVQA, Gemma-3-4B with BDG matches MedGemma-4B under greedy decoding despite no domain- specific fine-tuning. At accuracy parity with classic BDG, the Wasser- stein criterion reduces average convergence iterations by approximately 20%, improving inference efficiency while preserving the game-theoretic equilibrium behaviour. Code is available at https://github.com/luca-hagen/ Wasserstein-BDG-medical-VQA.

</details>


### [267] [Improved Baselines with Representation Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18324)
*Jaskirat Singh,Boyang Zheng,Zongze Wu,Richard Zhang,Eli Shechtman,Saining Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了RAEv2，一种基于预训练视觉编码器的Representation Autoencoders（RAE）新变体，通过一系列设计改进显著提升了重建质量与训练效率，在ImageNet和FDr^k等基准上均取得了新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在系统性评估和改进RAE结构，以实现更好的模型重建能力、更快的训练效率，并解决原RAE在CFG方面的限制。

Method: 1. 将表示定义改为最后k层编码器输出的求和；2. 分析RAE与表示对齐（REPA）的互补性，将同一表示用作编码器和扩散层目标；3. 用REPA输出参数化，免去额外训练，直接获得CFG能力。

Result: RAEv2在ImageNet-256上仅用80个epoch就获得1.06的gFID，FDr^k任务上80个epoch达到2.17（此前最佳为800个epoch, 3.26），相比原RAE训练收敛效率提升超10倍。

Conclusion: RAEv2大幅简化了结构并提升了训练速度和重建表现，且无需额外弱模型用于引导，验证了其在文本生成和导航等多任务上的通用性和稳定提升表现。

Abstract: Representation Autoencoders (RAE) replace traditional VAE with pretrained vision encoders. In this paper, we systematically investigate several design choices and find three insights which simplify and improve RAE. First, we study a generalized formulation where the representation is defined as sum of the last k encoder layers rather than solely the final layer. This simple change greatly improves reconstruction without encoder finetuning or specialized data (e.g., text, faces). Second, we study the prevalent assumption that RAE (using pretrained representation as encoder) replaces representation alignment (REPA), which distills the same representation to intermediate layers instead. Through large-scale empirical analysis, we uncover a surprising finding: RAE and REPA exhibit complementary working mechanisms, allowing the same representation to be used as both encoder and target for intermediate diffusion layers. Finally, the original RAE struggles with classifier-free guidance (CFG) and requires training a second, weaker diffusion model for AutoGuidance (AG). We show that REPA itself can be viewed as x-prediction in RAE latent space. By simply re-parameterizing the output of the DiT model, it can provide guidance for "free". Overall, RAEv2 leads to more than 10x faster convergence over the original RAE, achieving a state-of-the-art gFID of 1.06 in just 80 epochs on ImageNet-256. On FDr^k, RAEv2 achieves a state-of-the-art 2.17 at just 80 epochs compared to the previous best 3.26 (800 epochs) without any post-training. This motivates EP_FID@k (epochs to reach unguided gFID <= k) as a measure of training efficiency. RAEv2 attains an EP_FID@2 of 35 epochs, versus 177 for the original RAE. We also validate our approach across diverse settings for text-to-image generation and navigation world models, showing consistent improvements. Code is available at https://raev2.github.io.

</details>


### [268] [CineMatte: Background Matting for Virtual Production and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18328)
*Yuanjian He,Chen Zhang,Fasheng Chen,Jiangbo Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CineMatte，一种面向LED虚拟制片（VP）的强健背景抠像框架，在CineMatte-4K等真实数据集上表现优异，并且可推广至其他场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LED虚拟制片通过实时渲染大规模LED背景实现高质量视觉特效，但拍摄后修改画面中的内容非常繁琐，传统抠像技术对复杂环境鲁棒性不足且容易引入伪影。需要一种更为鲁棒且可泛化的抠像方法。

Method: CineMatte采用交叉注意力条件化设计，利用Siamese结构的冻结DINOv3 Vision Transformer对输入帧和背景独立编码，通过交叉注意力模块比较两者得出前景，实现鲁棒分割。与以往靠并行卷积细枝恢复边界不同，CineMatte用预训练的图像引导特征上采样器，显著减轻语义失配带来的边界伪影。本文还发布了CineMatte-4K高质量HDR图像及视频数据集，支持真实VP场景下的训练和测试。

Result: CineMatte在自有CineMatte-4K数据集及VideoMatte240K、YouTubeMatte等公开基准数据集上均取得了优异的抠像效果，不仅适用于VP场景，也对现实世界视频有很强的泛化能力。

Conclusion: CineMatte在VP拍摄及常规视频中都能实现高质量、鲁棒的抠像分割，相关设计有效解决了现有方法的边界伪影问题，为实际虚拟制作和抠像任务提供了有力工具。

Abstract: LED Virtual Production (VP) uses large LED volumes to render backgrounds in real time, enabling in-camera visual effects but making post-shot changes labor-intensive. We address this with CineMatte, a robust background matting framework for VP and beyond. CineMatte employs a cross-attention-conditioned design. Instead of concatenating the background with the input, CineMatte employs a Siamese, frozen DINOv3 Vision Transformer with shared weights to encode the input frame and the captured background separately. A cross-attention module compares the two streams to predict the foreground, preserving pretrained semantics and improving robustness to background shifts. Previous ViT-based matting models use a parallel convolutional "detail branch" to recover fine details, which can cause boundary artifacts in real-world samples due to semantic misalignment with the backbone. We instead replace it with a pretrained, image-guided feature upsampler, which largely mitigates the problem. We also introduce CineMatte-4K, a 4K HDR image-video dataset captured on a professional LED VP stage. To the best of our knowledge, the image subset is the first dataset for VP matting and is non-synthetic, obtained via green-screen insertion; the video subset includes camera motion with tracked trajectories so that arbitrary backgrounds can be rendered later with correct parallax. Across CineMatte-4K and public benchmarks (VideoMatte240K, YouTubeMatte), CineMatte not only excels in VP but also generalizes robustly to real-world footage.

</details>


### [269] [Lost in the Folds: When Cross-Validation Is Not a Deep Ensemble for Uncertainty Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18329)
*Kirscher Tristan,Bujotzek Markus,Kirchhoff Yannick,Rokuss Maximilian,Isensee Fabian,Kahl Kim-Celine,Kovacs Balint,Maier-Hein Klaus*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文对医疗图像分割中常用的不确定性代理——集成不一致性进行了分析，比较了K折交叉验证集成与随机种子深度集成的差异，并探讨它们在不同任务下的不确定性表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前许多研究采用K折交叉验证（CV）生成集成模型，但称之为深度集成（DE），但这两种方式在成员训练数据暴露上存在差异，会影响不确定性的解释。作者发现相关文献术语与实现经常不符，进而造成混淆。

Method: 作者梳理并审计了近期分割不确定性相关研究，实证比较了5折CV集成与5成员DE集成（相同训练集、不同随机种子），在三种多标注者数据集上，评估它们在校准、失败检测、歧义建模与分布偏移鲁棒性的表现。

Result: DE与CV集成在分割精度上相当，但DE在校准和失败检测上表现更优；而CV集成与标注者间变异度的相关性更高。不同组装方式在不确定性用途上各有优势。

Conclusion: 应根据实际研究问题选择集成构建方式：DE更适用于关注可靠性（如筛查、失败检测）的场景，而CV集成适合作为歧义的代理。文中还提供了nnU-Net的简明修改，以支持DE训练。

Abstract: Ensemble disagreement is widely used as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty in medical image segmentation. In practice, many studies form ensembles via K-fold cross-validation (CV), yet refer to them as ``deep ensembles'' (DE). Because CV members are trained on different data subsets, their disagreement mixes seed-driven variability with data-exposure effects, which can change how uncertainty should be interpreted. We audit recent segmentation uncertainty studies and find that terminology--implementation mismatches are common. We then compare a standard 5-fold CV ensemble to a 5-member DE (fixed training set, different random seeds) under otherwise identical configurations on three multi-rater segmentation datasets spanning three modalities. We evaluate uncertainty for calibration, failure detection, ambiguity modeling, and robustness under distribution shift. DE match segmentation accuracy while improving calibration and failure detection, whereas CV ensembles sometimes correlate more strongly with inter-rater variability on the studied datasets. Thus, ensemble construction should be chosen to match the research question: DE for reliability-oriented use (e.g., selective referral/failure detection) and CV ensembles as a proxy for ambiguity. We provide a lightweight nnU-Net modification enabling DE training within the default pipeline.

</details>


### [270] [3D Skew Gaussian Splatting with Any Camera Trajectory Visualization Engine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18334)
*Beizhen Zhao,Yifan Zhou,Gaochao Song,Ziran Yin,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出3D Skew Gaussian Splatting（3DSGS）方法，通过不对称高斯分布提升3D场景的真实感和细节保真，实现了更精细的实时交互式三维可视化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3DGS方法依赖对称高斯核，导致难以捕捉形状和颜色的不连续性，常出现模糊和冗余，影响空间数据分析的准确性。本文致力于解决这些视觉障碍，提升结构保真度和表达紧凑性。

Method: 提出将标准的高斯图元扩展为具有不对称性建模能力的偏高斯（Skew Gaussian）图元，结合增强的不透明度表示和基于深度感知的稠密化策略。同时，对CUDA光栅化管线进行重构，实现对称与非对称高斯的统一高效渲染，集成进交互式可视化引擎。

Result: 大量实验证明，3DSGS在复杂细节区域能呈现更高渲染质量和更优结构紧凑性，同时保持实时帧率，满足流畅交互需求。

Conclusion: 3DSGS极大提升了场景表达准确性与渲染效率，为三维可视分析带来更真实、紧凑且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized real-time photorealistic view synthesis, its fundamental reliance on symmetric Gaussian distributions introduces visual artifacts that hinder accurate spatial data exploration. Specifically, symmetric kernels struggle to capture shape and color discontinuities , which cause blurriness and primitive redundancy that mislead human perception during visual analysis. To address these visualization barriers, we introduce 3D Skew Gaussian Splatting (3DSGS), a novel framework that significantly enhances the structural fidelity and compactness of explicit scene representations. Our key insight lies in extending the standard primitive to a general Skew Gaussian counterpart. This generalized primitive inherits the highly efficient rasterization properties of standard Gaussians while gaining intrinsic asymmetric modeling capabilities. We couple this with an enhanced opacity representation to better handle complex transparency, alongside a depth-aware densification strategy that intelligently manages primitive allocation. Furthermore, to make these advancements actionable for real-world visual analytics, we re-derive the CUDA rasterization pipeline to universally support both symmetric and skew Gaussians, integrating it into a decoupled, free-camera interactive visualization engine. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 3DSGS achieves superior rendering quality and structural compactness, particularly in regions with intricate details, while maintaining the real-time frame rates necessary for fluid interactive exploration. Supplementary derivations and visual results are available at \textbf{\textit{https://3d-skew-gs.github.io/}}.

</details>


### [271] [Focused Forcing: Content-Aware Per-Frame KV Selection for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18346)
*Peiliang Cai,Evelyn Zhang,Jiacheng Liu,Hao Lin,Ruiqi Zhang,Weile Mo,Yue Ma,Shikang Zheng,Jiehang Huang,Dongrui Liu,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的KV缓存筛选方法（Focused Forcing），有效提升自回归视频扩散生成的效率和质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自回归视频扩散生成在长时序生成中，KV缓存体量庞大，既影响效率，又难以在压缩缓存时保留生成质量。以往方法仅以注意力分数粗略筛选历史帧，忽略了不同生成帧、注意力头之间的差异性，导致上下文利用不充分。

Method: 提出了Focused Forcing方法，在无需额外训练的情况下，在生成帧和注意力头两个维度上有针对性地筛选和分配KV缓存：1）为每个生成帧，基于注意力分数和多样性分数共同保留最相关、最具区别性的历史帧；2）对不同head分配不同预算，依据显式估算的重要性更合理分配缓存。

Result: 在多种自回归视频生成范式下，Focused Forcing无需训练即可实现最高1.48倍的端到端加速，同时提升生成视频的视觉质量与文本对齐。

Conclusion: Focused Forcing为长时序自回归视频生成的KV缓存管理提供了高效、训练无关的解决方案，兼顾生成效率与质量，有望推动应用落地。

Abstract: Recent advances in autoregressive video diffusion have enabled sequential and streaming video generation. However, long-horizon generation requires increasingly large KV caches, making efficient compression without sacrificing quality challenging. Existing methods mostly select historical frames based on attention scores, but their context decisions remain coarse. When multiple frames are generated in the same chunk, these methods often apply a shared history selection to the whole chunk, score historical frames solely by attention, and assign head-wise budgets either uniformly or by attention-pattern heuristics rather than explicit head-importance estimation. We show that frames within the same generated chunk can depend on distinct historical frames, that the same historical frame can receive different attention scores as its relative temporal distance to the current frames changes, and that masking different heads induces unequal generation degradation. Motivated by these findings, we propose \textbf{Focused Forcing}, a training-free KV selection method that focuses cached history along both generated-frame and head dimensions. For each generated frame, Focused Forcing preserves the most relevant and distinctive historical frames by combining attention scores with diversity scores of historical frames, while assigning larger budgets to heads with higher estimated importance. Across multiple autoregressive generation paradigms, Focused Forcing achieves up to $\textbf{1.48}\times$ end-to-end acceleration without training, while \textbf{improving visual quality and text alignment}. \textit{Our code will be released on GitHub.}

</details>


### [272] [Optimising CSRNet with parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting in public transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18349)
*Aida Rostamza,Enrico Del Re,Joshua Cherian Varughese,Cristina Olaverri-Monreal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了无参数注意力机制在高密度人群计数和密度图估计方面的效果，提出了一种结合通道和空间注意力的PFCASA新模块，并证明其在公交场景下能以零参数增加获得与传统带参数注意力机制相当甚至更优的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能公交等公共交通工具需要准确的人数估计和占用率分析，但传统注意力机制虽然强化了深度模型表达能力，却会带来额外参量与算力消耗，难以落地于边缘端设备。无参数注意力机制有望缓解这一问题。

Method: 系统评估了三种主流无参数注意力（PFCA、SA、SimAM）在人群计数任务中的效果，并与不超过1%参数增加的带参数注意力对比。同时，提出了结合PFCA和SA的新型PFCASA模块，并以CSRNet为骨干网络，在ShanghaiTech数据集上进行实验验证。

Result: 参数无关（parameter-free，零参数增量）的注意力机制在人群计数精度上与参数化模块持平甚至更优，PFCASA在个体数较少（<40）时表现最好，而PFCA在人群密集时更有效。

Conclusion: 无参数注意力机制为资源受限设备上的高效人群计数和密度估计提供了可行路径，新提出的PFCASA模块尤其适合公交类流式视频场景，有潜力集成进智能公共交通系统。

Abstract: Occupancy estimation and crowd counting are critical tasks in designing smart and efficient public transport vehicles. Given that public transport loading can vary from sparse to crowded, classical models for occupancy estimation must be adapted to suit this purpose. Attention mechanisms have shown remarkable capability in enhancing the representational power of deep neural networks for crowd counting in congested scenes with occlusion, complex backgrounds, and perspective distortion. However, conventional approaches, often implemented as parameterized sub-networks within convolutional layers, inevitably increase model size and computational cost, limiting deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. This paper investigates the effectiveness of state-of-the-art parameter-free attention mechanisms for crowd counting and density map estimation in highly congested scenes. We evaluate channel-wise (PFCA), spatial-wise (SA), and 3-D (SimAM) modules and compare their performance with parameterized attention modules constrained to introduce no more than 1% additional parameters. Furthermore, we present a novel combination of attention mechanisms that combines the strengths of PFCA and SA (PFCASA) customized for analyzing video streams onboard public transport systems. Using CSRNet as the backbone, experiments on the ShanghaiTech dataset demonstrate that parameter-free attention mechanisms achieve comparable or superior accuracy without introducing additional model parameters. A detailed performance analysis further reveals that PFCASA outperforms other attention modules in scenes with fewer than 40 individuals, while PFCA shows greater effectiveness as crowd density increases, underscoring their potential applicability for integration into smart public transport modalities.

</details>


### [273] [RAVE: Re-Allocating Visual Attention in Large Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18359)
*Xi Leng,Xinhong Ma,Ziqiang Dong,Feng Zhang,Xiaoying Tang,Yang Yang,Guanjun Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了RAVE机制，通过重分配视觉注意力提升多模态模型表现，在多个任务中优于传统注意力机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大型多模态模型在注意力分配上存在问题，如文本信息与视觉信息的错配以及视觉Token之间的不均衡分配，影响模型对视觉信息的精准理解。

Method: 提出RAVE（Re-Allocating Visual Attention）机制，在视觉注意力分配阶段引入可学习的query-key偏置，无需改动主干网络结构，可端到端训练，从而优化视觉注意力分配。

Result: 在多种多模态基准测试上，RAVE平均提升3分，尤其是在需要精确视觉感知的任务（如多语言OCR、图表理解、文档VQA和场景文本VQA）上提升显著。

Conclusion: RAVE能高效改善多模态模型的视觉注意力分配，提升视觉相关任务中的性能，且方案轻量、易于集成。

Abstract: Large multimodal models (LMMs) inherit the self-attention mechanism of pretrained language backbones, yet standard attention can exhibit suboptimal allocation, including cross-modal misallocation between textual and visual evidence and intra-visual imbalance among visual tokens. We propose RAVE (Re-Allocating Visual Attention), a lightweight pair-gating mechanism that adds a learned query--key bias to pre-softmax attention scores over visual keys, derived from pre-RoPE query and key features. RAVE requires no architectural modification to the backbone and can be trained end-to-end with the rest of the model. Across a suite of multimodal benchmarks, RAVE improves over standard attention by an average of 3 points, with the largest gains on perception-intensive tasks -- including multilingual OCR, chart understanding, document VQA, and scene text VQA -- where accurate visual grounding is critical.

</details>


### [274] [GeoFlow: Enforcing Implicit Geometric Consistency in Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18365)
*Jan Ackermann,Shengqu Cai,Boyang Deng,Zhengfei Kuang,Songyou Peng,Gordon Wetzstein*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种提升生成视频几何一致性的奖励方法，通过直接衡量生成视频中的运动是否与物理场景一致，显著减少了当前主流方法中的对象变形与背景漂移等问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到视频扩散模型仅隐式处理几何信息，导致摄像机运动下出现物体变形、背景不一致等问题。已有的改进方法受限于静态场景、间接一致性提升或对生成空间整体重塑，缺乏可泛化且直接面向几何一致性的优化目标。

Method: 作者提出了一个‘几何一致性奖励’，核心思想是物理一致的视频中，背景应由刚性摄像机运动解释，运动物体要沿运动轨迹保持外观一致。具体做法是利用光流、深度-位姿预测和特征匹配，将刚性区域和动态区域分离，分别计算各自一致性分数，并用作视频生成模型的强化学习奖励，实现直接优化几何一致性。

Result: 方法可用于各种包含相机与物体运动的动态场景，无模型结构限制。实验展示相较于强大基线，提出方法能大幅减少时间上的几何伪影，同时保留感知质量。

Conclusion: 几何一致性奖励将原本只可间接获得的几何约束转化为生成器的明确优化目标，在提升视频生成一致性和质量方面具有实际应用潜力，并具良好通用性。

Abstract: Generating geometrically consistent videos remains an open challenge: text-to-video diffusion models trained on web-scale data treat geometry only implicitly, leading to object deformation, texture drift, and non-rigid backgrounds under camera motion. Existing solutions either improve consistency as a byproduct, apply only to static scenes or realign the latent space of the model completely. We introduce a geometry-consistency reward that directly measures whether motion in a generated video is compatible with a coherent scene. Our key insight is that in physically consistent videos, background motion should be explainable by rigid camera-induced flow, while independently moving objects should preserve appearance identity along motion trajectories. We operationalize this using optical flow, depth--pose predictions, and feature-based correspondence to separate rigid and dynamic regions and evaluate their respective consistency. Integrating this reward with reinforcement fine-tuning transforms geometric consistency from an emergent property into an explicit optimization objective for video generators. The approach is model agnostic and applies to diverse dynamic scenes containing both camera and object motion. Experiments show substantial reductions in temporal geometric artifacts over strong baselines while preserving perceptual quality. Code and model weights are published.

</details>


### [275] [Vision Foundation Models as Generalist Tokenizers for Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18390)
*Anlin Zheng,Qi Han,Xin Wen,Chuofan Ma,Lanxi Gong,Gang Yu,Xiangyu Zhang,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于冻结视觉基础模型（VFM）的通用型图像分词器VFMTok，并通过区域自适应量化和语义对齐解码目标，实现高效且高保真的图像建模。VFMTok在ImageNet等任务上取得了显著性能提升，并加速了生成模型的收敛和推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像分词器大多依赖于训练专门的编码器，难以高效保留图像的高级语义信息，且对空间冗余处理不理想。作者希望利用已有的强大预训练视觉模型构建更高效、泛化能力强的分词器。

Method: 该方法冻结视觉基础模型作为编码器，创新性地提出了区域自适应量化框架，去除常规2D特征中的空间冗余，并设计了语义重构目标，使解码输出与VFM表示对齐，保证语义一致性。方法支持离散和连续潜空间建模。

Result: VFMTok提升了合成质量，令分词效率显著提高。在ImageNet类条件生成上，离散AR生成模型收敛速度快3倍、gFID达到1.36；连续空间生成结合去噪模型则gFID达1.25。同时，该方法无需分类器自由引导即可实现高保真度合成，并加快推理速度。

Conclusion: 以全局对比学习与掩码预测联合预训练的VFM作为分词器更优。本文方法为图像分词器的设计提供了新方向和实践建议，推动了高效、高保真的视觉建模。

Abstract: In this work, we explore the largely unexplored direction of building a generalist image tokenizer directly on top of a frozen vision foundation model (VFM). To build this tokenizer, we utilize a frozen VFM as the encoder and introduce two key innovations: (1) a region-adaptive quantization framework to eliminate spatial redundancy in standard 2D grid features, and (2) a semantic reconstruction objective that aligns the decoded outputs with the VFM's representations to preserve semantic fidelity. Grounded in these designs, we propose VFMTok, a generalist visual tokenizer capable of operating seamlessly in both discrete and continuous latent spaces. VFMTok achieves substantial improvements in synthesis quality while drastically enhancing token efficiency. For discrete autoregressive (AR) generation, it accelerates model convergence by \textbf{3 times} and achieves a state-of-the-art gFID of \textbf{1.36} on ImageNet class-conditional synthesis. Similarly, for continuous-space generation, integrating VFMTok with a denoising model yields an exceptional gFID of \textbf{1.25}. Furthermore, because the latent space inherently captures rich spatial semantics, VFMTok enables high-fidelity class-conditional synthesis without classifier-free guidance (\textbf{w/o CFG}) across both generative paradigms, significantly accelerating inference speed. Beyond these remarkable empirical results, we systematically investigate the underlying mechanisms of our approach. We discover that the specific self-supervised learning objectives utilized during VFM pre-training dictate its effectiveness as a tokenizer. Specifically, a VFM jointly optimized with global contrastive learning and latent masked image modeling provides the optimal representations for image tokenization. These insights establish a strong foundation and offer valuable guidance for the design of future image tokenizers.

</details>


### [276] [NEWTON: Agentic Planning for Physically Grounded Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18396)
*Yuxiang Feng,Juncheng Wang,Chao Xu,Yijie Qian,Huihan Wang,Wenlong Hou,Yang Liu,Baigui Sun,Yong Liu,Shujun Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 当前视频生成模型难以遵循物理常识，NEWTON通过引入智能规划与物理感知工具，有效提升了生成视频的物理合理性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成模型在视觉效果上表现出色，但由于文本提示对物理世界的描述信息丢失，导致系统性违反物理常识，模型扩展也难以弥补这一先天信息缺失。

Method: 提出NEWTON系统，将视频生成降格为一个智能体工具包内的子任务，通过学习规划器协调多个物理感知工具（如关键帧生成、科学计算、提示优化），并引入验证器支持多轮迭代优化。规划器为唯一可训练组件，通过Flow-GRPO算法在多轮互动中在线优化。

Result: 在VideoPhy-2基准集上，NEWTON模型在LTX-Video任务上的联合准确率从21.4%提升到29.7%，在Veo-3.1任务上从30.7%提升到37.4%，均未更改生成器本身。

Conclusion: NEWTON通过丰富的物理条件输入与循环验证机制，大幅缓解了视频生成中的物理常识违背问题，验证了物理感知先决条件的重要性。

Abstract: Video generation models produce visually compelling results but systematically violate physical commonsense -- on VideoPhy-2, the best model achieves only 32.6% joint accuracy. We identify a specification bottleneck: text prompts are lossy compression of the physical world, omitting the parameters that fully determine dynamics, and no amount of model scaling can recover what was never specified. From this diagnosis we derive three properties that physics conditioning must satisfy -- sufficiency, dynamism, and verifiability -- and show that no existing approach satisfies all three. We present NEWTON, in which video generation is demoted from the system output to one action inside an agent's toolbox: a learned planner orchestrates physics-aware tools (keyframe generation, scientific computation, prompt refinement) to construct rich conditioning, and a verifier closes the loop for iterative re-planning. The planner is the sole trainable component, optimized on-policy via Flow-GRPO inside the live multi-turn loop. On VideoPhy-2, NEWTON improves joint accuracy from 21.4% to 29.7% on LTX-Video and from 30.7% to 37.4% on Veo-3.1, without modifying either generator. Our project page: \href{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}{https://Newton026.github.io/newton}

</details>


### [277] [Historical Knowledge Graphs for Global Maritime Estimated Time of Arrival](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18408)
*Neofytos Dimitriou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种仅基于AIS数据，构建历史海事知识图谱以预测全球范围内船舶到港时间的方法，无需昂贵的上下文数据，并取得了较高的预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 港口运作和减碳要求对准确预测船舶到港时间提出了较高需求，但现有方法难以在全球范围预测，且常依赖高昂的上下文数据。为此，作者希望用廉价、广泛可得的AIS数据解决该问题。

Method: 首先利用基于高斯混合模型的数据预处理管道，从噪声AIS数据中提取分段轨迹。再通过迭代处理这些轨迹，根据船型、航行时间和方向归类存储速度分布，最终构建包含5,433个节点和12,334条边的全球海事知识图谱。设计了一套分层优先的查询系统，用历史统计数据为任意两点生成旅行时间预测，并有稳健的回退机制。

Result: 在时间隔离的测试集上，分段级别中值RMSE为22.75分钟，轨迹级为30.9分钟，有69.1%轨迹预测误差在实际到达时间20%以内。在外部测试集上，中值RMSE分别为27.36和37.46分钟，有62.1%的轨迹误差在20%以内。

Conclusion: 所提方法验证了其在全球旅行时间预测的可行性和高精度，为准时到港计划和减少温室气体排放提供了可靠基础。

Abstract: Accurate vessel estimated-time-of-arrival forecasts are critical for port operations and decarbonization, yet global-scale travel-time prediction remains difficult without costly contextual data. Herein, I present a methodology for constructing a historical maritime knowledge graph using only Automatic Identification System (AIS) data. First, segmented trajectories are extracted from noisy AIS data using a Gaussian-mixture-model-based preprocessing pipeline. The graph is then constructed by iteratively processing the trajectories and storing speed distributions stratified by vessel type, time of travel, and direction of travel; the resulting global graph comprises 5,433 geohash-3 nodes and 12,334 edges. The graph can be queried to retrieve travel-time predictions between any two location via a hierarchical, priority-based system that uses historical statistics with principled fallback. On a temporally held-out test set, median RMSE is 22.75 min (segment-level) and 30.90 min (trajectory-level), with 69.1% of trajectories within 20% of actual arrival time. On a second external test set, median RMSE is 27.36 min (segment-level) and 37.46 min (trajectory-level), with 62.1% of trajectories within 20%. These results corroborate the promise of our method, enabling global travel-time prediction and providing a strong foundation for just-in-time arrival planning and emissions reduction.

</details>


### [278] [Cracks in the Foundation: A Civil Infrastructure Dataset to Challenge Vision Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18413)
*Nicola Farronato,Niccolo Avogaro,Thomas Frick,Mattia Rigotti,Rizwan Ullah Khan,Michele Magno,Konrad Schindler,Cristiano Malossi,Florian Scheidegger*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出并发布了目前最大、最详细的土木基础设施缺陷实例分割数据集CiF，揭示了现有视觉AI模型在土木基础设施缺陷分割任务中的表现远不及预期，是一个尚未解决的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 土木基础设施健康监测对防止灾难性事故至关重要，而精确的像素级缺陷分割技术因数据极度稀缺和昂贵的专家标注成本难以进步，亟需新的数据集支持和进一步研究。

Method: 作者经过五年与土木工程专家合作，精心收集和标注了约15万张高分辨率基础设施影像，构建出大规模的Cracks in the Foundation (CiF)缺陷分割数据集，并用该数据集系统评测了最新的基础模型和特定领域的分割模型。

Result: 评测结果显示，即使是最先进的零样本基础模型和经过领域监督的专用模型，其对基础设施缺陷的分割性能依然很低，特定模型的mAP最高仅约为25%，暴露出当前模型在这一实际领域中的弱点。

Conclusion: CiF数据集的发布不仅为土木工程缺陷检测提供了重要资源，还证明了现有视觉AI模型在该领域的不足，强调了对专门领域数据和方法的长期需求，并将土木基础设施检查确立为AI感知领域的开放性挑战。

Abstract: Automated structural health monitoring is essential to prevent catastrophic infrastructure failures. Precise, pixel-level defect segmentation is needed to accurately assess structural integrity, but progress in defect segmentation for civil infrastructures has been held back by an extreme scarcity of data, which requires costly expert annotation. The need for data is accentuated by algorithmic hurdles intrinsic to the problem, including center-bias and the need to rely more on shape when inspecting nearly textureless building materials. To remove the bottleneck, we introduce Cracks in the Foundation (CiF), the largest and most detailed civil infrastructure (instance) segmentation dataset to date, comprising $\approx$150,000 high-resolution images meticulously curated over five years in collaboration with civil engineering experts. With the help of this unprecedented data source, we expose a blind spot of current visual AI: despite the advent of promptable Foundation Models (FMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs), and despite the impressive abilities of today's specialised segmentation models, it turns out that dense image understanding in the built environment is nowhere near solved. Our evaluations indicate that even the most recent zero-shot FMs face significant challenges when deployed on real-world infrastructure and even the performance of specialised models with domain-specific supervision plateaus at $\approx$25% mAP. CiF establishes inspection of civil infrastructure, an elementary and seemingly easy perceptual task, as an open challenge that reveals fundamental weaknesses of present-day models trained predominantly on internet images, literally and figuratively highlighting cracks in the current foundation model paradigm.

</details>


### [279] [Geometry-Aware Uncertainty Coresets for Robust Visual In-Context Learning in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18419)
*Franciskus Xaverius Erick,Johanna Paula Müller,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为GAUC的免训练多模态核心集选择方法，提升了视觉-语言模型在病理图像诊断中的准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）虽然适合病理诊断，但微调成本高、数据稀缺且现有in-context learning方法稳定性差；目前的样本选择策略效果有限，未能充分利用VLM的特性。

Method: GAUC方法在预训练多模态嵌入空间直接选取代表性核心集，无需参数更新，同时优化三项目标：（1）最大均值差异保证核心集与全数据分布一致性；（2）互信息正则项提升对提示词变化的稳健性；（3）预测方差惩罚项减少不稳定输出。

Result: 在CRC-100K和MHIST等数据集及多种VLM架构上，GAUC在准确性、模型校准、对提示词鲁棒性等方面均优于现有ICL方法和数据集蒸馏基线。

Conclusion: GAUC无需梯度更新，即可有效提升病理领域VLM的性能和稳定性，为数据受限场景下的医学AI提供了新思路。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can couple visual perception with open-ended clinical reasoning, making them attractive for computational histopathology. However, fine-tuning billions of parameters on scarce, expert-annotated pathology data is prohibitive, while in-context learning (ICL), which conditions the VLM on demonstrative image-text pairs without parameter updates, suffers from high sensitivity to which examples are selected and how the query is phrased, producing unreliable diagnostics. Existing selection strategies rely on query-dependent nearest-neighbour retrieval that ignores global data structure, require costly parameter updates, or disregard the joint vision-text embedding geometry of VLMs. We propose GAUC, a training-free coreset selection method operating directly in the pre-trained multimodal embedding space. GAUC jointly optimises three objectives: (1) a Maximum Mean Discrepancy term enforcing distributional fidelity between coreset and full dataset, (2) an Effective Mutual Information Difference regulariser bounding performance degradation under prompt paraphrases by exploiting the VLM's joint vision-text alignment, and (3) a predictive-variance penalty suppressing overconfident, unstable outputs. On CRC-100K and MHIST across multiple open-source VLM architectures, GAUC consistently improves accuracy, calibration, and prompt robustness over recent ICL selection methods and dataset-distillation baselines, all without a single gradient update.

</details>


### [280] [Seeing Together:Multi-Robot Cooperative Egocentric Spatial Reasoning with Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18431)
*Kunyu Peng,Zhikun Zhou,Kailun Yang,Di Wen,Ruiping Liu,Yufan Chen,Junwei Zheng,Hao Shi,Yi Zhou,M. Saquib Sarfraz,Danda Pani Paudel,Luc Van Gool*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个多机器人协作动态空间推理的新方向，并发布了相关数据集和基准测试，同时提出了一种结合谱与物理知识的多模态大模型推理框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大模型在单视角自我视频理解方面取得了进展，但在多智能体、多视角协作推理方面研究很少。现实中如多机器人协同任务需要强空间、时间及团队合作推理能力，因此有必要专门研究和评估该类能力。

Method: 作者提出了CoopSR基准，包括EgoTeam多机器人自我视角问答数据集（含仿真和真实场景）。并提出SP-CoR框架，通过动态感知采样、多视角物理引导融合和物理对齐提示蒸馏，在训练时利用机器人位姿监督，推理时仅需视频输入，实现精细协作空间推理。

Result: SP-CoR在22个MLLM基线模型中表现优异，在不同测试集（Habitat、iGibson、真实四足机器人数据）上分别超越最强基线3.87%和7.12%。在团队规模泛化和真实世界测试上也有更好表现。

Conclusion: 论文首次系统性推进多机器人多视角协作推理方向，贡献了高质量数据集与评测框架，并提出方法推动多模态大模型空间动态推理能力提升。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made substantial progress in egocentric video understanding, but their ability to reason cooperatively from multiple embodied viewpoints remains largely unexplored. We study this problem through multi-robot cooperative dynamic spatial reasoning, where a model must answer spatial, temporal, visibility, and coordination questions by integrating synchronized egocentric videos from a team of moving robots. To support this setting, we introduce CoopSR, the first benchmark for this task, together with EgoTeam, a multi-robot egocentric QA dataset. EgoTeam contains 114,227 QA pairs spanning 19 question types, four difficulty tiers, and three team sizes in Habitat and iGibson, along with a real-world test set of around 2,326 QAs collected using two quadruped robots. We further propose SP-CoR (Spectral and Physics-Informed Cooperative Reasoner), an MLLM framework for fine-grained cooperative spatial reasoning. SP-CoR combines dynamics-aware multi-robot frame sampling, spectral- and physics-guided view fusion, and physics-aligned prompt distillation, enabling the model to benefit from privileged robot-pose supervision during training while requiring only egocentric videos at test time. Across 22 MLLM baselines, SP-CoR consistently improves cooperative reasoning, outperforming the strongest fine-tuned baseline by +3.87% on Habitat and +7.12% on iGibson. It also shows stronger generalization to unseen team sizes and real-world robot tests. Code can be found at https://github.com/KPeng9510/seeing-together.git.

</details>


### [281] [A Dataset for the Recognition of Historical and Handwritten Music Scores in Western Notation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18436)
*Pau Torras,Jiří Mayer,Carles Badal,Martina Dvořáková,Markéta Herzanová Vlková,Gerard Asbert,Vojtěch Dvořák,Samuel Šomorjai,Jan Hajič,Alicia Fornés*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了MusiCorpus数据集，这是目前规模最大的历史手写乐谱数据集，包括音乐的精确转录和符号注释，为OMR（光学乐谱识别）系统的训练与评估提供了真实、代表性的样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前虽然有大量音乐遗产被数字化，但由于缺乏真实条件下的高质量数据集，OMR技术的进展受限，尤其是在深度学习时代难以训练泛化能力强的模型。

Method: 作者收集了1309页主要为手写的历史乐谱，并人工生成了MusicXML转录及符号注释，构建了MusiCorpus数据集。

Result: MusiCorpus数据集成为迄今为止最大的手写乐谱数据集，并首次覆盖了真实世界中具有代表性的音乐文档样本。

Conclusion: 该数据集有助于OMR系统在真实环境下的训练与评估，有效促进基于深度学习的OMR领域发展，并便于不同方法之间的性能对比。

Abstract: A large amount of musical heritage has been digitised by memory institutions: libraries, museums, and archives. Nevertheless, the field of Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has struggled with making this music machine-readable, despite advances in deep learning, mostly because no datasets for training systems in realistic conditions were available. The MusiCorpus dataset aims to remedy this situation by providing 1,309 pages of historical sheet music, primarily handwritten, with MusicXML transcriptions and symbol annotations. It is the largest dataset of handwritten music to date and the first dataset containing a realistic and representative sample of musical document collections from memory institutions, suitable for training and evaluating both end-to-end and object detection-based OMR systems and comparing their performance.

</details>


### [282] [NeRF-based Spacecraft Reconstruction from Close-Range Monocular Imagery Under Illumination Variability and Pose Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18447)
*Antoine Legrand,Renaud Detry,Christophe De Vleeschouwer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进后的神经辐射场（NeRF）方法，实现对未知、非合作航天器进行基于2D图像的高鲁棒性3D重建，增强了主动碎片清理和轨道服务任务的自主交会与近距离操作能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 面对在轨光照条件变化快和图像姿态信息不准确导致的3D重建困难，特别是在主动碎片清理和在轨服务等关键任务中，如何更加精准地通过多张2D图像重建未知目标航天器的3D模型，成为迫切需求。

Method: 提出将NeRF方法扩展为：每张图像引入可学习的外观嵌入，用于建模特定光照条件；同时对每张图像引入姿态修正项，动态校正其标签误差，提升跨图像的3D一致性。这些参数与NeRF网络一同端到端优化，不显著增加模型复杂度。

Result: 在三个具有代表性的在轨图像数据集上进行了实验验证。结果显示方法大幅提升了对光照变化和姿态误差的鲁棒性，实现了高质量的离线3D重建，并为在线重建提供了可行性论证。

Conclusion: 该方法有效应对了光照多变和姿态信息不准对于3D重建的挑战，显著提升了无人航天器任务中的建模可靠性，对在轨服务和碎片清理领域具有应用潜力，同时为在线3D重建这一开放问题提供了新的解决思路。

Abstract: Autonomous rendezvous and proximity operations around uncooperative, unknown spacecraft are critical for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing missions. A key component of such operations is the offline reconstruction of a 3D model of the target from a set of 2D images. This task is challenging due to two main factors. First, in-orbit illumination conditions exhibit considerable variability, and change rapidly over time. Second, the inaccuracy of pose information in the images, results in 3D reconstruction uncertainty. To overcome these challenges, we propose to extend Neural Radiance Fields with per-image degrees of freedom: a learnable appearance embedding that captures the illumination conditions specific to each image, and an image-specific pose correction term that refines its noisy pose label to increase 3D consistency across images. These parameters add minimal complexity, as they are learned jointly with the NeRF, yet they substantially improve robustness to illumination variability and pose inaccuracies. We validate our approach on three image sets representative of in-orbit operations, demonstrating its effectiveness for offline reconstruction and highlighting its suitability for online reconstruction, an open problem in the field.

</details>


### [283] [Code-as-Room: Generating 3D Rooms from Top-Down View Images via Agentic Code Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18451)
*Yixuan Yang,Zhen Luo,Wanshui Gan,Jinkun Hao,Junru Lu,Jinghao Yan,Zhaoyang Lyu,Xudong Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于MLLM（多模态大语言模型）方法的3D房间生成框架，改进了现有文本描述和图像输入方法在三维空间建模中的不足，通过Blender代码实现房间的高效、稳定生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本或图像的3D房间生成方法存在空间信息捕捉不精准、生成过程不稳定等缺陷，难以满足室内设计、虚拟现实等应用需求。该文旨在解决这些方法的局限性，提高3D室内场景生成的质量与可靠性。

Method: 提出了Code-as-Room框架，利用MLLM解析俯视房间图像，提取场景元素及空间关系，分阶段自动生成可执行的Blender代码，完成几何、材质与灯光的高质量建模，并引入跨阶段记忆模块防止上下文遗忘。作者还设计了针对代码生成3D房间的专用基准和评测协议。

Result: 在新建立的基准上，所提方法与现有主流agent方法进行了全面对比，结果显示在空间表达、稳定性和细节恢复等方面均优于对手，验证了该执行框架的有效性。

Conclusion: Code-as-Room框架显著提升了基于MLLM的3D室内房间自动生成的准确性和稳定性，为室内设计等相关应用提供了更高质量和可控性的解决方案。

Abstract: Designing realistic and functional 3D indoor rooms is essential for a wide range of applications, including interior design, virtual reality, gaming, and embodied AI. While recent MLLM-based approaches have shown great potential for 3D room synthesis from textual descriptions or reference images, text-based methods struggle to capture precise spatial information, and existing image-conditioned agents suffer from instability and infinite looping when tasked with holistic room generation from top-down views. To address these limitations, we propose Code-as-Room, an MLLM-based agentic framework equipped with a structured execution harness, which represents 3D rooms with Blender codes. Given a top-down room image, the framework parses the reference image to extract scene elements and their spatial relationships, and synthesizes executable Blender code for geometry, materials, and lighting in a principled, multi-stage pipeline. A cross-stage memory module is maintained throughout to mitigate context forgetting inherent to existing agent-based frameworks. We further introduce a dedicated benchmark for code-based 3D room synthesis, encompassing various evaluation protocols. Based on our benchmark, comprehensive comparisons against existing agent-based methods are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our proposed execution harness.

</details>


### [284] [PERL: Parameter Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18464)
*Simone Carnemolla,Salvatore Calcagno,Daniela Giordano,Concetto Spampinato,Matteo Pennisi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PERL的新方法，通过对CLIP模型潜在空间的迭代推理，实现高效参数的下游任务适应，在保证泛化能力的同时仅需极少可训练参数就实现了优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉-语言对比学习模型（如CLIP）在零样本泛化表现强大，但下游任务适应往往需要增加大量新参数（例如提示学习、适配器等），容易损失原有的泛化能力。作者希望寻找一种既高效又能保持开放词汇泛化的适应方法。

Method: 作者受语言模型中“潜在推理”理念启发，提出在冻结CLIP模型参数的同时，增加一个小型共享推理模块（PERL），反复在多个推理步骤中对潜在空间进行精炼。方法包括：1）每一步根据当前表示生成推理token；2）将该token注入到中间编码层，实现高层语义表示的渐进式优化；3）推理模块参数极少，整个过程轻量高效。

Result: 在15个基准测试上（包括基础到新类别泛化、跨数据集迁移和ImageNet变体等），PERL在快速适应、少样本条件下，取得了最佳参数-性能平衡：新类别准确率高，迁移性能强，仅需约6K可训练参数，比最大对比方法少高达817倍。

Conclusion: 迭代潜在推理是一种有效的补充适应机制，可以替代部分参数扩展方式，在判别型视觉-语言模型的高效适应中展现出强大潜力。

Abstract: Contrastively trained vision-language models such as CLIP provide strong zero-shot transfer by aligning images and text in a shared embedding space. However, adapting these models to downstream tasks without degrading their open-vocabulary generalization remains challenging. Existing parameter-efficient adaptation methods typically improve task specialization through learned prompts, adapters, or multimodal transformations, where adaptation capacity is primarily expressed through additional trainable parameters. Inspired by recent latent reasoning methods in language models, we investigate a complementary perspective: can adaptation emerge from iterative reasoning on latent representations rather than from increasing parameter count alone? We introduce PERL (Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in CLIP Latent Space), a lightweight adaptation framework that augments a frozen CLIP model with a compact shared reasoning module applied recurrently across refinement steps. At each step, PERL generates a latent reasoning token conditioned on the current representation and injects it into an intermediate encoder layer, progressively refining higher-level semantic representations while preserving CLIP's pretrained multimodal structure. Across 15 benchmarks spanning base-to-novel generalization, cross-dataset transfer, and out-of-distribution ImageNet variants, PERL achieves the best parameter-performance trade-off among the compared methods under a fast-adaptation few-shot setting, combining strong novel-class accuracy and competitive transfer performance with only about 6K trainable parameters, up to 817x fewer than the largest compared approach. Overall, our results suggest that iterative latent reasoning provides a complementary adaptation mechanism to parameter scaling in discriminative vision-language models.

</details>


### [285] [Speech-Guided Multimodal Learning for Vocal Tract Segmentation in Real-Time MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18466)
*Daiqi Liu,Lukas Mulzer,Md Hasan,Nyvenn de Castro,Fangxu Xing,Xingjian Kang,Chengze Ye,Siyuan Mei,Yipeng Sun,Tomás Arias-Vergara,Jana Hutter,Jonghye Woo,Andreas Maier,Paula Andrea Pérez-Toro*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用音频和语音学信息辅助训练，但推理阶段仅需rtMRI图像的实时声道分割新方法，显著提升了分割精度和临床可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有rtMRI声道分割方法多忽略同步音频信息，或依赖于推理时音频输入，不适用于无音频场景。亟需设计一种能利用多模态监督提升性能，但部署时仅依赖影像输入的方法。

Method: 方法分为三阶段：(1) 训练阶段用语音学标签生成分割先验框；(2) 视觉与音频编码器通过层级跨模态对比学习对齐特征；(3) 通过跨注意力解码器融合多模态表征，将多模态知识迁移到影像单模推理流程中。

Result: 在75-Speaker Annot-16和USC-TIMIT数据集上，本方法优于现有单模态和多模态分割方法，表现出更精确的分割能力与广泛的临床部署潜力。

Conclusion: 多模态（视觉+音频）监督不仅提升了分割准确率，还使模型在测试时仅需rtMRI图像即可运行，兼顾了性能与实际部署需求。

Abstract: Segmenting vocal tract articulators in real-time MRI (rtMRI) is a challenging dynamic image segmentation problem characterized by low contrast, rapid motion, and limited spatial resolution. However, while rtMRI acquisitions may provide synchronized acoustic signals, existing methods discard this information, and the few multimodal approaches that incorporate audio cannot be deployed when audio is unavailable. We propose a three-stage framework that leverages acoustic and phonological supervision during training while requiring only the rtMRI image at inference: phonological representations are converted into spatial bounding-box priors for articulator localization, visual and acoustic encoders are aligned via dual-level cross-modal contrastive pretraining, and the learned representations are fused through a cross-attention decoder, effectively transferring multimodal knowledge into a single-modality inference pipeline. Evaluated on 75-Speaker~Annot-16 and USC-TIMIT datasets, our method outperforms existing unimodal and multimodal methods, demonstrating that multimodal supervision provides transferable benefits for precise and clinically deployable vocal tract segmentation.

</details>


### [286] [InstructAV2AV: Instruction-Guided Audio-Video Joint Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18467)
*Haojie Zheng,Yixin Yang,Siqi Yang,Shuchen Weng,Boxin Shi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了InstructAV2AV，这是首个端到端的指令驱动下音视频联合编辑框架，解决了现有方法仅处理视频而忽视音频的问题。通过大规模高质量数据集和创新方法实现了高效的音视频联合编辑，性能优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型在视频内容编辑上取得突破，但通常忽略了与之配套的音频，导致输出结果中音频与视频不同步、不协调，难以满足实际应用中对音视频统一编辑的需求。

Method: 作者提出了InstructAV2AV框架，包括：（1）开发了可扩展的数据合成流程，并构建了首个大规模高质量音视频编辑数据集InsAVE-80K；（2）将音视频输入与噪声潜在编码拼接，锚定源内容；（3）提出源-指令门控注意力机制，提升指令遵循与内容保留能力；（4）采用两阶段训练策略，迁移背后的预训练先验。

Result: 经过大量实验，InstructAV2AV在两个评测集上，针对三个方面的11项指标超过了同类最新方法。

Conclusion: InstructAV2AV框架实现了首个基于指令的音视频联合编辑，在可控内容创作方面展现出巨大潜力，是音视频编辑领域的重要突破。

Abstract: Recent diffusion-based methods have achieved impressive progress in video content manipulation. However, they typically ignore the accompanying audio, leaving the audio disjointed from the edited results. In this paper, we propose InstructAV2AV, the first end-to-end framework for instruction-guided audio-video joint editing. We first develop a scalable data synthesis pipeline and construct InsAVE-80K, the first large-scale audio-video editing dataset with high-quality source-to-target pairs. With this data foundation, we adapt an audio-video generation backbone to leverage its robust priors. We concatenate the audio-video input with noisy latent codes to anchor the source context, propose the source-instruction gated attention to improve instruction following and content preservation, and introduce a two-stage training strategy to effectively transfer these pre-trained priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InstructAV2AV outperforms state-of-the-art methods across 11 metrics spanning three aspects on two evaluation sets, highlighting its potential for controllable content creation. Project page: https://hjzheng.net/projects/InstructAV2AV/.

</details>


### [287] [Benchmarking transferability of SSL pretraining to same and different modality segmentation tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18491)
*Jue Jiang,Harini Veeraraghavan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文比较了九种自监督学习（SSL）方法在3D医学影像分割上的表现，发现结合掩码图像建模和自蒸馏的SMIT方法表现最佳，尤其在少样本数据下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学影像分割任务面临标注数据稀缺的问题，自监督学习可通过预训练提升下游分割性能，但缺乏对各类自监督方法（如掩码建模、对比学习、自蒸馏等）效果的系统性对比，尤其是少样本设置下。

Method: 作者使用10,412份3D CT扫描进行九种SSL方法预训练，采用统一的Swin Transformer编码器并结合3D CNN解码器（SwinUNETR架构）对九项公开分割任务（包括CT和MRI的大器官、头颈结构和肿瘤）进行了微调，分析了准确率、转移学习能力以及特征重用模式。

Result: SMIT（掩码图像建模+自蒸馏）在九项任务中取得了最高分割准确率、最快的收敛速度，以及最小的少样本-多样本性能差距。以掩码建模和自蒸馏为基础的方法（如SimMIM，DINO，iBOT）整体优于对比学习和全局判别任务，方法间差异在少样本情景下最大。

Conclusion: 在医学影像分割场景下，SSL方法选择对少样本训练至关重要。其中SMIT类方法更具数据效率，并在多任务、多模态下展现出突出性能。

Abstract: Methods: Nine SSL methods spanning four pretext-task families were pretrained from scratch using the same 10{,}412 3D CT scans (1.89~M 2D axial slices) covering varied disease sites. The pretrained Swin Transformer encoder from each method was integrated into a SwinUNETR-style segmentation network (Swin encoder with a 3D CNN decoder and skip connections) and fine-tuned on nine public segmentation tasks of varying complexity, including large abdominal organs, head-and-neck structures, and tumors from CT and MRI. Performance was assessed using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC). Fine-tuning convergence speed, transferability across modalities (CT-to-MRI), and feature-reuse patterns between few- and many-shot fine tuning were further analyzed using centered kernel alignment.
  Results: Self-distilled masked image transformer (SMIT), which combines masked image modeling (MIM) with local and global self-distillation, achieved the highest overall segmentation accuracy across the nine tasks, the fastest fine-tuning convergence, and the smallest few-shot-to-many-shot performance gap, indicating the strongest data efficiency. SMIT also showed the most consistent feature-reuse patterns between few- and many-shot fine tuning. MIM-based SimMIM and self-distillation methods (DINO, iBOT) outperformed contrastive learning and rotation prediction, which rely on image-level global representations. Differences between SSL methods were largest in the few-shot setting and narrowed as the size of the labeled fine-tuning dataset increased, indicating that the choice of SSL pretraining matters most under limited annotation budgets.

</details>


### [288] [Weakly Supervised Cross-Modal Learning for 4D Radar Scene Flow Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18507)
*Jingyun Fu,Zhiyu Xiang,Na Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的弱监督4D雷达场景流估计算法，仅依赖图像和里程计补充监督，避免了昂贵的激光雷达依赖，取得了超越现有方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往4D雷达场景流估计难以获得真实标注数据，纯自监督方法效果有限，而交叉模态的有监督方法又引入复杂架构且强依赖激光雷达与预训练3D跟踪模型，成本高昂。为此，作者希望摆脱对激光雷达数据的依赖，降低实现难度和成本。
