We present MR-SLAM, a mixed reality (MR) system in which an operator wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset teleoperates three simulated TurtleBot3 robots through a passthrough view with real-world occlusion, while spatially anchored dashboard panels report mapping progress in situ. Each robot runs an independent SLAM Toolbox instance whose occupancy grid is merged in real time on a Robot Operating System 2 (ROS 2) back end. Across five 9-minute evaluation sessions, the system delivered scans at 8.83 +/- 0.16 Hz, mapped 17.9 +/- 0.8 m^2 of merged occupancy, and reached 94.7 +/- 0.5% cross-instance occupancy consistency across robot pairs. An additional session recorded 6.3 ms median transform jitter and 26.7 m^2 coverage of a 41 m^2 grid. We position MR-SLAM as a reference implementation for combining passthrough mixed reality supervision with multi-robot SLAM on consumer hardware.

</details>


### [435] [Hierarchical Two-Stage Framework for Environment-Aware Long-Horizon Vessel Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16442)
*Ganeshaaraj Gnanavel,Tharindu Fernando,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种层次化的两阶段船舶轨迹预测框架，有效结合了粗粒度长周期预测与基于网格细粒度短周期预测，并显著提升了预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际海洋环境下进行长时域船舶轨迹预测对碰撞规避、交通管理和航线规划至关重要，但受限于复杂动态海洋环境和长距离时序依赖，现有方法难以实现高精度预测。

Method: 提出分层两阶段架构：长周期预测分支建模整体航行意图，短周期分支以离散海上网格结合时空图变换器捕捉局域动态，同时搭载集成环境模块，采用跨模态注意力和特征调制自适应感知洋流、风和浪高等要素，最后以可学习Savitzky-Golay平滑层保证轨迹时序连贯。

Result: 在澳大利亚CTS数据和Copernicus海洋产品上，以3小时输入、10小时预测为场景，平均位移误差（ADE）和终点位移误差（FDE）分别较最优现有方法降低25%和17%；消融实验验证了各组件有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架充分结合多尺度预测和动态环境自适应能力，显著提升了真实海洋工况下船舶轨迹长时预测精度，为相关交通管理等应用提供了参考价值。

Abstract: Long-horizon vessel trajectory forecasting under real ocean conditions is critical for collision avoidance, traffic management, and route planning. However, achieving accurate predictions is challenging due to long-range temporal dependencies and dynamic environmental factors such as currents, wind, and waves. To address these issues, we propose a hierarchical two-stage framework that combines a coarse long-term predictor with a grid-aware short-term predictor through a hierarchical fusion mechanism. The short-term branch leverages a Spatio-Temporal Graph Transformer on discretized maritime cells to capture localized dynamics, while the long-term branch encodes overarching navigational intent. An integrated environmental module incorporates oceanographic parameters, including surface currents, wind vectors, and significant wave height, using cross-modal attention and feature-wise modulation for adaptive response to varying sea conditions. Additionally, a learnable Savitzky-Golay smoothing layer enhances temporal coherence in fused trajectories. We evaluate our approach on Australian Craft Tracking System (CTS) data from the North West region, aligned with Copernicus Marine Service products, using a 3-hour input and a 10-hour prediction horizon. Experimental results show that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art by 25% in Average Displacement Error (ADE) and 17% in Final Displacement Error (FDE). Ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

</details>


### [436] [No Plan, Yet Human: A Reactive Robotics Model Predicts Human Planning Failures on a Clinical Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16514)
*Michael Migacev,Vito Mengers,Antonia Köngeter,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文将AICON，一种为机器人操作开发的反应式梯度下降框架，应用到伦敦塔（Tower of London）测试，分析其对人类序列规划难度的预测和模型能力。发现AICON能更好地拟合规划能力受限个体在任务中的表现，揭示生物系统在规划受限时会更依赖反应模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往规划难度的研究多关注总体表现，缺乏对个体失败方式和具体难题排序的深入解释；尤其需要模型能解释在认知受损（如帕金森、认知障碍、卒中）时的表现差异。

Method: 用AICON模型（无需前瞻规划和人类认知知识）对伦敦塔24个问题、不同人群（健康vs.规划能力受损）数据进行拟合与泛化测试，并与传统规划基线模型对比。

Result: AICON能比结构性任务参数更好地重现细致的人类难度排序，在leave-two-out测试中对新问题有较好泛化。对健康人群，规划基线拟合更优；而对规划能力受限群体，AICON的拟合和预测更准确。

Conclusion: AICON模型的失败模式非常接近帕金森患者等规划受限群体，且能够跨领域（机器人、知觉、眼动与序列规划）捕捉生物行为本质，说明其核心抽象可能反映了生物系统真实的组织模式。

Abstract: Understanding why some sequential planning problems are harder than others requires models that go beyond average performance. They should capture the specific pattern of which problems are hard, and ideally fail in the same way people do when planning capacity is reduced. We apply AICON, a reactive gradient-descent framework developed for robotic manipulation, to the Tower of London test, a cognitive test used to assess planning in Parkinson's disease, mild cognitive impairment, and stroke. Without any lookahead planning or knowledge of human cognition, AICON reproduces the fine-grained human difficulty ordering across 24 problems better than structural task parameters and generalizes to held-out problems in a leave-two-out evaluation. Crucially, AICON outperforms a planning baseline for groups with reduced planning capacity while the planning baseline better captures healthy controls. This dissociation was predicted by the original AICON paper, which noted that the model's failure modes resemble those of Parkinson's patients who struggle with goal hierarchies but not move counts. This suggests that as planning capacity is reduced, human behavior shifts toward the reactive mode AICON models. The finding extends a broader pattern: AICON, originally built for robotics, now captures aspects of biological behavior across perception, eye movements, and sequential planning, suggesting its core abstraction reflects something real about how biological systems are organized.

</details>


### [437] [A Mechanistic Model for Collective Motion from Sensorimotor Regularities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16522)
*Vito Mengers,Bao Duc Cao,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于传感-运动机制的新集体行为模型，将动物群体行为建立在个体实际可感知和执行的基础之上，能够在无特定相互作用力设定的情况下重现多种集体行为现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自驱动粒子模型虽然能描述动物群体现象，但未能解释具体的行为产生机制。最新实验证据发现真实动物（如蝗虫）并非简单对邻近个体对齐，而是受感知和认知机制调控，因此需要一个以个体感知能力为基础的机械性模型。

Method: 采用机器人领域的建模框架，每个个体仅通过视野内的方位和视尺寸线索感知他者，在内部保持对状态的不确定估计，通过梯度下降法调节社交距离来选择行动，无需人为设定交互力。

Result: 该模型无需事先设定特定交互力，即可自发产生高度多样的群体行为模式，如极化运动、环形、亚群分裂等。全局灵敏度分析显示，行为转变主要由传感-运动参数（如视野、感知噪声、转向敏捷性、记忆等）驱动。

Conclusion: 群体行为实际上是多个个体传感-运动规律相互作用的涌现结果，不同物种间的行为差异则可归因于其具体身体结构和环境条件的不同。

Abstract: Collective behavior in animals has long been modeled through self-propelled particle models, which reproduce striking group-level phenomena through abstract interaction forces. Yet these models are fundamentally descriptive: they leave open the question of how collective behavior is actually produced. Recent empirical work makes this gap concrete: locusts do not align with neighbors, sensory and cognitive mechanisms mediate interaction instead. A mechanistic model must therefore operate at the sensorimotor level, grounded in what individual organisms can actually perceive, estimate, and physically execute. We present such a model based on a modeling framework from robotics, extended here to collective motion. Each agent perceives neighbors through bearing and apparent-size cues within a limited field of view, maintains uncertain internal state estimates, and selects actions through gradient descent on a desired social distance -- without any prescribed interaction forces. This simple model produces diverse collective behaviors including polarized motion, milling, ring formations, and subgroup fragmentation. A global sensitivity analysis shows that behavioral transitions are governed by sensorimotor parameters corresponding to measurable biological quantities: field of view geometry, sensory noise, turning agility, and memory. Collective behavior can therefore be understood as the emergent outcome of interacting sensorimotor regularities, and differences across species as the emergent outcome of differences in embodiment and environment.

</details>


### [438] [Nori Bot: A Sub-$1,000 Floor-to-Counter Mobile Manipulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16537)
*Antonio Li,Sungjoon Park,Wen Ni Chew*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Nori Bot，一个造价低廉且功能完善的开源双臂移动机械臂平台，解决了现有低价机械臂的主要局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前市面上价格低于1000美元的移动机械臂平台普遍存在工作空间高度固定、只能反应式控制以及在异常情况易损坏伺服电机的缺陷，严重限制了其在诸多实际应用场景中的可靠性和适用性。作者希望通过设计改进，克服这些障碍，推动低成本机器人技术的发展与普及。

Method: Nori Bot通过三项技术创新解决上述问题：（1）在现有伺服总线上新增600mm的Z轴升降，实现从地板到台面的作业空间延展；（2）利用Raspberry Pi 4与OpenClaw主动智能运行环境，实现基于cron任务与事件钩子的自主物理任务；（3）开发无传感器的握力反馈安全软件堆栈，通过电机电流监控软TPU机械手指，从而避免伺服电机烧毁。配套代码、CAD图纸以及技能清单将全部开源。

Result: Nori Bot以947美元的成本实现了17自由度的双臂移动机械臂，功能和可靠性大幅提升，相比商品级设备成本仅为其3%。有效克服了低价平台的高度、控制能力与安全性短板。

Conclusion: Nori Bot展现了在低成本条件下实现高自由度、灵活性和可靠性的可能，为开源移动机械臂的落地和普及提供了切实可行的方案，并将推动相关研究和应用的进一步发展。

Abstract: Open-source mobile manipulators have reached $660 (XLeRobot) but every sub-$1,000 platform shares three limitations: a fixed-height workspace, reactive-only control, and no protection against the stall-induced burn-out that destroys cheap Feetech servos. We present Nori Bot, a 17-DoF dual-arm mobile manipulator at $947 (~3% the cost of comparable commercial platforms) that addresses all three: (1) a 600mm Z-axis lift on the existing servo bus for floor-to-counter reach; (2) a thin-client Raspberry Pi 4 paired with the OpenClaw proactive agent runtime so cron jobs and hooks trigger physical tasks autonomously; and (3) a software safety stack with sensorless grip-force feedback via motor current on a soft TPU finger. Code, CAD, and the skill manifest will be released.

</details>


### [439] [Policy Library CBF: Finite-Horizon Safety at Runtime via Parallel Rollouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16588)
*Taekyung Kim,Hideki Okamoto,Bardh Hoxha,Georgios Fainekos,Dimitra Panagou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的运行时安全过滤方法——PL-CBF，能在复杂环境和变化条件下对多个备选策略并行评估，选择最安全且对当前任务影响最小的安全模式，并通过求解二次规划最小化对系统原有策略的修改。实验结果显示，其安全覆盖性优于传统单策略过滤，同时保持高效率运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非结构化环境下实现安全自主行为难度极高，尤其是面对不断变化的系统约束时，难以在线证明系统安全。传统安全过滤方法主要依赖单一备用策略，存在安全覆盖不足、难以适应复杂情况的问题。

Method: 提出Policy Library Control Barrier Function（PL-CBF）方法，核心在于在运行时对一组策略库中的多种备用策略，通过有限时域回滚模拟并行评价，选择最不干扰当前策略的安全模式，并用二次规划对原策略进行最小扰动确保安全。理论分析通过有限时域语言度量，刻画了策略库的“覆盖性”与有限时域安全性认证之间的关系。

Result: 在多个物理仿真场景（平面双积分器、高速公路驾驶、3D四旋翼避障）中，PL-CBF实现了更高的安全覆盖率，同时运行速度达毫秒级，明显优于只依赖单一安全策略的传统方法。

Conclusion: PL-CBF能够更好地适应非结构化、动态变化的环境，提升了系统的安全性和灵活性，理论分析和实验仿真均证明该方法在效率和安全可靠性上的优势。

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomy in unstructured environments poses significant challenges for online safety certification under evolving constraints. We propose Policy Library Control Barrier Function~(PL-CBF), a runtime safety filter that evaluates a library of fallback policies via parallel finite-horizon rollouts, selects the least invasive safe mode, and enforces safety by solving a quadratic program that minimally modifies a nominal policy. We provide a theoretical analysis based on a finite-horizon language metric over closed-loop behaviors, characterizing policy-library coverage requirements for certifying finite-horizon safety. Simulations on a planar double-integrator (4 states), highway driving with abrupt friction changes using a realistic nonlinear vehicle model (8 states), and 3D quadrotor navigation in crowded dynamic environments (12 states) demonstrate improved safety coverage over single-policy safety filters while retaining millisecond-level runtime.

</details>


### [440] [Bayesian Networks for Path-Based Sensors: Gathering Information and Path Planning in Communication Denied Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16673)
*Alkesh K. Srivastava,George P. Kontoudis,Donald Sofge,Michael Otte*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于路径的传感器观测下，利用贝叶斯网络更新空间信念图的方法，并通过信息增益优化路径规划，在有通信障碍的环境中检测静态危险，实验表明新方法相比以往能更快收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于路径的传感器仅能得到沿路径是否发生事件的信息，难以定位具体事件位置。多个传感器观测可融合形成空间信念图，但过去方法对后验概率的估计较粗略，限制了精度和收敛速度。提升更新方法和路径规划效率在危险检测等现实问题中具有重要意义。

Method: 论文提出用贝叶斯网络（BN）描述潜在空间事件与传感器读数之间的概率关系，实现更严谨的贝叶斯信念更新。然后基于香农信息理论设计路径，以最大化信息增益，提升信念图的收敛速度。实验设置为通信受限下的静态危险检测，包括单机器人和多机器人情形，考虑了传感器的假正例和假负例。

Result: 新提出的贝叶斯网络方法相较于经典方法（如事件历史平均近似），在单机器人和多机器人环境下均实现了信念图的更快收敛。

Conclusion: 本文创新性地利用贝叶斯网络提升了基于路径传感器的信念更新方法，并通过优化路径规划加速空间危险检测，在假设和实际场景实验中均取得了优于传统方法的效果。

Abstract: A "path-based sensor" produces a single observation along a continuous path. For example, a boolean path-based sensor returns a single "1" if an event of interest is detected at any point along the path and a "0" otherwise. Notably, a "1" provides no direct information about where along the path the event(s) may have occurred. Previous work has demonstrated that observations from multiple path-based sensors can be fused to create a Bayesian belief map over the spatial locations of the underlying event or phenomenon. Moreover, path planning can employ Shannon information theory to accelerate the rate of convergence of the belief map. In this paper, we present a new method to update the belief map based on a path-based sensor observation, and then plan paths to increase information gain. In contrast to prior work that approximates the posterior by averaging over the alternative event histories, we introduce a Bayesian Network (BN) formulation that models the probabilistic relationships between the latent variables and path-based sensor measurements, enabling a more principled Bayesian belief update. We consider static hazard detection in a communication-denied environment as a representative problem setting. The event of a robot returning from its path corresponds to a path-based hazard sensor reading of "0" (hazard not detected), while a robot failing to return corresponds to a reading of "1" (hazard detected). We consider false positives and false negatives. We find that the new method leads to quicker convergence of the belief map than prior work in both single- and multi-robot cases.

</details>


### [441] [DriveSafer: End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Safety Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16737)
*Shounak Sural,Raj Rajkumar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了DriveSafer框架，通过训练和推理阶段的安全约束，大幅减少了E2E自动驾驶模型在关键场景中的灾难性失误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成式端到端自动驾驶模型虽然整体性能提升显著，但在安全关键场景下仍频繁出现物理和安全约束违规，导致灾难性失误，因此迫切需要一个专注于安全性的改进方案。

Method: 提出DriveSafer框架，在训练期间引入安全约束，在推理期间实施安全引导，从模型本身增强对安全行为的偏好，减少极端失误发生。

Result: DriveSafer在NAVSIM基准上将灾难性失误数量（PDMS=0）下降了48%，可行驶区域违规下降了65%以上，显著优于主流DiffusionDrive模型。

Conclusion: DriveSafer有效提升了E2E自动驾驶模型的安全性，为端到端规划在真实应用中的普及奠定了基础，安全性提升比平均性能提升更重要。

Abstract: End-to-End (E2E) autonomous driving models have shown growing capability in recent years, with performance improving on increasingly challenging benchmarks. However, modern generative E2E planners still suffer from a substantial number of catastrophic failures in safety-critical scenarios. We find that many such failures arise from violations of physical constraints and safety requirements, leading to unsafe behavior. Motivated by this finding, in this paper, we focus on improving safety outcomes in generative end-to-end driving with a targeted reduction of catastrophic planning failures, instead of enhancing average planning quality. Towards this end, we propose DriveSafer, a failure-aware safety framework for end-to-end planners. DriveSafer explicitly steers generative planners towards safe behaviors leveraging both training-time safety constraints and inference-time safety guidance. Compared to the state-of-the-art DiffusionDrive model, on the NAVSIM benchmark, DriveSafer reduces the number of catastrophic failures (PDMS=0) by 48%, with over 65% reduction in drivable-area compliance failures.

</details>


### [442] [LACE: Latent Visual Representation for Cross-Embodiment Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16743)
*Yoo Sung Jang,Kanchana Ranasinghe,Cristina Mata,Yichi Zhang,Jorge Mendez-Mendez,Michael S. Ryoo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为LACE的新框架，实现了人类到机器人演示的跨形体学习，有效解决视觉表征不一致的问题。该方法仅需一次机器人演示，通过基于对应身体部位的稀疏监督，在视觉特征空间对齐人类与机器人，从而大幅提升了机器人的学习和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人与机器人在形体和外观上的差异导致它们的视觉特征空间存在显著差距，这使得从人类演示中“移植”学习到机器人变得十分困难。目前常用的自监督学习（SSL）骨干虽能编码丰富语义，但难以对齐人手与机器人手的对应关系，限制了人类数据在机器人领域的利用。

Method: 提出LACE框架：通过人体与机器人间“共享身体部位”的稀疏对应关系，利用自动化的正向运动学自动生成标注，在自监督特征空间中通过语义对齐损失和Gram损失实现特征分布对齐。整个过程只需一个机器人的演示，减小了机器人数据的获取难度。

Result: 在零样本迁移和低数据量场景下，采用LACE-DINO的策略性能显著优于直接采用DINO，自由度提升高达65%；在分布外测试和低数据情境下均保持稳定优势。

Conclusion: LACE方法有效缩小了跨形体视觉表征的差距，实现了人类丰富演示数据向机器人高效迁移，尤其适用于机器人数据稀缺的应用场景。

Abstract: Cross-embodiment learning from human demonstrations is hindered by the visual gap between human and robot embodiments. While self-supervised learning (SSL) backbones encode rich inter-class semantics of general objects, we show they fail to establish correspondence between human and robot hands. We propose LACE, a framework that aligns human and robot visual representations in the latent space of these backbones by leveraging correspondences between shared body parts across embodiments as sparse supervision. These annotations can be automatically obtained via forward kinematics, and single robot demonstration is sufficient to train the model. Our semantic alignment loss matches distributions incurred by corresponding features, lifting patch-level supervision to semantic-level alignment, while a Gram loss preserves pretrained feature quality. This alignment enables robot policies to leverage abundant human data when robot demonstrations are scarce: in zero-shot transfer, policies using LACE-DINO outperform those using DINO by a large margin (65\%), with consistent gains in low-data regimes and out-of-distribution environments.

</details>


### [443] ["I'm Not Mad, Just Focused'': Understanding Human Emotions in Human-Robot Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16816)
*Seung Chan Hong,Dana Kulić,Leimin Tian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉-语言模型（VLM）的情绪识别系统，用于提升人机协作中机器人对人类情绪的理解能力，并在用户研究中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机协作中的情绪识别模型多依赖作假数据集和单一模态（如面部表情），导致准确性和实用性不足，亟需更贴近真实场景、能综合多种输入进行情绪理解的新方法。

Method: 作者提出并实现了VLM-ER系统，利用视觉-语言模型对人类情绪进行语境化理解。首先在现有HRC数据集上，通过与人工标注的语义和情感相似度进行评估；随后，在用户参与的机器人协作任务中，观察情绪驱动机器人行为对体验的影响。

Result: VLM-ER系统在语义相似度和情感一致性方面均优于传统卷积神经网络（CNN）系统。用户实验中，参与者更倾向于选择基于情绪自适应行为的机器人。

Conclusion: 基于VLM的情绪识别系统可有效提升机器人对人类情绪的理解，并显著增强人机协作体验，有望应用于实际交互场景。

Abstract: Human-robot collaboration (HRC) can benefit from robots' abilities to interpret human emotional states. However, current emotion recognition (ER) models in HRC often fall short, particularly due to their reliance on acted datasets and single-modality inputs like facial expressions. We propose a novel vision language model (VLM)-based ER system that leverages contextual understanding to improve emotion interpretation in HRC. We first evaluate the VLM-ER system by assessing its semantic and sentiment similarity with human annotations on an existing HRC dataset. Then, in a user study with a service robot in a collaborative delivery task, we evaluate the effects of modulating the robot's behaviour based on the user's emotional state inferred by the VLM-ER system. The results show that the proposed VLM-ER system achieves higher semantic similarity and positive sentiment alignment with human annotations compared to a baseline convolutional neural network-based system. Further, participants in the user study preferred emotion-adaptive robot behaviour facilitated by the VLM-ER system.

</details>


### [444] [Pedestrian-Aware LLM-Driven Behavioral Planning for Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16858)
*Aidana Baimbetova,Haruki Yonekura,Hamada Rizk,Hirozumi Yamaguchi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动驾驶车辆行驶决策系统，以改善在复杂城市环境下与行人交互时的鲁棒性与安全性，取得了显著优于深度强化学习模型的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的自动驾驶系统在面对不可预测的行人行为及训练未见场景时泛化能力弱，且依赖手工奖励与决策不透明，不适合安全要求高、行人密集的城市道路。

Method: 将场景观测数据结构化为自然语言提示，通过LLM推理行人意图和环境风险，并输出安全行驶决策，再由运动规划器执行，确保车辆动作平滑且可行。系统在SUMO仿真环境下，被用于多种不同行人交互场景的测试，包括乱穿马路、突然折返、犹豫过街、双向穿行等。

Result: 零样本测试下，LLM驱动的自动驾驶系统碰撞避免成功率为68%，远优于深度强化学习基线（17.7%）；在单行人场景使用少量记忆提示后，成功率提升至96.0%，超越自定义DQN控制器（82.0%）。记忆可迁移至新场景，转移后的成功率分别为82.0%和90.0%。系统响应更加提前、安全裕度更大、决策更具可解释性和人类一致性。

Conclusion: LLM驱动的决策框架显著提升了自动驾驶系统在复杂行人交互情形下的安全性、泛化能力和决策可解释性，为未来自动驾驶车辆安全可靠上路提供了有力的技术基础。

Abstract: Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) must make reliable decisions in dense urban environments where pedestrian behavior is variable, sometimes abnormal, and often unseen during training. Reinforcement learning (RL)-based AV control systems perform well in structured traffic but struggle to generalize to unpredictable pedestrian interactions and out-of-distribution scenarios. Their reliance on handcrafted rewards and opaque decisions further limits their suitability for safety-critical, pedestrian-rich environments. To address these limitations, we introduce a Large Language Model (LLM)-based decision-making framework for pedestrian-aware behavioral planning. The system converts structured scene observations into natural-language reasoning prompts, enabling the LLM to infer pedestrian intent, anticipate risk, and generate cautious tactical driving decisions. These decisions are executed by a motion planner that ensures smooth, kinematically feasible control. We evaluate the framework in SUMO across multiple pedestrian-interaction scenarios, including unexpected jaywalking, turn-back crossing, hesitation, and bidirectional crossing. In zero-shot evaluation, the LLM-based agent achieves a 68% collision-free success rate, substantially outperforming deep RL baselines (17.7%). With few-shot episodic memory in a single-pedestrian scenario, performance increases to 96.0%, exceeding a custom DQN controller (82.0%). Cross-behavior evaluation further shows that memory derived from turn-back interactions transfers to unseen hesitation and bidirectional crossing scenarios, achieving 82.0% and 90.0% success, respectively. The system consistently initiates earlier responses, maintains wider safety buffers, and produces interpretable, human-aligned decisions.

</details>


### [445] [Plan First, Diffuse Later: Extrinsic Graph Guidance for Long-Horizon Diffusion Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16863)
*Yaniv Hassidof,Adir Morgan,Yilun Du,Kiril Solovey*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种结合外部搜索的扩散模型（XDiffuser），实现了更高效且全球一致性更强的长时序规划。该方法通过先在状态空间图上生成计划，再引导扩散过程，有效提升了解决复杂任务的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复合扩散模型通过对多个子轨迹去噪来实现长时序规划，但仅依靠局部约束难以保证最终产生全局一致的解。最新方法（例如intrinsic search）虽然提高了全局结构，但计算成本较高。本文旨在设计一种效率更高、泛用性更强的探索方式，满足复杂任务需求。

Method: 作者提出eXtrinsic search-guided Diffuser (XDiffuser)方法：先在状态空间图上通过经典算法规划路径，作为扩散模型的轻量连接先验，该计划作为引导信息参与去噪过程，减轻模型探索压力，实现单条轨迹的高效规划。

Result: XDiffuser在多项长时序任务上超越了现有扩散模型基线，在低质量数据和未见任务（如多智能体协作、旅行商问题等）上表现尤为出色。

Conclusion: 将外部搜索与扩散模型融合能显著提升长时序规划的性能和泛化能力，尤其适用于计算资源有限和任务类型多样的实际场景。

Abstract: Compositional diffusion models offer a promising route to long-horizon planning by denoising multiple overlapping sub-trajectories while ensuring that together they constitute a global solution. However, enforcing local behavior over long chains is often insufficient for a coherent global structure to emerge. Recent works tackle this limitation through intrinsic search, which explores multiple paths during the denoising process. While intrinsic search improves global coherence, it comes at the cost of repeated evaluations of an already compute-heavy model. In this work, we argue that extrinsic search, performed outside the denoising process, offers a more effective mode of exploration for long-horizon planning while naturally enabling the use of classical algorithms to solve unseen combinatorial tasks at test time. Our eXtrinsic search-guided Diffuser (XDiffuser) first computes a plan over a state-space graph -- serving as a lightweight local connectivity oracle for the diffusion model. The plan is then used to guide denoising for a single trajectory, effectively offloading the burden of exploration. XDiffuser outperforms diffusion-based baselines on long-horizon tasks, with particularly large gains in the low-quality data regime and on unseen tasks beyond goal-reaching, including multi-agent coordination and TSP-style reasoning. Project website: https://yanivhass.github.io/XDiffuser-site/

</details>


### [446] [SSTL: Self-Sensing Tendon Loop for Hysteresis Modeling and Compensation in Tendon-Sheath Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16870)
*Myeongbo Park,Junhyun Park,Ihsan Ullah,Chunggil An,Minho Hwang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自感知腱环（SSTL）结构，通过在内窥插入管内设双通道腱环，不依赖远端传感器实现驱动与输出张力的近端感知，并以学习方法补偿腱鞘机构的迟滞误差，大幅提升了控制精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔性内窥机器人利用腱鞘机构进行远程操作，但因摩擦与弹性导致输入与输出间存在随姿态变化的迟滞误差，限制了精准控制。本研究旨在无需复杂或高昂的远端传感手段，开发简便有效的迟滞补偿方案。

Method: 设计一种双通道自感知腱环（SSTL），通过近端同时感知输入与输出张力，捕捉迟滞变化。基于此张力曲线，建立学习映射推算腱鞘机构的迟滞参数，再用前馈控制进行误差补偿，大幅降低控制误差。

Result: 在三种插入管姿态下，针对正弦和随机轨迹，SSTL方法能使平均张力追踪RMSE较未补偿基线下降88.1%，补偿效果达直接测量方案的97.8%。

Conclusion: SSTL结构实现了无需远端传感器的近端迟滞识别与补偿，可显著提升柔性内窥机器人腱鞘机构的控制精度，具有实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Flexible endoscopic robots enable minimally invasive access through natural orifices, but their control accuracy is limited by configuration-dependent hysteresis in the tendon-sheath mechanisms (TSMs). Tendon-sheath friction and tendon elasticity induce a systematic discrepancy between the proximal actuation input and distal output, and this discrepancy varies with the insertion tube configuration. To address this challenge, this paper proposes the Self-Sensing Tendon Loop (SSTL), a double-pass tendon loop routed through the insertion tube and wrapped around a distal pulley, and returned to the proximal end. The loop structure allows both the input and output tensions of the SSTL to be measured proximally, thereby providing an input-output tension profile without requiring distal force or fiber-optic sensors. Because the SSTL shares the same routing path as the actuation TSM, the two TSMs exhibit strongly correlated hysteresis behaviors. From the SSTL tension profile, a learning-based mapping estimates the configuration-dependent hysteresis parameters of the actuation TSM, which are then used by a feedforward controller to compensate for actuation hysteresis. We validate the proposed method by tracking actuation tendon tension under three different insertion tube configurations. Across sinusoidal and random trajectories, the proposed method reduces average RMSE by 88.1% compared with the uncompensated baseline, achieving 97.8% of the performance of direct identification, which requires direct measurement of the input and output tension profile of the actuation TSM.

</details>


### [447] [SADP: Subgoal-Aware Diffusion Policy for Explainable Robots Learned from Foundation Model Generated Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16871)
*Site Hu,Takato Horii*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为SADP的子目标感知扩散策略，通过融合基础模型生成子目标标注演示，实现了机器人任务执行过程的可解释性，并兼顾高任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人模仿学习方法多只关注任务级别的演示，缺乏对子目标结构和执行进展的建模，且现有数据集通常缺乏子目标级监督，导致机器人难以在任务执行过程中向用户解释当前所进行的子任务。

Method: 提出Subgoal-Aware Diffusion Policy（SADP）方法：1) 利用基础模型自动生成带子目标注释的数据集；2) 训练扩散策略以同时结合任务及子目标描述生成动作；3) 设计轻量辅助头预测子目标完成状态，支持机器人实时展示当前所处执行阶段。

Result: 在RLBench仿真环境和实际机器人（UR5e）测试中，SADP在任务成功率上超过了主流任务条件扩散基线模型，同时能够对执行进展提供子目标级别的信号，有效支持任务进展监测与失败诊断。

Conclusion: 实验表明，将可解释性直接内置到策略中（而非事后分析），可以在不牺牲执行性能的前提下，显著提升机器人子目标级任务可解释性并便于监控。

Abstract: Explainable robots require not only successful task execution but also the ability to expose internal decision-making process in a user-friendly manner. However, most imitation learning methods are trained solely on task-level demonstrations, without explicitly modeling subgoal structure or execution progress. This limitation is further exacerbated by the scarcity of subgoal-level supervision in standard robot learning datasets, which restricts the development of robots that can convey the subtasks they are executing during long-horizon manipulation. To address this issue, this paper proposes Subgoal-Aware Diffusion Policy (SADP), a framework that leverages foundation models to autonomously generate subgoal-annotated demonstrations and trains diffusion policies on these datasets. SADP structures policy execution around human-interpretable subgoals by conditioning action generation on both task-level and subgoal-level descriptions. A lightweight auxiliary head further predicts subgoal completion states, allowing the robot to expose its current execution stage and monitor subgoal progression. Experiments in RLBench simulations and real-world evaluations on a UR5e robot demonstrate that SADP achieves higher task success rates than strong task-conditioned diffusion baselines, while providing subgoal-level execution signals for monitoring progress and diagnosing failures. These results highlight that built-in, rather than post-hoc, interpretability can coexist with high task performance.

</details>


### [448] [Beyond Safety Filtering: Control Barrier Function-Informed Reinforcement Learning for Connected and Automated Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16894)
*Jianye Xu,Bassam Alrifaee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于控制屏障函数（CBF）的多智能体强化学习（MARL）奖励设计方法，使得奖励信号可直接反映安全约束，有效提升学习效果，并在自动驾驶场景下优于传统启发式奖励。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习通常依赖手工设计的奖励函数，而这些奖励函数往往难以调优，尤其在涉及安全约束的应用领域（如自动驾驶）时，现有方法难以确保学习过程的安全性和有效性。

Method: 作者提出了将控制屏障函数（CBF）的约束值转化为奖励信号的新方法，结合多智能体强化学习，在多车道交叉路口控制问题上进行实验，并与两种主流启发式奖励方法做比较。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在自动驾驶多车协同场景（四路多车道交叉口）下表现出更高的任务完成度，并且对于奖励超参数的不敏感性较好，性能表现更稳定。

Conclusion: CBF指导的奖励设计为多智能体强化学习提供了一种更为有效且稳定的安全学习途径，相比传统手工启发式奖励具有优势，提升了安全约束下的任务性能和实际应用可行性。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) uses rewards to guide learning, yet reward design is typically hand-crafted using heuristics that can be difficult to tune. We propose a Control Barrier Function (CBF)-informed reward design for Multi-Agent RL (MARL) that converts CBF constraint values under joint MARL actions into a reward signal that explicitly guides safe learning. We compare against two heuristic reward baselines in a four-way multi-lane intersection with connected and automated vehicles. Results show that our method achieves the highest task performance and is less sensitive to reward hyperparameters, yielding consistently strong performance across the tested hyperparameter range. Code for reproducing the experimental results and a video demonstration are available at https://github.com/bassamlab/SigmaRL.

</details>


### [449] [MORN: Metacognitive Object-Goal Regulation for Resource-Rational Long-Horizon Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16932)
*Xi Lin,Jiayi Li,Kangyi Wu,Jiaqiao Tang,Qingrong He,Lin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型导航架构MORN，通过元认知调节资源消耗，有效提高机器人在长任务下的目标完成率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前ObjectNav智能体虽然借助视觉-语言模型可以定位语义目标，但缺乏对全局资源（如时间、电量等）的感知和理性分配，容易在无法完成的子目标上浪费大量资源，从而影响任务整体完成率。亟需一种机制注入任务调度的“资源理性”。

Method: 设计了MORN架构，借鉴认知科学中的双系统理论，引入System 2元控制器对System 1的执行过程进行持续监控。提出潜能指数、坚持门控、证据累积三种神经认知状态，根据实时任务进展和感知不确定性动态调整任务计划，能及时放弃不可达目标（规避沉没成本谬误），专注于可达目标。

Result: 在HM3D数据集上，MORN将目标完成率从0.23提升至0.30，浪费步长比例从0.90降至0.70。

Conclusion: 元认知的资源感知对于约束资源下的自主体任务执行至关重要，可显著提升复杂环境下机器人的任务成功率和效率。

Abstract: Robots deployed in unstructured human environments must frequently execute long-horizon missions, such as find the mug, then the chair, then the printer, under strict operational constraints. While contemporary zero-shot Object Navigation (ObjectNav) agents leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to effectively localize semantic targets, they operate as purely reactive systems that inherently lack global resource awareness. Consequently, these agents inadvertently exhaust critical budgets, including time and battery, on infeasible subgoals due to partial observability, failing to balance local exploration with global mission viability. To bridge this gap by injecting resource-rationality into the navigation loop, we present MORN (Metacognitive Object-goal Regulation Navigation), an executive architecture inspired by Dual-Process Theory in cognitive science. MORN augments frozen navigation backbones with a System 2 meta-controller that continuously monitors the System 1 locomotor. By formalizing three neuro-cognitive states, Potentiality Index, Persistence Gating, and Evidence Accumulation, MORN dynamically regulates the mission schedule based on online estimates of progress velocity and perceptual uncertainty. This mechanism effectively neutralizes the Sunk Cost Fallacy, enabling agents to abort zombie goals early and decisively commit to achievable ones. Extensive experiments on the HM3D dataset demonstrate that MORN improves Goal Completion Rate (CR) from 0.23 to 0.30 and reduces Wasted Step Fraction (WSF) from 0.90 to 0.70, establishing that in resource-constrained autonomy, the metacognitive awareness of global resources is as critical as the reactive ability to navigate.

</details>


### [450] [NORM-Nav: Zero-Shot Mobile Robot Navigation with Natural Language Behavioral Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16979)
*Dongjie Huo,Junhui Wang,Chao Gao,Yan Qiao,Dong Zhang,Guyue Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新方法NORM-Nav，可让移动机器人直接理解和执行自然语言中的社会行为约束，提升了机器人在人类环境中的导航表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于costmap的导航方法只关注避障和路径几何可行性，容易忽视社会行为规范，导致机器人在实际应用中可能出现不合适的社交行为。

Method: 提出NORM-Nav框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）将自然语言指令解析为结构化的行为约束，并结合实时视觉和激光雷达感知将其落地，这些约束被编码为多层costmap（包括几何、语义、方向和速度信息），能够直接融入标准的网格规划器。

Result: 仿真和真实环境实验表明，NORM-Nav在任务完成率和轨迹的人类相似性方面均优于典型基线方法。

Conclusion: NORM-Nav能够更好地让机器人遵守人类社会的行为规范，为在以人为中心的环境中部署机器人提供了更佳的解决方案。

Abstract: Mobile robots operating in human-centered environments must generate not only collision-free paths but also trajectories that follow local behavioral conventions. Conventional costmap-based navigation emphasizes geometric feasibility and often overlooks such requirements, which can result in socially inappropriate behaviors. This paper presents NORM-Nav, a zero-shot framework that integrates natural language behavioral constraints into costmap-based planning. An LLM parses each instruction into structured constraints and grounds them using real-time vision--LiDAR perception. These constraints are encoded as multi-layer costmaps that represent geometric, semantic, directional, and velocity cues and are directly compatible with standard grid-based planners. Simulation and real-world experiments indicate that NORM-Nav improves task success rates and produces trajectories closer to human references than representative baselines. The project website is available at https://ei-nav.github.io/NORM-Nav.

</details>


### [451] [Generalizable and Actionable Parts Pose Estimation with Symmetry Annotation-Free Learning Strategy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17033)
*Wenxiao Chen,Xueyu Yuan,Liu Liu,Di Wu,Dan Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需额外对称性标注的新方法SAFAG，用于提升跨类别的部件姿态估计精度，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前高质量的机器人物体交互需求迫切，跨类别物体感知变得重要，但现有方法在对称性处理上存在设计不足或依赖大量标注，阻碍了泛化能力，尤其在数据缺乏时问题突出。

Method: 提出SAFAG框架，包括两阶段的候选到最终四元数回归流程，并将对称性预测视为概率分布学习，同时采用自监督学习策略避免对对称性标注的依赖。

Result: 实验结果显示SAFAG具有优越性能和鲁棒性，能在跨类别部件姿态估计任务中优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SAFAG为提升具身智能系统的通用性和动作部分理解带来巨大应用潜力，尤其适合数据稀缺的实际环境。

Abstract: Urgently needed generalizable robot object interaction and manipulation requires high-quality Cross-Category object perception. As a pioneer of this area, Generalizable and Actionable Parts (GAParts) understanding has attracted increasing attention from relevant researchers. However, most recent works either have insufficient design regarding the symmetry issue or require rich symmetry annotation, which severely impedes precise GAPart pose estimation in data-lacking scenarios. In this paper, we propose SAFAG, a novel Symmetry Annotation-Free framework for Generalizable and Actionable Parts Pose Estimation. Specifically, we suggest a stepwise refinement two-stage framework for candidate-to-final quaternion regression, and tackle the symmetry prediction as a probability distribution problem with self-supervised learning strategy. The experimental results demonstrate the superior performance and robustness of our SAFAG. We believe that our work has the enormous potential to be applied in many areas of embodied AI system.

</details>


### [452] [How to Instruct Your Robot: Dense Language Annotations Power Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17077)
*Bosung Kim,Ruiyi Wang,David Acuna,Jaehun Jung,Alexander Trevithick,Brandon Cui,Yejin Choi,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用密集多方面语言标注（DeMiAn）提升机器人策略学习效率的方法，通过自动为已有演示数据生成多维语言注释，无需额外收集新演示，即可显著提升机器人学习表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人策略学习受限于高昂的示范数据采集成本，而语言标注相对廉价。因此，作者希望利用密集语言标注，从既有的机器人或自我视角视频数据集中挖掘更多监督信号，从而扩展学习的能力。

Method: 提出DeMiAn方法，分为两阶段：第一阶段，用视觉-语言模型（VLM）为演示片段自动生成四个互补维度的注释（物理动作、场景构成、机械臂姿态、推理）；第二阶段训练“导师”模型，在实际部署时，将任务描述和初始场景快照映射到合适注释，该过程与策略执行并行，以隐藏生成延迟。

Result: 在超过100万条机器人操作片段和5万条人类自我视角视频上，DeMiAn显著提升了视觉-语言-动作策略和基于视频的世界-动作模型表现。在RoboCasa环境中，导师模型较单纯任务基线提升成功率5个百分点，接近单任务标注上限。不同标注维度对不同任务效果不同，显示选择合适的密集注释至关重要。此外，该方法还增强了复合任务和分布外任务表现，并且在考虑注释生成算力消耗后提高了训练和后训练期的性价比。

Conclusion: 密集语言重标注是促进机器人策略学习实用扩展的重要手段，无需新数据即可显著提升模型泛化、性能和学习效率，为规模化机器人学习提供了新的途径。

Abstract: Scaling robot policy learning is bottlenecked by the cost of collecting demonstrations, while language annotations for existing demonstrations are comparatively cheap. We study language density as a lever for extracting more signal from a fixed robot or egocentric-video corpus. We introduce DeMiAn (Dense Multi-aspect Annotation), a two-stage approach that first re-labels demonstration segments with VLM-generated annotations along four complementary aspects: physical motion, scene composition, arm pose, and reasoning. A learned instructor then maps a task description and initial scene snapshot to a task-appropriate annotation at deployment, running asynchronously so generation latency is hidden behind policy execution. Across over 1M robot manipulation clips and 50K EgoVerse human-egocentric videos, DeMiAn improves both a vision-language-action policy and a video-based world-action model without collecting new demonstrations. On RoboCasa, the instructor raises success by 5 points over a task-only baseline and comes within 3 points of a per-task oracle. No fixed annotation aspect dominates across tasks, showing that selecting the right dense language matters. DeMiAn also improves composite-task and out-of-distribution performance, and shifts the compute-performance frontier in both mid-training and post-training after accounting for annotation-generation FLOPs. These results position dense re-annotation as a practical scaling lever for robot policy learning.

</details>


### [453] [Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST): Unlocking Vision-Language-Action Models through Hidden States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17144)
*Miranda Muqing Miao,Subin Kim,Brandon Yang,Lyle Ungar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: COAST提出了一种无需额外训练的引导机制，通过识别和利用VLA潜在空间中的“成功”子空间，大幅提升机器人的任务完成率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型虽具备强大的感知与语言表征能力，但实际中在简单机器人任务仍表现脆弱，缺乏对成功关键特征的有效利用。

Method: COAST基于conceptor理论，分析少量任务成功与失败样本，找出代表成功的潜在空间子空间。在推理阶段，将VLA潜变量引导（steer）到这些子空间，从而提升任务执行效果。无需重新训练，适用于不同神经网络策略和任务。

Result: 在三种不同架构的机器人策略上，COAST使仿真和真实机器人任务成功率分别提升20%和40%以上。实验揭示任务失败的潜在表征有较强通用性，而成功表征更具任务特异性。对具有相似失败模式的新任务，已训练的conceptor可迁移提升效果。

Conclusion: VLA模型的潜变量中蕴含丰富的任务相关信息，通过COAST激活引导，这些潜力可以被高效激发，缓解解码瓶颈，无需训练即可提升多任务机器人性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage powerful perceptual priors from web-scale Vision-Language Model (VLM) pre-training, yet they remain surprisingly brittle in practice, frequently failing at simple robotic tasks. To mitigate this, we propose Contrastive Conceptor Activation Steering (COAST). COAST builds on the notion of a "conceptor", a linear operator that soft-projects data into the principal components of a target distribution. COAST uses conceptors to identify success-critical subspaces for a target robotic task from a few examples of success and failure rollouts. At inference time, it steers VLA latents into these identified success subspaces to improve task outcomes. Across three architecturally distinct neural policies (flow-matching VLA, autoregressive VLA, and Diffusion Policy), COAST improves absolute mean simulation and real-robot task success rate by over 20 and 40% respectively. The activation subspace geometry reveals that failure modes share substantial structure across tasks while success representations remain largely task-specific. When tasks share similar failure modes, this structure enables previously fitted conceptors to improve performance on new tasks without refitting. Ultimately, our results suggest that current VLAs retain substantial task-relevant knowledge in their latent representations, and that the action expert's decoding bottleneck could be mitigated by steering its residual stream toward task-relevant subspaces. COAST provides a lightweight, training-free path to unlocking these latent capabilities by steering the model towards its own "success" distributions.

</details>


### [454] [Event-Grounded Sparse Autoencoders for Vision-Language-Action Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17204)
*Xinchen Jin,Aditya Chatterjee,Pranav Kumar,Rohan Paleja*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于事件的解释性管道，将机器人视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略的特征分析锚定到行为事件中，实现了机器人决策过程的可解释性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLA策略可将语言与视觉输入转换为机器人动作，但由于输出为动作而非可读文本，且干预需通过昂贵的闭环测试，现有的机制可解释性工具难以应用于VLA。为解决VLA解释性难题，作者提出了以行为事件为锚点的分析方法。

Method: 作者通过聚类任务中末端执行器关键帧，结合视觉、状态和时序线索，将SAE（Sparse Autoencoder）特征与关键行为事件相关联，并可选地利用VLM（Vision-Language Model）注释以提升语义解释性。该方法在两种仿真架构和真实机器人中进行验证，通过事件基础排序分析SAE特征与机器人行为之间的因果关系。

Result: 实验表明，基于事件的排序方法在OpenVLA和π_{0.5}的连续动作区间上均取得最强因果效应。SAE作为干预基础表现稀疏但存在局限，其解释性与安全性取决于网络架构及干预位置，过度干预可能带来风险。

Conclusion: 作者的方法为VLA策略的行为锚定可解释性分析提供了现实可行的起点，并指出未来可探索超越动作对齐SAE特征、更细粒度闭环评估及高安全需求下的安全干预。相关代码已开源，有助于后续研究与应用。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies translate language and visual inputs into robot actions, where their hidden representations directly shape closed-loop behavior. However, mechanistic interpretability tools from language and vision-language models do not transfer cleanly to VLAs: outputs are robot actions rather than human-readable tokens, and interventions can only be tested via expensive closed-loop rollouts. We propose an event-grounded interpretability pipeline that anchors SAE feature analysis to behavioral events rather than text contexts. End-effector keyframes are clustered within each task using visual, state, and temporal cues, linking SAE features to behaviorally salient events and, via optional VLM annotations, to semantic context. To our knowledge, our pipeline is among the first to ground SAE-based VLA analysis in closed-loop behavioral events. Across two simulation architectures and a real-robot study, event-grounded ranking yields the strongest causal effects on OpenVLA and transfers to the continuous action chunks of $π_{0.5}$. SAE is a sparse but imperfect intervention basis: usability varies with architecture and intervention site, and aggressive intervention reveals safety and interpretability limits. Overall, event-grounded SAE analysis emerges as a practical starting point for behavior-anchored VLA interpretability, motivating future work on SAE features beyond action-aligned coordinates, finer-grained closed-loop evaluation, and safe interventions for high-stakes VLA deployments. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/xc-j/Event-SAE}.

</details>


### [455] [Generating Realistic Safety-Critical Scenarios for Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17229)
*Qingwen Pu,Kun Xie,Yuan Zhu,Guocong Zhai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合真实数据与自适应仿真的三阶段框架，用于大规模生成行为真实的自动驾驶安全关键场景数据，并通过多项评估验证了其高保真性和实用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要在车辆-行人等安全关键场景下进行严谨验证，但现实数据稀缺高风险事件，仿真平台又难以真实复现人类行为，相应真实且丰富的安全关键互动数据成为当前发展的瓶颈。

Method: 框架分为三阶段：首先利用多智能体状态空间Transformer增强的DDPG（MA-SST-DDPG）在真实安全关键数据上预训练，学习类似人类的互作规避行为；其次，将预训练模型在CARLA仿真环境中进行在线强化学习，结合仿真与真实经验进行泛化优化，得到优化版MA-SST-DDPG；最后，利用该模型在CARLA大规模生成8类交叉口、近20万条高分辨率车辆-行人互动数据，形成VPSCI数据集。

Result: 优化后的MA-SST-DDPG模型在复现现实回避行为时表现优于基线方法，实现最小轨迹误差（ADE=0.072m，FDE=0.142m）；生成数据与现实数据在冲突严重度和行为响应上分布等价，并通过图灵测试证明仿真行为具有真实性。

Conclusion: 该三阶段框架能高效、大规模生成高保真的安全关键互动数据，极大助力于自动驾驶系统研发和仿真安全评估，为行业提供了有价值的数据资源。

Abstract: Automated driving system deployment requires rigorous validation across safety-critical vehicle-pedestrian interactions, yet real-world datasets rarely capture high-risk scenarios while simulation platforms lack realistic behavior. In response, this study proposes a three-stage framework that combines real-world grounding with adaptive simulation to generate behaviorally realistic safety-critical scenarios at scale. Stage 1 pre-trains multi-agent state-space Transformer-enhanced DDPG (MA-SST-DDPG) agents on real-world safety-critical data to learn human-like interactive evasive behaviors through data-driven learning. Stage 2 deploys pre-trained multi-agents in CARLA for online reinforcement learning to generalize across diverse scenarios, integrating real-world knowledge with simulation experience to produce a refined MA-SST-DDPG model. Stage 3 uses CARLA with the refined model to generate over 198,000 high-resolution interaction episodes from eight intersection scenarios, culminating in the Vehicle-Pedestrian Safety-Critical Interaction (VPSCI) dataset. The Refined MA-SST-DDPG model outperformed baseline methods in reproducing realistic evasive behaviors, achieving the lowest trajectory errors (ADE = 0.072 m, FDE = 0.142 m). Statistical comparison confirmed distributional equivalence between the generated and real-world data in both conflict severity and behavioral response. A Turing test confirmed that the three-stage framework generated evasive behaviors were indistinguishable from real-world interactions. These results demonstrate the framework's effectiveness in producing high-fidelity safety-critical data, offering valuable sources for the development of ADS and simulation-based safety evaluations.

</details>


### [456] [SEDualVLN: A Spatially-Enhanced Dual-System for Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17249)
*Jingzhi Huang,Junkai Huang,Wenxuan Song,Haoyang Yang,Hailong Huang,Haoang Li,Yi Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型空间感知双系统视觉-语言导航（VLN）框架SEDualVLN，通过结合两类主流VLN方法的优势，实现了导航任务的新突破。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前端到端方法虽易于训练，但难以处理长距离导航和动态推理；而零样本模块化方案虽然泛化能力强但空间感知和推理效率不足。因此需要兼顾空间推理效率与泛化能力的新方法。

Method: SEDualVLN设计了双系统：系统1为增强空间感知的视觉-语言模型，负责动作生成；系统2为集成地图模块的多模态大模型，通过结合三维地图俯视图和路径图片流进行路径点规划。两个系统以快-慢协同方式完成导航任务。

Result: 该方法在VLN-CE基准上表现出色，达成最新最优（SOTA）效果。消融实验进一步验证了各系统与模块的有效性。

Conclusion: SEDualVLN有效结合了动作预测的高效率和强化空间推理能力，在视觉-语言导航任务上取得显著性能提升，为未来相关任务提供参考。

Abstract: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) approaches have currently followed two primary paradigms: the end-to-end Vision-Language Model (VLM) policy fine-tuned on navigation trajectories to directly predict actions, and the zero-shot modular pipeline integrating pre-trained Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for training-free generalization to unseen environments. However, end-to-end methods struggle with long-horizon navigation and lack dynamic reasoning, whereas zero-shot methods are constrained by limited spatial grounding for reliable planning and also require substantial reasoning time. To bridge this gap, we introduce SEDualVLN, a spatially-enhanced dual-system VLN framework. System 1 is a VLM model enhanced with both global and local spatial awareness, used for action generation. System 2 integrates a general MLLM with a mapping module, wherein the MLLM plans waypoints by leveraging top-down views of the real-time 3D map alongside streams of rendered path images. Both systems leverage different forms of spatial enhancement to cultivate the agent's sense of direction in VLN tasks. Ultimately, they cooperate to complete the navigation task through a fast-slow coordinated approach. SEDualVLN achieves state-of-the-art performance on VLN-CE benchmarks, and further ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each system and module.

</details>


### [457] [Stretch-ICP: A Continuous-Trajectory Registration and Deskewing Algorithm in Scenarios of Aggressive Motions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17264)
*Simon-Pierre Deschênes,Veronica Vannini,Philippe Giguère,François Pomerleau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了TIGS数据集并针对剧烈运动导致的陀螺仪饱和问题提出了两种提升SLAM健壮性的新方法，有效提升了激光-惯性状态估计的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在复杂环境下，机器人往往因地面不平或打滑导致剧烈姿态变化，进而使传感器数据失真，严重影响状态估计与位置感知的准确性。因此，需要提升SLAM算法对传感器饱和及失真的鲁棒性。

Method: 1. 建立了包含极端加速度与角速度的TIGS数据集，公开发布。2. 提出饱和感知角速度估计算法（SAAVE），专门处理剧烈运动下陀螺仪数据饱和。3. 提出新型点云配准与去畸变算法Stretch-ICP，提高了SLAM在极端运动下的配准和平滑性。

Result: SAAVE算法将角速度估计误差降低了83.4%；Stretch-ICP在扫描边界线性和角速度误差分别降低95.2%和94.8%。

Conclusion: 本文创新性地提出数据集与方法，有效提升了激光-惯性联合状态估计在剧烈运动下的健壮性和一致性，对实际复杂环境下的机器人自主导航技术应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Robust robotic autonomy remains challenging in complex environments, where loss of stability on uneven or slippery terrain can induce extreme accelerations and angular velocities. Such motions corrupt sensor measurements and degrade state estimation, motivating the need for improved algorithmic robustness. To investigate this issue, we introduce the Tumbling-Induced Gyroscope Saturation (TIGS) dataset, which consists of recordings from a mechanical lidar and an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) tumbling down a hill. The dataset contains angular speeds up to four times higher than those in similar datasets and is publicly available. We then propose two complementary methods to improve Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) robustness and evaluate them on TIGS. First, Saturation-Aware Angular Velocity Estimation (SAAVE) estimates angular velocities when gyroscope measurements become saturated during aggressive motions, reducing angular speed estimation error by 83.4%. Second, Stretch-ICP, a novel registration and deskewing algorithm, enables reconstruction of smoother 6-Degrees Of Freedom (DOF) trajectories under aggressive motions compared to classical Iterative Closest Point (ICP). Stretch-ICP reduces linear and angular velocity errors by 95.2% and 94.8%, respectively, at scan boundaries. Together, these contributions improve the robustness and consistency of lidar-inertial state estimation under aggressive motions.

</details>


### [458] [Task Capability Improvement Algorithm for Collaborative Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17293)
*Keshab Patra,Arpita Sinha,Anirban Guha*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出通过利用附加力矩来提升多机器人协作搬运任务的能力，并通过仿真验证提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多机器人协作搬运中，操作点经常偏离物体重心，产生力矩（附加力矩），过去往往忽略这些未利用的力矩资源。如何有效利用这些力矩提升搬运能力，成为优化任务完成和提升容错性的关键问题。

Method: 设计机器人在抓取点施加力的同时，有意识地利用非重心点带来的附加力矩，将其作为提升操作能力的资源。通过仿真实验比较有无附加力矩利用下的搬运能力差异。

Result: 仿真结果显示，相比完全不利用附加力矩的情况，合理利用力矩可提升协作机器人整体能力约5.86%。

Conclusion: 合理利用因抓取点偏移重心产生的附加力矩，能显著提升多机器人系统的协作任务能力，有助于实现更优的能力发挥、资源分配和故障容忍。

Abstract: This work introduces a cooperative task capability improvement utilizing additional moments. The manipulators apply forces at the object's grasp point. Applying forces at a point other than the object's center of gravity produces undesired moments. The undesired moment acts as an additional moment. It improves the capability of an individual manipulator and, hence, the entire collaborative group. Any improvements in task capability directly add up to the object and transportation capability. The group's enhanced capability also helps achieve optimal capability, optimal resource allocation, and maximum fault tolerance in object manipulation. Our simulation results show an improvement in the capability of 5.86 \% compared to when no moment is used to enhance the capability of the manipulators.

</details>


### [459] [HCLM: A Hierarchical Framework for Cooperative Loco-Manipulation with Dual Quadrupeds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17300)
*Qixuan Li,Chen Le,Jincheng Yu,Xinlei Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于双四足机器人协作行走与操作的分层控制框架HCLM，实现鲁棒的多机器人联合操作，并具备极强的抗扰能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人在无固定底座下进行物体协作搬运非常困难，主要面临空间协调、鲁棒行走和闭链物理交互三重挑战，因此亟需新的架构来实现有效协作。

Method: 采用分层架构：高层基于Joint Diffusion Policy，利用SE(3)不变量的任务空间表达学会空间协调性，低层采用混合式全身控制器（MPC结合反应层），确保末端精准跟踪，并用主动协同服从机制解决闭链应力问题。

Result: 在合作搬运、打包及交接等仿真和实际任务中验证了系统的有效性，表现出高可靠性、任务通用性和极强的物理鲁棒性。

Conclusion: HCLM框架为多机器人实体协调提供了高鲁棒性和广泛适应能力，有助于多机器人合作操作任务的发展。

Abstract: We introduce HCLM, a hierarchical framework for general-purpose cooperative loco-manipulation with dual quadrupedal systems. Coordinating multi-robot collaborative manipulation across floating bases is highly challenging due to the conflicting demands of spatial coordination, robust locomotion, and closed-chain physical interactions. To resolve this, our architecture systematically decouples high-level collaborative reasoning from low-level robust motion execution. At the high level, a centralized Joint Diffusion Policy leverages an SE(3)-invariant task-space representation to learn coordinate-agnostic spatial coordination patterns. To translate these frame-agnostic references into physical motion, a task-centric hybrid Whole-Body Controller synergizes a proactive kinematic Model Predictive Control for collision-free velocity distribution with a reactive execution layer. Crucially, this reactive layer guarantees rapid responsiveness for precise end-effector tracking, while concurrently integrating active force regulation via a cooperative admittance scheme to safely resolve kinematic conflicts and strictly regulate internal stresses during closed-chain interactions. We validate the framework across progressively challenging simulated scenarios, including cooperative carrying, packing and handovers, and successfully deploy the latter in the real world. The results demonstrate reliable task execution, strict configuration agnosticism, and exceptional resilience against severe physical perturbations, offering a highly robust pathway for multi-robot embodied coordination.

</details>


### [460] [Beyond Geometry: Efficient Topologically-Grounded Navigation in Complex 3D Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17302)
*Yifan Du,Chengwei Zhang,Siyu Liao,Zhongfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种面向地面机器人复杂3D环境导航的表面提取框架，实现了80%以上的状态空间压缩和亚毫秒级A*搜索，同时在所有测试场景下规划成功率达100%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂3D场景中，地面机器人导航受限于几何歧义（如家具与地板表面相似）和大规模体素搜索的高计算开销。

Method: 通过引入地面支撑、头顶间隙和基于种子的连通性约束，提出了表面提取框架，将状态空间压缩为物理可达的站立点，实现导航状态空间精简。

Result: 在5个Matterport3D和3个PCT基准场景上，状态空间压缩超过80%；A*搜索在Matterport3D场景下耗时不足1毫秒，300次规划查询100%成功。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效提高了地面机器人在复杂3D场景中的导航效率和规划成功率，大幅度减少了计算资源消耗。

Abstract: Ground robot navigation in complex 3D environments is often hindered by geometric ambiguity, where non-traversable structures such as furniture share local geometric properties with navigable ground. Furthermore, the computational cost of searching massive voxel spaces remains a significant challenge. To address these issues, we present a surface extraction framework that constructs a reduced state space of physically reachable standing positions by enforcing ground support, overhead clearance, and seed-based connectivity constraints. Evaluation across five Matterport3D indoor scenes and three PCT benchmark scenes demonstrates over 80\% state space reduction and sub-millisecond A* search on the Matterport3D scenes, with 100\% planning success across all 300 tested queries.

</details>


### [461] [Efficient Feature-Free Initialization for Monocular Visual-Inertial Systems Using a Feed-Forward 3D Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17327)
*Yuantai Zhang,Jiaqi Yang,Huajian Zeng,Changhao Chen,Haoang Li,Liang Li,Dezhen Song,Xingxing Zuo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需依赖特征点的单目视觉惯性导航系统（VINS）初始化方法，利用前馈式3D模型直接从图像预测点云，实现更快更可靠的初始化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VINS初始化方法依赖于视觉特征点匹配，需较长的数据采集时间（3-4秒），导致复杂度高、效率低，且在特征不丰富或退化场景下鲁棒性差。

Method: 作者设计了一种特征点无关的初始化框架，通过前馈3D模型从单张图像直接预测无尺度点云，结合惯性测量，无需跟踪或估计视觉特征，大幅简化了初始化流程。

Result: 在公开数据集上，该方法初始化成功率超90%，所需初始化数据时长降至1.2秒以内。在作者自采集的室内外数据集上，该方法在特征退化环境下依然保持较高稳健性。

Conclusion: 该特征点无关初始化方法有效提升了单目VINS初始化速度与鲁棒性，尤其适用于特征受限或视觉退化场景，为实际应用带来显著优势。

Abstract: Fast and reliable initialization is critical for monocular visual-inertial navigation systems (VINS), as it establishes the starting conditions for subsequent state estimation. Despite steady progress, most existing methods heavily rely on visual feature correspondences and require 3-4 seconds of sensory data for successful initialization, which limits their applicability and efficiency. With the advent of feed-forward 3D models that can directly predict point clouds from images, we revisit the visual-inertial initialization problem from a concise perspective. In this work, we propose a feature-free initialization framework that leverages up-to-scale point clouds predicted by a feed-forward 3D model, thereby obviating the need for visual feature tracking and estimation. This design substantially reduces system complexity and improves the reliability of initialization. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate that the proposed feature-free initialization method achieves the highest success rate, exceeding 90%, and significantly reduces the data duration required for successful initialization, typically to under 1.2 s. We further validate our method on a self-collected dataset covering various indoor and outdoor scenarios, demonstrating robust performance, particularly in visually degraded environments where existing methods often fail. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Yuantai-Z/FF-VIO-Init.

</details>


### [462] [Tactile-based Multimodal Fusion in Embodied Intelligence: A Survey of Vision, Language, and Contact-Driven Paradigms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17336)
*Zhixiang Cao,Di Tian,Runwei Guan,Yanzhou Mu,Xiaolou Sun,Shaofeng Liang,Daizong Liu,Tao Huang,Yutao Yue,Henghui Ding,Bin Fang,Alex Zhou,Qing-Long Han,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了多模态触觉融合领域的最新进展，提出了系统的分类方法，并总结了核心研究和未来挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单一模态触觉感知存在空间覆盖少、语义理解不足等局限性。随着深度学习和大模型的发展，亟需将触觉与视觉、语言等多模态信息融合，实现物理交互与逻辑推理的结合。该领域研究分散，缺乏统一理论框架，论文旨在梳理和整合相关研究。

Method: 作者提出了分层分类体系，将领域划分为多模态数据集和多模态方法两大方向。其中数据集又细分为四类（触觉-视觉、触觉-语言、触觉-视觉-语言、触觉-视觉-其他）；方法则分为多模态感知识别、跨模态生成、多模态交互三类。此外还总结了代表性的触觉硬件、评价指标和基准设定。

Result: 系统归纳整理了包括数据集、传感器硬件、主流方法、评价标准和重要进展等方面的内容，呈现了当前多模态触觉融合的整体研究图谱。

Conclusion: 当前多模态触觉融合虽进展迅速，但在理论统一、数据多样性、算法泛化等方面仍存挑战。作者指出相关研究未来具有极大发展前景，并建议加强方法标准化和学科交叉融合。

Abstract: Tactile sensing is a fundamental modality for embodied intelligence, offering unique and direct feedback on contact geometry, material properties, and interaction dynamics that remote sensors cannot replace. However, unimodal tactile perception is inherently limited by its sparse spatial coverage and lack of global semantic context. With the recent explosion in deep learning and large language models, integrating tactile with vision and language has become essential to bridge physical interaction with semantic reasoning, leading to the emergence of Multimodal Tactile Fusion. Despite rapid progress, the existing researches remain fragmented across disparate datasets, sensing modalities, and tasks, lacking a unified theoretical framework. To address this gap, this paper provides a comprehensive survey of multimodal tactile fusion research up to the first quarter of 2026. We propose a hierarchical taxonomy that organizes the field into two primary dimensions: multimodal datasets and multimodal methods. On the data side, we categorize resources ranging from Tactile-Vision datasets, Tactile-Language datasets, Tactile-Vision-Language datasets, and Tactile-Vision-Other datasets. On the method side, we structure prior work into three core pillars: (1) Multimodal Perception and Recognition, which focuses on object understanding and grasp prediction; (2) Cross-Modal Generation, focusing on bidirectional translation between tactile, vision, and text; and (3) Multimodal Interaction, emphasizing feedback control and language-guided manipulation. Furthermore, we summarize representative tactile sensing hardware, review commonly used evaluation metrics and benchmark settings, and discuss current challenges and promising future directions.

</details>


### [463] [MUSE: Multimodal Uncertainty Quantification of State Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17421)
*Minkyung Kim,Henry Che,Bhargav Chandaka,Bhumsitt Pramuanpornsatid,Chengyu Yang,Sheng Cheng,Xiaofeng Wang,Naira Hovakimyan,Shenlong Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种名为MUSE的新型实时学习框架，能基于多个异步传感器流对视觉惯性里程计中的状态估计不确定性进行高效建模与量化，并展示了优于现有方法的可靠性和健壮性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管当前视觉状态估计算法已越来越准确，但如何定量测量和校准其估计的可信度（即失败检测和误差可信区间），特别是在存在异方差与多峰误差的VIO任务中，仍然是一个核心难题。

Method: 提出利用Mamba的时序建模能力，结合多源异步传感器数据，设计了一个端到端、可实时运行的学习框架MUSE，用于定量分析、建模和输出状态估计的不确定度。并通过消融实验评估了框架不同组件的作用。

Result: 在公开和自有数据集上的实验表明，MUSE在不确定度量与鲁棒性方面均优于以往方法，并通过消融实验验证了主要设计的有效性。

Conclusion: MUSE能够更有效地为VIO等应用提供准确合理的不确定性估计，有助于提升下游机器人任务的安全性和可靠性。

Abstract: Accurate visual state estimation has been a central topic in robotics with a wide range of applications in robot navigation, autonomous driving, and autonomous flight. Recent advances in robot perception have led to significant improvements in the accuracy and robustness of state estimation, yet a fundamental challenge remains in how to quantify and calibrate its precision, i.e., how confident we are in an estimate and whether failures can be detected. This issue is particularly pronounced in visual-inertial odometry (VIO), where the heteroscedastic and multimodal nature of the problem makes uncertainty quantification especially difficult. This paper introduces MUSE (Multimodal Uncertainty Quantification of State Estimation), a novel real-time learning-based framework that leverages the strong and efficient sequential modeling capacity of Mamba to estimate localization uncertainty from multiple asynchronous sensor streams. Experiments on both public and in-house datasets demonstrate that MUSE achieves superior reliability and robustness compared to existing uncertainty quantification methods, and ablation studies justify the benefits of its key design choices.

</details>


### [464] [Rapid Vibration Suppression and Trajectory Tracking of a Serial Manipulator with Multi-Flexible Links](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17477)
*Chengyi Wang,Yilong Huang,Ji Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于多自由度串联柔性机械臂（nDSFMR）的基于backstepping输出反馈的振动抑制与末端轨迹跟踪新方法，并结合DeepONet神经算子实现更高效的控制器近似。实验表明其性能优于传统LQR方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔性机械臂虽具有轻量和大工作空间等优势，但结构柔性带来的振动等问题严重影响操作性能，这在多连杆系统中尤为突出，因此急需一种高效、实时的振动抑制与跟踪控制策略。

Method: 将每个连杆-关节建模为Timoshenko梁并结合ODE，转化为超曲线PDE的标准形式，通过backstepping方法设计关节边界控制器，只依赖边界测量实现分布阻尼注入，并采用DeepONet神经算子对backstepping核函数进行近似，提高控制器的实时性和适应性。

Result: 在双连杆柔性机械臂上的实验证明，该方法能够更快抑制振动，使末端更迅速收敛到目标轨迹，相比LQR与前馈控制方法具有更优性能。

Conclusion: 所提方法可高效抑制多自由度柔性机械臂的振动并提升轨迹跟踪性能，结合DeepONet后可显著降低实时计算负担，显示了良好的工程应用潜力。

Abstract: Flexible robotic manipulators (FRMs) offer advantages in lightweight design and large workspace, but their structural flexibility induces vibrations, accelerates fatigue, degrades tracking performance, and limits operational speed. These challenges are further amplified in multi-link serial manipulators, where increased overall length leads to greater structural flexibility. This article presents a backstepping output-feedback framework for fast vibration suppression and tip tracking of an n-degree-of-freedom serial flexible manipulator robot (nDSFMR), with a DeepONet-based approximation for practical deployment. Each link-joint is modeled as a Timoshenko beam coupled with an ODE and transformed into a canonical hyperbolic PDE with boundary dynamics. A backstepping-based boundary controller at the joint is developed to equivalently inject distributed damping along the beam, enabling rapid vibration suppression and trajectory tracking, only using available boundary measurements. To enable real-time implementation and scalability, a DeepONet neural operator is introduced to approximate the backstepping kernels, significantly reducing computational cost and facilitating fast controller updates under varying operating conditions. Experiments on a two-link flexible manipulator demonstrate faster vibration suppression and convergence of the end-effector to the desired trajectory, compared with a linear quadratic regulator (LQR) with feedforward control.

</details>


### [465] [DyGRO-VLA: Cross-Task Scaling of Vision-Language-Action Models via Dynamic Grouped Residual Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17486)
*Sixu Lin,Yunpeng Qing,Litao Liu,Ming Zhou,Ruixing Jin,Xiaoyi Fan,Guiliang Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了DyGRO-VLA框架，旨在提升视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA模型）在多任务和分布转移环境下的泛化能力，相较于以往基于强化学习的优化器具有更好的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前大多数用于VLA模型的强化学习优化方法，虽然可以提升模型的控制精度，但往往只适用于特定任务，导致模型过拟合，丧失了作为通用控制器的能力。因此，提升VLA模型的跨任务泛化能力成为亟需解决的问题。

Method: 作者提出了DyGRO-VLA的两阶段优化框架。第一阶段基于信息论原则，捕捉任务间潜在的、共享的特征表示；第二阶段通过引入RL残差混合的方式，动态优化策略，既利用任务相关的潜在信息，又有效避免策略优化过程中对已学习表示的不良干扰。

Result: 在LIBERO、RoboTwin2等基准以及实际机器人系统上进行实验，DyGRO-VLA在多任务训练和分布转移场景下，相比现有强基线方法表现出持续的性能提升。

Conclusion: DyGRO-VLA能够有效改善VLA模型的泛化能力，使其在多任务和迁移学习场景下具有更优的表现，是推动通用视觉-语言-动作智能体发展的重要方法。

Abstract: Recent progress in Reinforcement Learning (RL) provides a principled approach to optimizing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, facilitating a shift from trajectory imitation to active learning in the task environment. Despite improvements in control precision, most RL optimizers remain task-specific, which reduces VLA models from generalist controllers to policies that overfit to a narrow set of tasks. In this study, we conduct an in-depth analysis of this phenomenon and highlight the importance of cross-task feature representations for improving the generalizability of VLA models. Motivated by this finding, we introduce DyGRO-VLA, a two-stage optimization framework that 1) effectively captures cross-task latent representations based on information-theoretic principles, and 2) dynamically refines policy optimization via a mixture-of-RL-residuals. DyGRO-VLA enables the RL optimizer to exploit task-relevant latent information while strategically mitigating adverse interference on the learned representations throughout the optimization process. We evaluate our approach on LIBERO, RoboTwin2 benchmarks, and further validate it on real world, demonstrating consistent improvements over strong baselines under multi-task training and distribution shift.

</details>


### [466] [AffordVLA: Injecting Affordance Representations into Vision-Language-Action Models via Implicit Feature Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17517)
*Weijie Kong,Zhian Su,Wei Yu,Huixu Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型AffordVLA，通过隐式对齐操作赋予模型抓取相关功能感知，无需额外标注和掩码，提高了机器人在复杂环境下的操控表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型视觉表示受制于全局外观，难以关注具体任务相关的功能区域，导致在复杂或无结构环境中表现不佳。多数现有的基于可供性的方法还需显式掩码或外部模块，带来推理效率下降及感知误差等问题。

Method: 作者提出AffordVLA框架，首先构建了零样本可供性教师模型，根据任务指令和RGB图像提取任务相关的可供性视觉表示。AffordVLA通过将VLA中间视觉表示与可供性教师的表示对齐，实现在不需要显式掩码或外部模块条件下，将可供性感知能力隐式融入VLA视觉表示中。

Result: 在大量仿真和真实世界实验中，AffordVLA及其教师模型在操控任务上优于现有强基线并达到最新水平；消融实验显示其能高效改进视觉表示且推理效率不受影响。

Conclusion: AffordVLA可以显著提升机器人操控任务中的视觉表示能力及任务成功率，无需额外标注和感知推理负担，为VLA模型在实际应用中提供了更强适应性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation. However, the visual representations of most VLA models are often dominated by global object appearance and struggle to focus on task-relevant functional interaction regions, which limits their robustness in unstructured environments. Existing affordance-based methods typically rely on explicit mask injection or external perception modules, requiring additional annotations while introducing cascading perception errors and inference overhead. To address these limitations, we propose AffordVLA, an affordance-enhanced VLA framework that internalizes manipulation-centric affordance perception into VLA visual representations through implicit representation alignment. Specifically, we construct a zero-shot affordance teacher to extract task-conditioned affordance visual representations from RGB observations and language instructions. AffordVLA aligns the intermediate visual representations of the VLA with the affordance visual representations extracted by the teacher, thereby implicitly injecting manipulation-centric affordance perception into VLA visual representations and improving action accuracy. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that AffordVLA and its affordance teacher achieve state-of-the-art performance and outperform strong baselines. Ablation analyses show that AffordVLA effectively reshapes VLA visual representations while preserving inference efficiency, leading to improved manipulation success rates and training efficiency.

</details>


### [467] [RoboFlow4D: A Lightweight Flow World Model Toward Real-Time Flow-Guided Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17522)
*Sixu Lin,Junliang Chen,Huaiyuan Xu,Zhuohao Li,Guangming Wang,Yixiong Jing,Sheng Xu,Runyi Zhao,Brian Sheil,Lap-Pui Chau,Guiliang Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级的三维流动世界模型RoboFlow4D，实现了感知与规划的统一，并有效提升了机器人三维操作任务的效率与成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有三维操作任务的流引导规划方法通常依赖多阶段模型，导致计算开销高、实时性能差，难以适应实际需求。

Method: RoboFlow4D建立端到端架构，直接从视觉观察和文本指令预测多帧三维流，并提供基于流的显式规划，指导动作生成。通过流预测与动作控制的慢-快协作，实现高效的闭环观察-规划-执行流程。

Result: 在仿真和实际机器人场景下，RoboFlow4D方案表现出更高的操作成功率和更低的计算资源消耗。

Conclusion: RoboFlow4D推进了基于流的三维操作规划，实现了高效、实时且资源友好的机器人自主操作。

Abstract: Planning and acting in 3D environments is a fundamental capability for robotic manipulation in the real world. Although prior work has explored predictive flow planners to guide 3D manipulation, existing approaches often rely on modular pipelines stacking multiple submodels, resulting in high computational overhead and limited real-time performance. To address these challenges, we introduce RoboFlow4D, a lightweight flow world model that unifies perception and planning by estimating temporal motion in physical 3D space. As an end-to-end framework, RoboFlow4D directly predicts multi-frame 3D flows from visual observations and textual instructions, providing explicit flow-based planning to guide action generation. This design allows seamless integration with general action policies, forming an efficient observation-planning-execution closed loop. Through slow-fast collaboration between flow prediction and action control, RoboFlow4D enables real-time and resource-efficient manipulation. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world settings demonstrate that RoboFlow4D consistently improves manipulation success rates and computational efficiency, advancing flow-guided planning for embodied intelligence.

</details>


### [468] [Visual Sculpting: Visually-Aligned Planning Representations for Long-Horizon Robot Clay Sculpting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17556)
*Peter Schaldenbrand,Jean Oh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视觉对齐表示的机器人陶泥雕塑方案，通过建模变形材料的动力学，实现可兼容视觉规划的自动雕塑。该方法不仅能够处理多种变形材料，在性能上与现有方法相当，并支持超过100步的长时规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的变形物体操控方法存在两个不足：一是通常需要针对每个目标重新训练策略，二是模型的状态表示多为稀疏点云，难以表现陶泥的纹理等细节特征。因此，作者希望找到一种更适用于视觉表现，并能提升雕塑质量和规划能力的动力学建模及控制方法。

Method: 本文将陶泥雕塑建模为形状匹配问题，提出利用视觉对齐的状态表示（捕捉光照和纹理），并训练变形材料的动力学模型。采用单端执行器对陶泥进行参数化推压，结合视觉规划，实现自动化、长时长的雕塑任务。

Result: 在三种不同变形材料、各种末端执行器下，动力学模型表现出与现有最优方法相当的性能。在长达100步以上的雕塑中表现良好。同时证明视觉对齐表示有助于规划，但也分析了其带来的挑战。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能够完整捕捉陶泥等材料的复杂视觉特性，为视觉驱动下的自动雕塑提供了新路径，不需频繁重训练，具有较高通用性。同时，论文也指出了视觉表示在复杂规划任务中的难点。

Abstract: Clay sculpting is a nuanced, artistic task involving dexterous manipulation with long-horizon planning to achieve high-level goals. As a robotics problem, we formulate clay sculpting as a shape-to-shape matching challenge. Prior deformable object manipulation work either requires retraining a policy per goal or relies on dynamics models which represent state as sparse point clouds which do not capture important clay features, such as textures, well. We present a method for modeling the dynamics of deformable materials and planning for robotic sculpting in a representation that is visually-aligned, capturing lighting and texture features. With three different deformable materials and various end-effectors, we demonstrate that our dynamics model is comparable in performance to the state-of-the-art with the added benefit of being compatible with visual planning. Our actions are represented as parametrized pushes into clay with a single end-effector, which proved to be suitable for long-horizon (>100 actions) clay relief sculptures. Lastly, we show the benefits of planning in a visually-aligned representation, but also provide analysis providing evidence as to why this representation is challenging to plan in compared to 3D representations.

</details>


### [469] [Motion-Uncertainty-Aware Next-Best-View Planning for Moving Object Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17593)
*Karen Li,Mattia Mantovani,Robert J. Wood,Lorenzo Sabattini,Stephanie Gil*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对运动物体的三维重建方法，结合了运动不确定性因素，能够在物体运动和观测噪声背景下选择更优的观测视角，实现对未知刚性物体的高质量重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有三维重建方法多假设物体静止，无法有效处理目标运动及其不确定性；而关注目标运动的感知方法则更侧重于追踪和可见性，忽略了覆盖重建的需求。因此，融合运动预测和重建覆盖的主动视角选择成为亟需解决的难题。

Method: 提出了一种运动不确定性感知的下一个最佳视角（NBV）框架，对处于平面运动且观测受噪声影响的未知刚体，通过高斯过程平滑器预测目标未来可能状态，进而据此评估各候选视角在未来状态下的预期观测质量，并结合机器人可达性进行视角筛选，优化三维重建的覆盖度。

Result: 仿真和真实机器人实验均验证了该方法的有效性，显示在重建完整性方面较传统静态NBV算法和单纯运动预测追踪法有明显提升。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效融合了重建覆盖和运动预测优势，能够更好地应对移动目标的三维主动重建任务，并为运动感知和重建方向提供了桥梁。

Abstract: Active 3D reconstruction of moving objects requires selecting informative viewpoints while accounting for object motion uncertainty during the decision-to-execution delay. Existing methods address only parts of this problem: next-best-view (NBV) planners for object reconstruction typically optimize surface coverage but assume static objects, while motion-aware active perception for moving targets accounts for target motion but prioritizes tracking or visibility over reconstruction coverage. This work presents a motion-uncertainty-aware NBV framework for reconstructing an unknown rigid object undergoing planar motion, using noisy planar position measurements of the object and depth observations from a mobile robot. The key idea is to evaluate each candidate viewpoint by its expected observation quality over plausible future object states induced by motion and measurement uncertainty, rather than at a single predicted object pose. To obtain this predictive belief, a fixed-lag Gaussian Process smoother estimates and predicts the object state from noisy position measurements. The resulting belief is used to generate candidate viewpoints around the predicted object location, filter them by reachability, and estimate their expected coverage-driven scores. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate improved reconstruction completeness over non-predictive NBV and prediction-only tracking methods, bridging coverage-driven active reconstruction and prediction-driven tracking.

</details>


### [470] [From a Single Demonstration to a General Policy for Contact-Rich Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17601)
*Xing Li,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用环境约束实现一演示泛化能力的模仿学习框架，能高效处理涉及多阶段和复杂接触的操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前模仿学习方法在泛化能力上存在局限，尤其在多阶段且涉及复杂接触的操作任务中。通过引入环境约束作为归纳偏置，有望提升从单次演示中学习后在新情境下的泛化能力。

Method: 方法将人类演示表述为一系列利用环境约束的行为。机器人首先将演示抽象为环境约束原语，然后通过自我探索消除歧义，再通过人类校正应对分布外变化，最终在实际操作时恢复细节。政策执行过程中基于约束而不是轨迹模仿，通过四步流程实现泛化。

Result: 在7项多阶段、接触丰富的实际操作任务上实验，成功率超过90%。

Conclusion: 环境约束作为模仿学习泛化的基本构件，能极大提升一演示泛化能力，对于多阶段、接触复杂任务尤为有效。

Abstract: We present a Learning from Demonstration (LfD) framework that achieves one-shot generalization in multi-stage, contact-rich manipulation tasks. Central to our approach is the utilization of environmental constraints as the inductive bias. By representing a demonstration as a sequence of behaviors that exploit environmental constraints, the robot separates task-general structure -- the constraint types and their transitions -- from instance-specific details such as exact demonstration trajectories, poses, and local geometries. Our four-stage pipeline builds a complete policy on this representation: the robot first abstracts a single demonstration into environmental-constraint primitives, then disambiguates them through self-guided exploration, next assimilates targeted human corrections that handle out-of-distribution variations, and finally recovers the abstracted-away details online through compliant interaction. Because the resulting policy follows constraints rather than mimics trajectories, it generalizes across object poses, local geometries, and unmodeled contact dynamics. We validate our approach on seven real-world multi-stage contact-rich manipulation tasks and achieve over 90% success. These extensive experimental results establish environmental constraints as fundamental building blocks for efficient generalization in learning from demonstration.

</details>


### [471] [Mono-Hydra++: Real-Time Monocular Scene Graph Construction with Multi-Task Learning for 3D Indoor Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17661)
*U. V. B. L. Udugama,George Vosselman,Francesco Nex*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效、实时的单目RGB+IMU语义地图和3D场景图构建系统Mono-Hydra++，可在资源受限的机器人平台上实现准确的空间理解，无需使用笨重的深度传感器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D地图主要提供几何信息，难以支持机器人对空间、物体及其关系的语义理解，而现有的深度相机和LiDAR体积大、耗能高，难以应用于轻量级、灵活的机器人。因此，急需仅使用单目摄像头和IMU，实现精准高效的室内语义场景图构建方案。

Method: Mono-Hydra++结合了基于DINOv3的多任务模型M2H-MX（负责深度与语义预测）、深度特征视觉-惯性里程计、利用预测稀疏深度约束构建的位姿图、动态区语义遮罩、与姿态相关的时序对齐，最后在Mono-Hydra后端进行体素融合，实现室内三维语义场景图自动生成。

Result: 在Go-SLAM ScanNet子集上，Mono-Hydra++的平均轨迹误差比最强RGB-D基线低1.6%，在7-Scenes上ATE提升约29.8%；实机测试显示该系统可实时运行于Jetson Orin NX设备（25.53 FPS），验证了算法在实际轻量嵌入式硬件的可行性。

Conclusion: Mono-Hydra++无需依赖RGB-D或LiDAR等主动深度传感器，即可在资源受限平台上实现高精度、实时的室内语义地图与三维场景图构建，推动自主灵活机器人在复杂环境下的空间理解能力。

Abstract: Autonomous agile robots need more than metric geometry: they must understand objects, rooms, places, and spatial relations for search, inspection, exploration, and human robot interaction. Conventional metric maps support localization and collision avoidance, but do not provide this semantic and relational structure. 3D scene graphs address this gap by connecting geometry with object level and room level understanding. Building such representations on agile platforms remains difficult because aerial and lightweight robots operate under strict payload, power, and compute limits, making RGB-D cameras and LiDAR sensors impractical for many onboard settings. We present Mono-Hydra++, a real time monocular RGB plus IMU pipeline for indoor metric semantic mapping and hierarchical 3D scene graph construction. The system combines M2H-MX, a DINOv3 based multi-task model for depth and semantics, with a deep feature visual inertial odometry front end, sparse predicted depth constraints in the VIO derived pose graph, semantic masking for dynamic regions, and pose aware temporal alignment before volumetric fusion in the Mono-Hydra backend. On the Go-SLAM ScanNet evaluation subset, Mono-Hydra++ achieves 1.6% lower average trajectory error than the strongest RGB-D baseline in our comparison, while using only monocular RGB plus IMU input. On calibrated 7-Scenes, it improves average ATE by 29.8% over the strongest competing calibrated baseline. We further validate Mono-Hydra++ in a real ITC building deployment using RealSense RGB plus IMU and demonstrate embedded feasibility by deploying the ONNX/TensorRT FP16 M2H-MX-L perception model at 25.53 FPS on a Jetson Orin NX 16GB. These results show that Mono-Hydra++ can provide real time metric semantic mapping and scene graph construction for resource constrained robotic platforms without relying on active depth sensors.

</details>


### [472] [PRIME: Physically-consistent Robotic Inertial and Motion Estimation for Legged and Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17681)
*Jiarong Kang,Kunzhao Ren,Tao Pang,Xiaobin Xiong*

Main category: cs.RO
